words.meaning_en: Concerning beauty or the appreciation of beauty.
words.meaning_zh: a. 美学的, 审美的, 有美感的
words.derivation: aesthet(感觉) + -ic(……的) → 关于感知的 → 审美的
words.example: The museum's aesthetic design attracted visitors from around the world.
words.example_zh: 博物馆的审美设计吸引了来自世界各地的游客。

words.meaning_en: The capacity or power to do something.
words.meaning_zh: n. 能力, 才干
words.derivation: abil(能够) + -ity(性质) → 能够的性质 → 能力
words.example: Her ability to speak multiple languages made her an excellent translator.
words.example_zh: 她说多种语言的能力使她成为一名优秀的翻译。

words.meaning_en: Willing to talk and engage in activities with others; friendly.
words.meaning_zh: a. 好交际的, 社交的, 友好的
words.derivation: soci(社会) + -able(能够……的) → 能够社交的 → 好交际的
words.example: My roommate is very sociable and makes friends easily wherever she goes.
words.example_zh: 我的室友非常善于交际，无论走到哪里都能轻松交到朋友。

words.meaning_en: Land that is suitable for growing crops.
words.meaning_zh: a. 适于耕种的, 可耕的
words.derivation: ar(耕) + -able(能够……的) → 能够耕种的 → 可耕的
words.example: The region's arable land has been farmed for centuries by local communities.
words.example_zh: 该地区的可耕地几个世纪以来一直被当地社区耕种。

words.meaning_en: Able to be hammered or pressed into shape; easily influenced.
words.meaning_zh: a. 有延展性的, 可锻的, 易适应的
words.derivation: malle(锤打) + -able(能够……的) → 能够被锤打的 → 可锻的
words.example: Gold is a malleable metal that can be shaped into intricate jewelry designs.
words.example_zh: 黄金是一种可锻金属，可以被塑造成复杂的珠宝设计。

words.meaning_en: Open and responsive to suggestion; easily persuaded or controlled.
words.meaning_zh: a. 服从的, 顺从的, 易控制的
words.derivation: amen(引导) + -able(能够……的) → 能够被引导的 → 服从的
words.example: The committee members were amenable to changing the meeting time to accommodate everyone.
words.example_zh: 委员会成员愿意改变会议时间以适应每个人的需要。

words.meaning_en: Easily seen or noticed; clear or apparent.
words.meaning_zh: a. 显而易见的, 显著的, 值得注意的
words.derivation: notice(注意) + -able(能够……的) → 能够被注意的 → 显著的
words.example: There was a noticeable improvement in her test scores after she started studying regularly.
words.example_zh: 她开始定期学习后，考试成绩有了明显的提高。

words.meaning_en: Pleasant to taste or acceptable to the mind.
words.meaning_zh: a. 美味的, 可口的, 可接受的
words.derivation: palat(味觉) + -able(能够……的) → 能够被味觉接受的 → 美味的
words.example: The chef made the healthy vegetables more palatable by adding flavorful herbs and spices.
words.example_zh: 厨师通过添加美味的香草和香料使健康蔬菜更加可口。

words.meaning_en: Relevant or appropriate to a particular situation.
words.meaning_zh: a. 适用的, 可应用的
words.derivation: applic(应用) + -able(能够……的) → 能够被应用的 → 适用的
words.example: These safety regulations are applicable to all employees working in the laboratory.
words.example_zh: 这些安全规定适用于所有在实验室工作的员工。

meaning_zh: 形容词后缀：能够…的，值得…的

words.meaning_en: able to be maintained at a certain rate or level
words.meaning_zh: 可持续的
words.derivation: sustain(维持) + able(能…的) → 能够持续维持的 → 可持续的
words.example: We need to find sustainable sources of energy.
words.example_zh: 我们需要找到可持续的能源。

words.meaning_en: able to be reached or entered; easy to understand
words.meaning_zh: 可接近的，可获得的
words.derivation: access(接近) + ible(能…的) → 能够接近的 → 可接近的
words.example: The building is accessible to people with disabilities.
words.example_zh: 这座建筑对残障人士是无障碍的。

words.meaning_en: notably large in size, amount, or extent
words.meaning_zh: 相当大的，重要的
words.derivation: consider(考虑) + able(值得…的) → 值得考虑的(规模) → 相当大的
words.example: The research required a considerable amount of time.
words.example_zh: 这项研究需要相当多的时间。

words.meaning_en: certain to happen; unavoidable
words.meaning_zh: 不可避免的，必然的
words.derivation: in(不) + evit(避免) + able(能…的) → 不能避免的 → 不可避免的
words.example: Change is inevitable in any growing organization.
words.example_zh: 在任何成长中的组织里，变化是不可避免的。

words.meaning_en: able to exist or occur together without conflict
words.meaning_zh: 兼容的，相容的
words.derivation: com(共同) + pat(感受) + ible(能…的) → 能共同感受的 → 兼容的
words.example: The software is compatible with most operating systems.
words.example_zh: 这款软件与大多数操作系统兼容。

words.meaning_en: Very serious or severe; having a sharp end or point.
words.meaning_zh: a. 尖锐的, 敏锐的, 严重的, 急性的
words.derivation: ac(尖) + -ute(形容词) → 尖的 → 尖锐的，敏锐的
words.example: The patient was admitted to the hospital with acute chest pain.
words.example_zh: 病人因急性胸痛被送进医院。

words.meaning_en: A chemical substance with a sour taste that has a pH less than 7.
words.meaning_zh: n. 酸, 酸性物质; a. 酸的, 尖刻的
words.derivation: ac(尖) + -id → 尖锐的味道 → 酸
words.example: Lemon juice contains citric acid, which gives it a sour taste.
words.example_zh: 柠檬汁含有柠檬酸，这使它有酸味。

words.meaning_en: The level of acid in a substance.
words.meaning_zh: n. 酸性, 酸度
words.derivation: acid(酸) + -ity(性质) → 酸的性质 → 酸度
words.example: The acidity of the soil affects which plants can grow successfully in the garden.
words.example_zh: 土壤的酸度影响花园中哪些植物能够成功生长。

words.meaning_en: Related to education and scholarship; theoretical rather than practical.
words.meaning_zh: a. 学术的, 学院的; n. 学者
words.derivation: academ(学院) + -ic(……的) → 与学院有关的 → 学术的
words.example: She pursued an academic career and became a professor of biology.
words.example_zh: 她从事学术职业，成为了一名生物学教授。

words.meaning_en: A school or institution of specialized learning.
words.meaning_zh: n. 学院, 研究院, 学会
words.derivation: academ(学院) + -y(名词) → 学院
words.example: The military academy trains future officers for all branches of the armed forces.
words.example_zh: 军事学院为武装部队的所有分支培训未来的军官。

words.meaning_en: From one side to the other of something.
words.meaning_zh: prep. 横过, 穿过; adv. 横过, 在对面
words.derivation: a-(在) + cross(交叉) → 在交叉的位置 → 横过
words.example: The bridge extends across the river, connecting the two cities.
words.example_zh: 这座桥横跨河流，连接两座城市。

words.meaning_en: A word formed from the initial letters of other words.
words.meaning_zh: n. 首字母缩略词
words.derivation: acr(顶端) + -onym(名字) → 取顶端字母的名字 → 首字母缩略词
words.example: NASA is an acronym for National Aeronautics and Space Administration.
words.example_zh: NASA是美国国家航空航天局的首字母缩略词。

words.meaning_en: To make something start working or cause a process to begin.
words.meaning_zh: vt. 激活, 使活动, 启动
words.derivation: act(行动) + -iv(形容词) + -ate(使) → 使行动 → 激活
words.example: Press the red button to activate the alarm system.
words.example_zh: 按红色按钮以激活警报系统。

words.meaning_en: Precise and accurate in all details.
words.meaning_zh: a. 精确的, 准确的; vt. 强求, 索取
words.derivation: ex-(向外) + act(驱动) → 向外驱动要求 → 严格要求 → 精确的
words.example: Please provide the exact time when the incident occurred.
words.example_zh: 请提供事件发生的确切时间。

words.breakdown: inter-(相互) + act(行动) + -ive(形容词后缀)
words.meaning_en: Involving communication or direct involvement between people or things.
words.meaning_zh: a. 交互的, 相互作用的
words.derivation: inter-(相互) + act(行动) + -ive(形容词) → 相互行动的 → 交互的
words.example: The museum features interactive exhibits that allow visitors to touch and explore.
words.example_zh: 博物馆设有互动展品，允许游客触摸和探索。

words.meaning_en: To act against something to reduce its force or effect.
words.meaning_zh: vt. 抵消, 中和, 阻碍
words.derivation: counter-(相反) + act(行动) → 反向行动 → 抵消
words.example: The new policy was designed to counteract the negative effects of inflation.
words.example_zh: 新政策旨在抵消通货膨胀的负面影响。

words.meaning_en: To communicate or work together with others, influencing each other.
words.meaning_zh: vi. 互相影响，交互作用
words.derivation: inter-(相互) + act(行动) → 相互行动 → 互相影响
words.example: Students are encouraged to interact with each other during group discussions to improve their language skills.
words.example_zh: 鼓励学生在小组讨论中互相交流，以提高他们的语言技能。

words.meaning_en: To make a bill or proposal into law officially.
words.meaning_zh: vt. 制定法律，颁布
words.derivation: en-(使) + act(行动) → 使行动起来 → 制定法律
words.example: The government plans to enact new environmental regulations to reduce carbon emissions.
words.example_zh: 政府计划颁布新的环境法规以减少碳排放。

words.breakdown: pro-(提前) + act(行动) + -ive(形容词后缀)
words.meaning_en: Taking action by causing change rather than reacting to change.
words.meaning_zh: a. 主动的，积极的
words.derivation: pro-(提前) + act(行动) + -ive(形容词后缀) → 提前行动的 → 主动的
words.example: Proactive students prepare for exams well in advance rather than cramming at the last minute.
words.example_zh: 积极主动的学生会提前充分准备考试，而不是在最后一刻临时抱佛脚。

words.meaning_en: A device or apparatus in which a nuclear reaction takes place.
words.meaning_zh: n. 反应堆，反应器
words.derivation: re-(反) + act(行动) + -or(表示物) → 反向作用的装置 → 反应器
words.example: The nuclear reactor was shut down temporarily for maintenance and safety inspections.
words.example_zh: 核反应堆被暂时关闭以进行维护和安全检查。

words.meaning_en: The act of adding something or an extra thing added.
words.meaning_zh: n. 加法，增加的人或物
words.derivation: add(增加) + -ition(名词后缀) → 增加的行为 → 加法
words.example: The addition of new laboratories will greatly enhance the university's research capabilities.
words.example_zh: 新实验室的增加将大大提升该大学的科研能力。

words.meaning_en: A substance added to improve or preserve something.
words.meaning_zh: n. 添加物，添加剂
words.derivation: add(增加) + -itive(形容词后缀) → 用于增加的 → 添加物
words.example: Many processed foods contain artificial additives to extend their shelf life.
words.example_zh: 许多加工食品含有人工添加剂以延长其保质期。

words.meaning_en: To legally take and raise another's child or to accept something.
words.meaning_zh: vt. 采用，正式通过，收养
words.derivation: ad-(向) + opt(选择) → 选择接受 → 采用
words.example: Many companies have begun to adopt flexible working arrangements for their employees.
words.example_zh: 许多公司已经开始为员工采用灵活的工作安排。

words.meaning_en: Sun-dried brick or building material made from clay and straw.
words.meaning_zh: n. 风干土坯，土砖
words.derivation: 来自西班牙语adobar(涂抹) → 涂抹泥土制成的砖 → 土砖
words.example: The ancient Pueblo people built their homes using adobe bricks that kept them cool in summer.
words.example_zh: 古代普韦布洛人使用土砖建造房屋，这种材料在夏天能保持凉爽。

words.meaning_en: Existing or happening in the air or sky.
words.meaning_zh: a. 空中的，航空的
words.derivation: aer(空气) + -ial(形容词后缀) → 与空气有关的 → 空中的
words.example: Aerial photography revealed previously unknown ancient structures hidden beneath the forest canopy.
words.example_zh: 航空摄影揭示了隐藏在森林树冠下以前未知的古代建筑。

words.meaning_en: Physical exercises designed to increase oxygen consumption and improve cardiovascular fitness.
words.meaning_zh: n. 有氧运动
words.derivation: aero(空气) + bic(生命) + -s → 需要氧气的运动 → 有氧运动
words.example: Regular aerobics classes help improve stamina and maintain a healthy weight.
words.example_zh: 定期参加有氧运动课程有助于提高耐力和保持健康体重。

words.meaning_en: The consequences or results that follow a significant event, especially a disaster.
words.meaning_zh: n. 后果，余波
words.derivation: after(之后) + math(割草) → 割草后的景象 → 后果
words.example: The aftermath of the earthquake left thousands of people homeless and in need of aid.
words.example_zh: 地震的后果使数千人无家可归，需要援助。

words.meaning_en: An organization or department providing a specific service on behalf of others.
words.meaning_zh: n. 代理机构，经销商
words.derivation: ag(做) + -ency(名词后缀) → 代为做事的机构 → 代理机构
words.example: The advertising agency created a successful campaign that increased the company's sales significantly.
words.example_zh: 这家广告代理公司创建了一个成功的营销活动，使公司销售额大幅增长。

words.meaning_en: Able to move quickly and easily with coordination and grace.
words.meaning_zh: a. 敏捷的，灵活的
words.derivation: ag(动) + -ile(形容词后缀) → 善于活动的 → 敏捷的
words.example: Mountain goats are remarkably agile animals capable of climbing steep rocky terrain.
words.example_zh: 山羊是非常敏捷的动物，能够攀爬陡峭的岩石地形。

words.meaning_en: To make someone feel troubled or nervous, or to stir vigorously.
words.meaning_zh: vt. 使激动，搅动，煽动
words.derivation: ag(动) + -it(-) + -ate(动词后缀) → 使动起来 → 使激动
words.example: Political activists continued to agitate for reform throughout the following decade.
words.example_zh: 政治活动家在接下来的十年里继续为改革而煽动。

words.meaning_en: A list of items to be discussed at a meeting.
words.meaning_zh: n. 议程，日程
words.derivation: ag(做) + -end + -a → 要做的事情 → 议程
words.example: The meeting agenda includes discussions on budget allocation and new project proposals.
words.example_zh: 会议议程包括讨论预算分配和新项目提案。

words.meaning_en: To worry intensely or suffer great mental or physical pain.
words.meaning_zh: vi. 感到痛苦，苦恼
words.derivation: agon(挣扎) + -ize(动词后缀) → 进行挣扎 → 感到痛苦
words.example: She continued to agonize over her decision to change careers even after accepting the new position.
words.example_zh: 即使在接受新职位之后，她仍然为改变职业的决定而苦恼。

words.breakdown: un-(不) + aid(帮助) + -ed(形容词后缀)
words.meaning_en: Done without help or assistance from others.
words.meaning_zh: a. 无助的，未受协助的
words.derivation: un-(不) + aid(帮助) + -ed → 没有帮助的 → 无助的
words.example: The child learned to tie her shoes unaided after practicing for several weeks.
words.example_zh: 这个孩子练习了几周后学会了独立系鞋带。

words.meaning_en: To cause someone to feel isolated or estranged from others.
words.meaning_zh: vt. 使疏远，离间
words.derivation: alien(外来的) + -ate(动词后缀) → 使成为外人 → 使疏远
words.example: His constant criticism began to alienate him from his colleagues and friends.
words.example_zh: 他不断的批评开始使他与同事和朋友疏远。

words.meaning_en: To change or modify something in some way.
words.meaning_zh: v. 改变，修改
words.derivation: alter(其他的) → 使成为其他的样子 → 改变
words.example: Climate change is beginning to alter weather patterns around the world dramatically.
words.example_zh: 气候变化正开始显著改变世界各地的天气模式。

words.meaning_en: To occur or do in turns; happening by turns.
words.meaning_zh: v. 交替，轮流 a. 交替的
words.derivation: alter(其他的) + -ate → 变换到另一个 → 交替
words.example: The guard shifts alternate between day and night duty every week.
words.example_zh: 警卫每周在白班和夜班之间轮流值班。

words.meaning_en: A foreigner or being from another world; foreign or unfamiliar.
words.meaning_zh: n. 外国人，外星人 a. 外国的，陌生的
words.derivation: ali(其他的) + en(形容词后缀) → 来自其他地方的 → 外国的
words.example: The concept of extraterrestrial life has made alien civilizations a popular topic in science fiction.
words.example_zh: 地外生命的概念使得外星文明成为科幻小说中的热门话题。

words.breakdown: alter(其他的) + -n- + -ative(形容词/名词后缀)
words.meaning_en: One of two or more available possibilities; offering a choice.
words.meaning_zh: n. 可供选择的事物 a. 可替代的，非传统的
words.derivation: alter(其他的) + ative(形容词后缀) → 另外一个的 → 可供选择的
words.example: Solar power provides an alternative to traditional fossil fuel energy sources.
words.example_zh: 太阳能提供了一种传统化石燃料能源的替代选择。

words.meaning_en: Capable of being transferred to another owner.
words.meaning_zh: a. 可转让的，可让与的
words.derivation: alien(转让) + able(可...的) → 可以转让的 → 可让与的
words.example: Property rights are generally alienable unless specifically restricted by law.
words.example_zh: 除非法律有特别限制，财产权通常是可以转让的。

words.breakdown: nost(回家) + alg(痛苦) + -ia(名词后缀)
words.meaning_en: A sentimental longing for the past.
words.meaning_zh: n. 怀旧，乡愁，怀旧之情
words.derivation: nost(回家) + alg(痛苦) + ia(名词后缀) → 回不了家的痛苦 → 乡愁
words.example: Looking at old photographs filled her with nostalgia for her childhood days.
words.example_zh: 看着旧照片让她充满了对童年时光的怀念。

words.breakdown: nost(回家) + alg(痛苦) + -ic(形容词后缀)
words.meaning_en: Feeling or evoking a sentimental longing for the past.
words.meaning_zh: a. 怀旧的，思乡的
words.derivation: nost(回家) + alg(痛苦) + ic(形容词后缀) → 思乡痛苦的 → 怀旧的
words.example: The museum's exhibit created a nostalgic atmosphere that reminded visitors of simpler times.
words.example_zh: 博物馆的展览营造了一种怀旧氛围，让参观者想起更简单的时光。

words.breakdown: al-(定冠词) + gebr(骨头，结合) + -a(名词后缀)
words.meaning_en: A branch of mathematics using letters to represent numbers.
words.meaning_zh: n. 代数学
words.derivation: al(定冠词) + gebr(结合) + a(名词后缀) → 重新结合的科学 → 代数
words.example: Students typically begin studying algebra in middle school or early high school.
words.example_zh: 学生通常在初中或高中早期开始学习代数。

words.meaning_en: A simple aquatic plant or plant-like organism, especially seaweed.
words.meaning_zh: n. 藻类，海藻
words.derivation: alg(海藻) → 藻类
words.example: Green alga can be found growing on the surface of ponds and slow-moving streams.
words.example_zh: 绿藻可以在池塘和缓慢流动的溪流表面生长。

words.breakdown: all(其他的) + erg(工作，反应) + -ic(形容词后缀)
words.meaning_en: Having an abnormal immune reaction to a substance.
words.meaning_zh: a. 过敏的，对...极反感的
words.derivation: all(其他的) + erg(反应) + ic(形容词后缀) → 异常反应的 → 过敏的
words.example: Many people are allergic to pollen during spring season.
words.example_zh: 许多人在春季对花粉过敏。

words.breakdown: all(其他的) + erg(工作，反应) + -y(名词后缀)
words.meaning_en: A damaging immune response to a substance.
words.meaning_zh: n. 过敏症，过敏反应
words.derivation: all(其他的) + erg(反应) + y(名词后缀) → 异常反应 → 过敏
words.example: His severe peanut allergy requires him to carry an emergency medication at all times.
words.example_zh: 他严重的花生过敏要求他随时携带紧急药物。

words.breakdown: para(在旁边) + all(彼此) + -el(形容词后缀)
words.meaning_en: Lines or surfaces that are always the same distance apart.
words.meaning_zh: a. 平行的，相似的 n. 平行线，相似物
words.derivation: para(在旁边) + allel(彼此) → 彼此在旁边 → 平行的
words.example: The two roads run parallel to each other for several miles before diverging.
words.example_zh: 这两条路平行延伸了几英里后才分开。

words.meaning_en: Up in or into the air; overhead.
words.meaning_zh: adv. 在高处，在空中
words.derivation: a(在) + loft(高处) → 在高处 → 在空中
words.example: The balloon floated aloft, carried by the gentle breeze.
words.example_zh: 气球在温和的微风中飘向高处。

words.meaning_en: Not friendly or willing to be involved with other people.
words.meaning_zh: a. 冷淡的，远离的 adv. 远离地
words.derivation: a(在) + loof(远离) → 保持距离 → 冷淡的
words.example: He remained aloof from the debate, preferring not to take sides.
words.example_zh: 他在辩论中保持冷淡，不愿选边站。

meaning_en: the first two Greek letters (alpha and beta)
meaning_zh: 希腊字母表的前两个字母（阿尔法和贝塔）

words.meaning_en: A set of letters used in writing a language.
words.meaning_zh: n. 字母表，字母系统
words.derivation: alpha(第一个字母) + beta(第二个字母) → 字母表
words.example: Children learn the alphabet as one of their first steps in reading.
words.example_zh: 孩子们学习字母表作为阅读的第一步之一。

words.meaning_en: The height of an object or point above sea level.
words.meaning_zh: n. 高度，海拔
words.derivation: alt(高) + itude(名词后缀) → 高度
words.example: Pilots must constantly monitor their altitude to ensure safe flight.
words.example_zh: 飞行员必须持续监控他们的飞行高度以确保安全。

words.meaning_en: To raise someone or something to a higher rank or position.
words.meaning_zh: vt. 提升，赞扬，使高兴
words.derivation: ex(向上) + alt(高) → 使升高 → 提升
words.example: The biography sought to exalt the leader's achievements while minimizing his failures.
words.example_zh: 这本传记试图赞扬这位领导人的成就，同时淡化他的失败。

words.breakdown: ex-(向上) + alt(高) + -ed(形容词后缀)
words.meaning_en: Elevated in rank, character, or status; noble.
words.meaning_zh: a. 高尚的，尊贵的，兴奋的
words.derivation: ex(向上) + alt(高) + ed(形容词后缀) → 被提升的 → 高尚的
words.example: She held an exalted position in the academic community due to her groundbreaking research.
words.example_zh: 由于她的开创性研究，她在学术界拥有崇高的地位。

words.meaning_en: A lightweight silvery-white metal widely used in manufacturing.
words.meaning_zh: n. 铝
words.derivation: alumin(明矾) + um(元素后缀) → 从明矾中提取的金属 → 铝
words.example: Aluminum is commonly used in aircraft construction because of its light weight and strength.
words.example_zh: 铝因其轻质和强度而常用于飞机制造。

words.meaning_en: A male graduate or former student of a school or university.
words.meaning_zh: n. 男校友，男毕业生
words.derivation: alumn(滋养) + us(名词后缀) → 被培养的人 → 校友
words.example: As a proud alumnus, he donated generously to his former university.
words.example_zh: 作为一名自豪的校友，他慷慨地向母校捐款。

words.meaning_en: A person who engages in an activity for pleasure rather than money.
words.meaning_zh: n. 业余爱好者，外行 a. 业余的
words.derivation: am(爱) + ateur(表示人) → 因为爱好而做的人 → 业余爱好者
words.example: Despite being an amateur photographer, she won first prize in the local competition.
words.example_zh: 尽管是业余摄影师，她在当地比赛中赢得了一等奖。

words.meaning_en: showing or feeling sexual desire and love
words.meaning_zh: 多情的，恋爱的
words.derivation: amor(爱) + ous(充满…的) → 充满爱的 → 多情的
words.example: Renaissance poets often explored amorous themes in their sonnets and verse.
words.example_zh: 文艺复兴时期的诗人经常在十四行诗和诗歌中探讨爱情主题。

words.meaning_en: having a friendly and pleasant manner
words.meaning_zh: 和蔼可亲的，友善的
words.derivation: ami(爱) + able(能够…的) → 能让人喜爱的 → 和蔼可亲的
words.example: The researcher's amiable demeanor put nervous interview subjects at ease.
words.example_zh: 研究人员和蔼可亲的态度使紧张的受访者放松了下来。

words.meaning_en: characterized by friendliness and absence of discord
words.meaning_zh: 友好的，和睦的
words.derivation: amic(朋友) + able(能够…的) → 能友好相处的 → 友好的
words.example: After years of conflict, the two nations finally reached an amicable settlement.
words.example_zh: 经过多年冲突，两国终于达成了友好解决方案。

words.meaning_en: to be filled with a feeling of love for; to charm or captivate
words.meaning_zh: 使迷恋，使倾心
words.derivation: en(使) + amor(爱) → 使产生爱 → 使迷恋
words.example: Audiences were immediately enamored of the new archaeological discovery from the Bronze Age.
words.example_zh: 观众立即被这一青铜时代的新考古发现所吸引。

words.meaning_en: the state of being actively opposed or hostile to someone
words.meaning_zh: 敌意，仇恨
words.derivation: en(否定) + am(爱) + ity(状态) → 没有爱的状态 → 敌意
words.example: Deep enmity between the rival factions made diplomatic negotiations nearly impossible.
words.example_zh: 敌对派系之间根深蒂固的仇恨使外交谈判几乎不可能进行。
words.mnemonic: enemy(敌人)的名词形式→敌意；与amor(爱)相反，记住en-在此表否定

words.breakdown: amb(周围走) + it(走) + -ious(形容词后缀)
words.meaning_en: Having a strong desire to achieve success or reach a goal.
words.meaning_zh: a. 有野心的，雄心勃勃的
words.derivation: amb(周围走) + it(走) + ious(形容词后缀) → 四处走动拉票的 → 有野心的
words.example: The ambitious student studied day and night to get into her dream university.
words.example_zh: 这位雄心勃勃的学生日夜学习以进入她梦想的大学。

words.breakdown: ambi-(两边) + ig(行走) + -uity(名词后缀，表性质)
words.meaning_en: The quality of being open to more than one interpretation; uncertainty of meaning.
words.meaning_zh: n. 模糊性，歧义，含糊
words.derivation: ambi(两边) + ig(行走) → 走向两边 → 模棱两可 → 模糊性
words.example: The ambiguity of the contract terms led to disagreements between both parties.
words.example_zh: 合同条款的含糊不清导致了双方之间的分歧。

words.meaning_en: To walk at a slow, relaxed pace without hurrying.
words.meaning_zh:
vi. 缓行，漫步
n. 缓行的步伐
words.derivation: amb(行走) + le(动词后缀) → 慢慢行走 → 缓行，漫步
words.example: We ambled through the park on a sunny afternoon, enjoying the peaceful atmosphere.
words.example_zh: 在一个阳光明媚的下午，我们在公园里漫步，享受着宁静的氛围。

words.meaning_en: A surprise attack by people lying in wait in a concealed position.
words.meaning_zh:
n. 埋伏，伏击
vt. 伏击
words.derivation: amb(周围) + bush(灌木丛) → 在灌木丛周围 → 埋伏 → 伏击
words.example: The soldiers prepared to ambush the enemy convoy as it passed through the narrow valley.
words.example_zh: 士兵们准备在狭窄的山谷中伏击经过的敌军车队。

words.meaning_en: Relating to the immediate surroundings or environment of something.
words.meaning_zh:
a. 周围的，环境的
n. 周围环境
words.derivation: ambi(周围) + ent(形容词后缀) → 在周围的 → 周围的，环境的
words.example: The ambient temperature in the laboratory must be carefully controlled for accurate experiments.
words.example_zh: 实验室的环境温度必须仔细控制以确保实验准确。

words.meaning_en: Surrounded by; in the middle of something.
words.meaning_zh: prep. 在...之中，在...中间
words.derivation: a(在) + mid(中间) → 在中间 → 在...之中
words.example: The children played happily amid the colorful flowers in the garden.
words.example_zh: 孩子们在花园里五颜六色的花朵中间快乐地玩耍。

words.meaning_en: Relating to or containing the group NH2 combined with a radical.
words.meaning_zh: a. 氨基的
words.derivation: amin(氨) + o(形容词后缀) → 氨基的
words.example: Amino acids are the building blocks of proteins essential for life.
words.example_zh: 氨基酸是构成生命所必需蛋白质的基本单位。

words.meaning_en: To increase the volume, size, or strength of something.
words.meaning_zh: vt. 放大，扩大，增强，详述
words.derivation: ampl(大) + ify(使...化) → 使变大 → 放大，扩大
words.example: The speaker system will amplify your voice so everyone in the auditorium can hear.
words.example_zh: 扬声器系统会放大你的声音，这样礼堂里的每个人都能听到。

words.meaning_en: Enough or more than enough; plentiful in size or quantity.
words.meaning_zh: a. 充足的，丰富的，宽敞的
words.derivation: ampl(大) → 大的 → 充足的，丰富的
words.example: There is ample evidence to support the theory of climate change.
words.example_zh: 有充足的证据支持气候变化理论。

words.breakdown: ap-(向) + pli(折叠，应用) + -ance(名词后缀)
words.meaning_en: A device or machine designed for a specific household task.
words.meaning_zh: n. 器具，装置，家用电器
words.derivation: ap(向) + pli(应用) + ance(名词后缀) → 应用的东西 → 器具，装置
words.example: Modern kitchen appliances have made cooking much more convenient and efficient.
words.example_zh: 现代厨房电器使烹饪变得更加方便和高效。

words.breakdown: ante-(先，前) + cess(走) + -or(名词后缀，表人)
words.meaning_en: A person from whom one is descended, typically more remote than a grandparent.
words.meaning_zh: n. 祖先，祖宗
words.derivation: ante(先) + cess(走) + or(表人) → 先走的人 → 祖先
words.example: Many Americans try to trace their ancestors back to the countries they came from.
words.example_zh: 许多美国人试图追溯他们的祖先来自哪些国家。

words.meaning_en: A heavy object used to prevent a ship from drifting; to secure firmly.
words.meaning_zh:
n. 锚，主持人
vt. 抛锚，使固定
words.derivation: anch(弯曲，钩) + or(名词后缀) → 弯钩的东西 → 锚
words.example: The ship dropped anchor in the calm harbor to wait out the storm.
words.example_zh: 船在平静的港口抛锚以等待暴风雨过去。

words.meaning_en: Belonging to the very distant past and no longer in existence.
words.meaning_zh: a. 古代的，古老的，年老的
words.derivation: anci(在前) + ent(形容词后缀) → 在前面的 → 古老的
words.example: The ancient civilizations of Greece and Rome have greatly influenced Western culture.
words.example_zh: 古希腊和古罗马文明对西方文化产生了巨大影响。

words.meaning_en: A four-sided flat shape with four right angles and opposite sides equal.
words.meaning_zh: n. 长方形，矩形
words.derivation: rect(直) + angle(角) → 有直角的图形 → 长方形
words.example: The swimming pool was built in the shape of a rectangle to maximize space.
words.example_zh: 游泳池被建成长方形以最大化利用空间。

words.meaning_en: A flat shape with three straight sides and three angles.
words.meaning_zh: n. 三角形，三角关系
words.derivation: tri(三) + angle(角) → 有三个角的图形 → 三角形
words.example: The Bermuda Triangle is famous for mysterious disappearances of ships and aircraft.
words.example_zh: 百慕大三角以船只和飞机的神秘失踪而闻名。

words.meaning_en: The space between two intersecting lines measured in degrees.
words.meaning_zh:
n. 角，角度，观点
v. 钓鱼
words.derivation: ang(弯曲) + le(名词后缀) → 弯曲形成的 → 角，角度
words.example: The photographer adjusted the camera angle to capture the best view of the landscape.
words.example_zh: 摄影师调整了相机角度以捕捉风景的最佳视角。

words.meaning_en: Having angles or sharp corners; thin and bony in appearance.
words.meaning_zh: a. 有角的，角形的，瘦削的
words.derivation: angul(角) + ar(形容词后缀) → 有角的 → 角形的，瘦削的
words.example: The building's angular design gives it a modern and distinctive appearance.
words.example_zh: 这座建筑的棱角设计使其具有现代而独特的外观。

words.meaning_en: Severe mental or physical pain or suffering.
words.meaning_zh:
n. 极度痛苦，苦恼
vt. 使极度痛苦
words.derivation: angu(狭窄，压迫) + ish(名词后缀) → 被压迫的感觉 → 极度痛苦
words.example: The parents experienced great anguish when their child went missing.
words.example_zh: 当孩子失踪时，父母经历了极大的痛苦。

words.meaning_en: A plant that has flowers and produces seeds enclosed within a fruit.
words.meaning_zh: n. 被子植物
words.derivation: angio(容器) + sperm(种子) → 种子在容器里的植物 → 被子植物
words.example: Angiosperms represent the most diverse group of land plants on Earth.
words.example_zh: 被子植物是地球上最多样化的陆生植物类群。

words.breakdown: magn-(大) + anim-(心灵) + -ous(形容词后缀)
words.meaning_en: generous or forgiving, especially toward a rival or less powerful person
words.meaning_zh: 宽宏大量的
words.derivation: magn(大) + anim(心灵) + ous(…的) → 心胸大的 → 宽宏大量的
words.example: The magnanimous leader forgave his political opponents after winning the election.
words.example_zh: 这位宽宏大量的领袖在赢得选举后宽恕了他的政治对手。

words.breakdown: un-(一) + anim-(心灵) + -ous(形容词后缀)
words.meaning_en: fully in agreement; united in opinion
words.meaning_zh: 一致同意的
words.derivation: un(一) + anim(心灵) + ous(…的) → 一条心的 → 一致同意的
words.example: The committee reached a unanimous decision to approve the funding proposal.
words.example_zh: 委员会一致同意通过该拨款提案。

words.meaning_en: strong hostility or ill feeling
words.meaning_zh: 敌意，仇恨
words.derivation: anim(精神) + osity(状态) → 精神上的对抗状态 → 敌意
words.example: There was deep animosity between the two rival political factions.
words.example_zh: 两个敌对的政治派别之间存在深深的敌意。

words.breakdown: equ-(平等) + anim-(心灵) + -ity(名词后缀)
words.meaning_en: mental calmness and composure, especially in a difficult situation
words.meaning_zh: 镇定，沉着，泰然自若
words.derivation: equ(平等) + anim(心灵) + ity(状态) → 心灵平静的状态 → 泰然自若
words.example: She faced the crisis with remarkable equanimity, never losing her composure.
words.example_zh: 她以非凡的沉着面对危机，始终没有失态。

words.meaning_en: to bring to life; to give inspiration or encouragement to
words.meaning_zh: 使有生气；赋予生命
words.derivation: anim(灵魂) + ate(使…) → 使有灵魂 → 赋予生命
words.example: The teacher's enthusiasm animated the entire classroom discussion.
words.example_zh: 老师的热情使整个课堂讨论变得生动活泼。

words.breakdown: in-(无) + anim(生命) + -ate(形容词后缀)
words.meaning_en: Not alive, especially not in the manner of animals and humans.
words.meaning_zh: a. 无生命的，没有生气的
words.derivation: in(无) + anim(生命) + ate(形容词后缀) → 无生命的
words.example: Rocks and minerals are inanimate objects that do not grow or reproduce.
words.example_zh: 岩石和矿物是无生命的物体，不会生长或繁殖。

words.meaning_en: Occurring once every year; covering a period of one year.
words.meaning_zh:
a. 每年的，一年一次的
n. 年刊，年鉴
words.derivation: ann(年) + ual(形容词后缀) → 一年的 → 每年的
words.example: The company holds its annual meeting in December to review the year's performance.
words.example_zh: 公司在十二月举行年度会议以审查本年度的业绩。

words.meaning_en: Occurring twice a year.
words.meaning_zh: a. 一年两次的
words.derivation: bi(二) + annu(年) + al(形容词) → 一年两次 → 一年两次的
words.example: The company holds biannual meetings in January and July to review performance.
words.example_zh: 公司在一月和七月举行一年两次的会议来回顾业绩。

words.meaning_en: Something that deviates from what is standard, normal, or expected.
words.meaning_zh: n. 异常，反常现象
words.derivation: a(不) + nom(规则) → 不符合规则 → 异常，反常现象
words.example: The sudden temperature drop in summer was considered a weather anomaly by meteorologists.
words.example_zh: 夏季突然降温被气象学家认为是一种天气异常现象。

words.meaning_en: A state of social instability resulting from breakdown of standards and values.
words.meaning_zh: n. 社会失范，混乱状态
words.derivation: a(无) + nom(法则) → 无法则状态 → 社会失范
words.example: The rapid societal changes led to a sense of anomie among the population.
words.example_zh: 快速的社会变化导致民众产生一种失范感。

words.breakdown: ante-(在...之前) + ced(走) + -ent(形容词/名词后缀)
words.meaning_en: A thing or event that existed before or precedes another.
words.meaning_zh: n. 前事，先行词；a. 先前的
words.derivation: ante(在...之前) + ced(走) → 走在前面的 → 先行的事物
words.example: Understanding the historical antecedents of the conflict helps explain current tensions.
words.example_zh: 了解冲突的历史前因有助于解释当前的紧张局势。

words.meaning_en: To precede or come before in time or order.
words.meaning_zh: v. 在...之前，先于
words.derivation: ante(在...之前) + cede(走) → 走在前面 → 先于
words.example: The Renaissance anteceded the Age of Enlightenment in European history.
words.example_zh: 文艺复兴在欧洲历史上先于启蒙时代。

words.meaning_en: The scientific study of human societies, cultures, and their development.
words.meaning_zh: n. 人类学
words.derivation: anthropo(人类) + logy(学科) → 研究人类的学科 → 人类学
words.example: She decided to major in anthropology to study indigenous cultures around the world.
words.example_zh: 她决定主修人类学，以研究世界各地的土著文化。

words.meaning_en: Experiencing worry, nervousness, or unease about something with an uncertain outcome.
words.meaning_zh: a. 焦虑的，担忧的，渴望的
words.derivation: anx(窒息，痛苦) + ious(充满...的) → 充满痛苦的 → 焦虑的
words.example: Students often feel anxious before taking important standardized tests like the TOEFL.
words.example_zh: 学生在参加托福等重要标准化考试之前常常感到焦虑。

words.meaning_en: To make a formal request or put something to practical use.
words.meaning_zh: v. 申请，应用，涂抹
words.derivation: ap(向) + ply(折叠，使用) → 向...折叠使用 → 应用，申请
words.example: Many international students apply to American universities each year.
words.example_zh: 每年有许多国际学生申请美国大学。

words.breakdown: ap-(向) + par(出现) + -ent(形容词后缀)
words.meaning_en: Clearly visible or understood; obvious or seeming to be true.
words.meaning_zh: a. 明显的，显而易见的，表面上的
words.derivation: ap(向) + par(出现) → 向外出现的 → 明显的
words.example: It became apparent that the project would require more funding than initially planned.
words.example_zh: 很明显，这个项目需要比最初计划更多的资金。

words.meaning_en: To pacify or placate someone by acceding to their demands.
words.meaning_zh: v. 安抚，平息，姑息
words.derivation: ap(向) + pease(和平) → 使达到和平 → 安抚，平息
words.example: The government tried to appease protesters by promising reforms.
words.example_zh: 政府试图通过承诺改革来安抚抗议者。

words.meaning_en: A person who formally requests or applies for something.
words.meaning_zh: n. 申请人，应征者
words.derivation: ap(向) + plic(折叠，使用) + ant(人) → 向...申请的人 → 申请人
words.example: The scholarship committee received over 500 applications and interviewed 50 applicants.
words.example_zh: 奖学金委员会收到了500多份申请，并面试了50名申请人。

words.meaning_en: To inform or tell someone about something.
words.meaning_zh: v. 通知，告知
words.derivation: ap(向) + prise(理解) → 使理解 → 通知，告知
words.example: The manager apprised the team of the new company policies during the meeting.
words.example_zh: 经理在会议上向团队通知了新的公司政策。

words.meaning_en: To adjust or modify to suit new conditions or purposes.
words.meaning_zh: v. 适应，改编
words.derivation: ad(向) + apt(适合) → 使变得适合 → 适应
words.example: Plants and animals must adapt to their environment in order to survive.
words.example_zh: 动植物必须适应环境才能生存。

words.breakdown: ad-(向) + apt(适合) + -ive(形容词后缀)
words.meaning_en: Characterized by ability to adjust to new conditions.
words.meaning_zh: a. 适应的，有适应能力的
words.derivation: ad(向) + apt(适合) + ive(有...性质的) → 有适应性质的 → 适应的
words.example: Adaptive learning technologies personalize educational content based on student performance.
words.example_zh: 自适应学习技术根据学生的表现个性化教育内容。

words.meaning_en: Able to adjust to new conditions or able to be modified.
words.meaning_zh: a. 能适应的，可修改的
words.derivation: ad(向) + apt(适合) + able(能够...的) → 能够适应的 → 适应性强的
words.example: Employers value workers who are adaptable and can handle changing responsibilities.
words.example_zh: 雇主重视那些适应能力强、能够处理不断变化的职责的员工。

words.meaning_en: relating to or living in water
words.meaning_zh: 水生的，水中的
words.derivation: aqu(水) + atic(与…有关的) → 与水有关的 → 水生的
words.example: Aquatic ecosystems are particularly vulnerable to the effects of industrial pollution.
words.example_zh: 水生生态系统特别容易受到工业污染的影响。

words.meaning_en: an underground layer of rock that holds groundwater
words.meaning_zh: 含水层，蓄水层
words.derivation: aqu(水) + ifer(承载) → 承载水的地层 → 含水层
words.example: Over-extraction from the aquifer has caused water tables to drop significantly in the region.
words.example_zh: 对含水层的过度抽取已导致该地区地下水位大幅下降。

words.meaning_en: an artificial channel for conveying water
words.meaning_zh: 水渠，输水管道
words.derivation: aqu(水) + duct(引导) → 引导水的建筑 → 水渠
words.example: Roman aqueducts represent remarkable feats of ancient engineering that supplied cities with fresh water.
words.example_zh: 罗马水渠是古代工程的杰出成就，为城市供应了淡水。

words.meaning_en: A transparent tank for keeping live fish and aquatic plants.
words.meaning_zh: n. 水族馆，水族箱
words.derivation: aqu(水) + arium(场所) → 与水有关的场所 → 水族馆
words.example: The city's new aquarium features exhibits showcasing marine life from tropical oceans.
words.example_zh: 该市的新水族馆设有展示热带海洋生物的展览。

words.meaning_en: Relating to trees or living in trees.
words.meaning_zh: a. 树木的，栖息在树上的
words.derivation: arbor(树) + eal(与...有关的) → 与树有关的 → 树栖的
words.example: Monkeys are arboreal animals that spend most of their lives in the forest canopy.
words.example_zh: 猴子是树栖动物，它们大部分时间生活在森林树冠层。

words.meaning_en: A collection of historical documents or records providing information about a place.
words.meaning_zh: n. 档案，档案馆；v. 把...存档
words.derivation: arch(统治，开始) + ive → 记录开始和统治的地方 → 档案馆
words.example: Researchers accessed the university's archive to study documents from the 19th century.
words.example_zh: 研究人员查阅了大学档案馆以研究19世纪的文献。

words.meaning_en: The study of human history through excavation and analysis of artifacts.
words.meaning_zh: n. 考古学
words.derivation: archae(古代) + ology(学科) → 研究古代的学科 → 考古学
words.example: Archaeology provides valuable insights into ancient civilizations and their daily lives.
words.example_zh: 考古学为了解古代文明及其日常生活提供了宝贵的见解。

words.meaning_en: The male head of a family or tribe.
words.meaning_zh: n. 家长，族长，元老
words.derivation: patri(父亲) + arch(统治者) → 父亲般的统治者 → 族长，家长
words.example: The patriarch of the family made all important decisions regarding the business.
words.example_zh: 家族的族长做出了所有关于生意的重要决定。

words.breakdown: mon(单一) + arch(统治) + -y(名词后缀)
words.meaning_en: A form of government with a monarch as the head of state.
words.meaning_zh: n. 君主政体，君主国
words.derivation: mon(单一) + arch(统治) → 一人统治 → 君主政体
words.example: The United Kingdom is a constitutional monarchy with a royal family.
words.example_zh: 英国是一个拥有皇室的君主立宪制国家。

words.meaning_en: A person who believes in or advocates the abolition of government.
words.meaning_zh: n. 无政府主义者
words.derivation: an(无) + arch(统治) + -ist(人) → 反对统治的人 → 无政府主义者
words.example: The anarchist movement challenged traditional governmental authority in the early 20th century.
words.example_zh: 无政府主义运动在20世纪初挑战了传统的政府权威。

words.meaning_en: A social system where men hold primary power and authority.
words.meaning_zh: n. 父权制，男性统治
words.derivation: patri(父) + arch(统治) → 父亲统治 → 父权制
words.example: Many feminist scholars have criticized the patriarchy as a system that oppresses women.
words.example_zh: 许多女权主义学者批评父权制是一个压迫女性的制度。

words.meaning_en: a system in which members are ranked according to status or authority
words.meaning_zh: 等级制度，层级体系
words.derivation: hier(神圣的) + archy(统治) → 神圣的统治秩序 → 等级制度
words.example: In many traditional societies, a strict social hierarchy determined access to resources and power.
words.example_zh: 在许多传统社会中，严格的社会等级制度决定了资源和权力的获取。

words.meaning_en: a state of disorder due to absence of authority
words.meaning_zh: 无政府状态，混乱
words.derivation: an(无) + archy(统治) → 没有统治 → 无政府状态
words.example: The collapse of the central government plunged the region into a period of anarchy.
words.example_zh: 中央政府的崩溃使该地区陷入了一段无政府状态。

words.meaning_en: a sovereign head of state, especially a king or queen
words.meaning_zh: 君主，国王
words.derivation: mon(单独) + arch(统治者) → 独自统治的人 → 君主
words.example: The monarch wielded absolute power before the constitutional reforms of the 18th century.
words.example_zh: 在十八世纪宪法改革之前，君主拥有绝对权力。

words.meaning_en: a form of government in which power rests with a small number of people
words.meaning_zh: 寡头政治，寡头统治
words.derivation: olig(少数) + archy(统治) → 少数人统治 → 寡头政治
words.example: Critics argue that the concentration of wealth has transformed the democracy into an oligarchy.
words.example_zh: 批评人士认为财富集中已将民主制度变成了寡头政治。

words.meaning_en: a system of government by one person with absolute power
words.meaning_zh: 独裁政治，专制
words.derivation: auto(自己) + cracy(统治) → 一个人统治 → 独裁
words.example: The transition from autocracy to democracy was gradual and difficult.
words.example_zh: 从专制到民主的转变是渐进而艰难的。

words.meaning_en: a system of government with many complicated rules and processes
words.meaning_zh: 官僚体制
words.derivation: bureau(办公室) + cracy(统治) → 办公室统治 → 官僚体制
words.example: Excessive bureaucracy can slow down the implementation of new policies.
words.example_zh: 过度的官僚主义会拖慢新政策的实施。

words.meaning_en: the highest class in certain societies; government by the best-born
words.meaning_zh: 贵族阶级，贵族政治
words.derivation: aristo(最优秀的) + cracy(统治) → 最优秀者统治 → 贵族政治
words.example: The French Revolution challenged the power of the aristocracy.
words.example_zh: 法国大革命挑战了贵族阶级的权力。

words.meaning_en: a system of government by the whole population, typically through elected representatives
words.meaning_zh: 民主政治
words.derivation: demo(人民) + cracy(统治) → 人民统治 → 民主
words.example: Democracy requires the active participation of informed citizens.
words.example_zh: 民主需要知情公民的积极参与。

words.meaning_en: enthusiastic or passionate
words.meaning_zh: 热情的，热烈的
words.derivation: ard(燃烧) + ent(…的) → 像火一样燃烧的 → 热情的
words.example: The ardent supporters of conservation lobbied tirelessly for the protection of endangered habitats.
words.example_zh: 热情的环保支持者不知疲倦地为保护濒危栖息地而游说。

words.meaning_en: involving or requiring strenuous effort; difficult and tiring
words.meaning_zh: 艰苦的，费力的
words.derivation: ard(燃烧) + uous(…的) → 像火烧一样煎熬的 → 艰苦的
words.example: The arduous journey across the mountain range tested the limits of the expedition team.
words.example_zh: 穿越山脉的艰苦旅程考验了探险队的极限。

words.meaning_en: the criminal act of deliberately setting fire to property
words.meaning_zh: 纵火罪
words.derivation: ars(燃烧) + on(行为) → 故意纵火的行为 → 纵火罪
words.example: Investigators determined that arson was the cause of the warehouse fire that destroyed rare specimens.
words.example_zh: 调查人员确定纵火是导致仓库起火、摧毁珍贵标本的原因。

words.meaning_en: enthusiasm or passion
words.meaning_zh: 热忱，激情
words.derivation: ard(燃烧) + or(状态) → 内心燃烧的状态 → 热忱
words.example: The young scientist pursued her research with an ardor that inspired her colleagues.
words.example_zh: 这位年轻科学家以激励同事们的热忱投入研究工作。

words.meaning_en: To give reasons for or against something; to debate or dispute.
words.meaning_zh: v. 争论，辩论，主张
words.derivation: arg(使清楚) → 使观点清楚 → 争论，辩论
words.example: The lawyer argued convincingly that his client was innocent of all charges.
words.example_zh: 律师令人信服地辩称他的当事人对所有指控都是无辜的。

words.meaning_en: Extremely dry, having little or no rainfall; lacking interest or excitement.
words.meaning_zh: a. 干旱的，贫瘠的
words.derivation: arid(干的) → 极度干燥 → 干旱的
words.example: The arid desert landscape supports only the hardiest forms of plant life.
words.example_zh: 干旱的沙漠景观只能支持最顽强的植物生长。

words.meaning_en: A solo vocal piece in an opera or oratorio.
words.meaning_zh: n. 咏叹调，独唱曲
words.derivation: aria(空气) → 流动的旋律 → 咏叹调
words.example: The soprano performed a beautiful aria that moved the entire audience to tears.
words.example_zh: 女高音演唱了一段优美的咏叹调，感动得全场观众落泪。

words.meaning_en: The branch of mathematics dealing with numerical calculations and operations.
words.meaning_zh: n. 算术，算术运算
words.derivation: arithm(数字) + -etic → 关于数字的学问 → 算术
words.example: Students must master basic arithmetic before advancing to algebra and geometry.
words.example_zh: 学生必须掌握基础算术才能进阶到代数和几何。

words.meaning_en: A warning of danger; a device that signals an alert.
words.meaning_zh: n. 警报，惊恐 v. 使惊恐
words.derivation: al(向) + arm(武装) → 呼吁武装 → 警报
words.example: The fire alarm sounded at midnight, forcing everyone to evacuate the building.
words.example_zh: 火警在午夜响起，迫使所有人疏散大楼。

words.meaning_en: To remove weapons from; to win over or reduce hostility.
words.meaning_zh: v. 解除武装，裁军，消除敌意
words.derivation: dis(去除) + arm(武器) → 去掉武器 → 解除武装
words.example: The peace agreement required both nations to disarm and reduce their military forces.
words.example_zh: 和平协议要求两国解除武装并削减军事力量。

words.meaning_en: A pleasant, distinctive smell, especially from food or drink.
words.meaning_zh: n. 芳香，香气
words.derivation: aroma(香料) → 香料的气味 → 芳香
words.example: The aroma of freshly baked bread filled the entire bakery.
words.example_zh: 新鲜出炉的面包香气弥漫了整个面包店。

words.breakdown: art(艺术) + -ist(表示人) + -ic(形容词后缀)
words.meaning_en: Showing skill or taste in art; aesthetically pleasing or creative.
words.meaning_zh: a. 艺术的，有艺术才能的
words.derivation: art(艺术) + -istic → 与艺术相关的 → 艺术的
words.example: Her artistic talents were evident in the beautiful paintings displayed throughout the gallery.
words.example_zh: 她的艺术才华在整个画廊展出的美丽画作中显而易见。

words.meaning_en: To express thoughts clearly or to pronounce words distinctly.
words.meaning_zh: v. 清晰表达 a. 善于表达的
words.derivation: art(技巧) + -iculate → 用技巧连接 → 清晰表达
words.example: The professor could articulate complex theories in ways that students easily understood.
words.example_zh: 教授能够以学生容易理解的方式清晰表达复杂的理论。

words.meaning_en: A skilled craftsperson who makes things by hand.
words.meaning_zh: n. 工匠，手艺人
words.derivation: art(技艺) + -isan(人) → 掌握技艺的人 → 工匠
words.example: Local artisans create beautiful handmade jewelry sold at the weekend market.
words.example_zh: 当地工匠制作的精美手工珠宝在周末市场出售。

words.breakdown: art(技艺) + -i + fic(做) + -ial(形容词后缀)
words.meaning_en: Made by humans rather than occurring naturally; not genuine or sincere.
words.meaning_zh: a. 人造的，人工的，虚假的
words.derivation: art(技艺) + fic(制作) + -ial → 用技艺制作的 → 人造的
words.example: Artificial intelligence is transforming industries from healthcare to transportation.
words.example_zh: 人工智能正在改变从医疗保健到交通运输等各个行业。

words.meaning_en: Clever or cunning devices or expedients, especially to deceive.
words.meaning_zh: n. 诡计，技巧，策略
words.derivation: art(技艺) + fice(制作) → 用技巧制造 → 诡计
words.example: The magician's performance relied more on artifice than on actual supernatural powers.
words.example_zh: 魔术师的表演更多依靠技巧而非真正的超自然力量。

words.meaning_en: Relating to a well where water rises naturally under pressure.
words.meaning_zh: a. 自流的，承压的
words.derivation: Artesian(阿尔托瓦地区) → 该地区特有的井 → 自流井的
words.example: The artesian well provided fresh water without the need for pumps.
words.example_zh: 自流井无需泵就能提供淡水。

words.meaning_en: Inflammation of the joints causing pain and stiffness.
words.meaning_zh: n. 关节炎
words.derivation: arthr(关节) + -itis(炎症) → 关节发炎 → 关节炎
words.example: Many elderly people suffer from arthritis, which makes movement painful and difficult.
words.example_zh: 许多老年人患有关节炎，这使得活动变得痛苦和困难。

words.meaning_en: to crush or squeeze something with force; to suppress
words.meaning_zh: 压扁，镇压
words.derivation: squ(挤压) + ash(重击) → 用力压 → 压碎/镇压
words.example: The government moved quickly to squash the rebellion.
words.example_zh: 政府迅速采取行动镇压了叛乱。
words.mnemonic: -ash系列重击词：squash/quash/smash/crash/clash/bash，都含猛烈撞击之感

words.meaning_en: to reject or void, especially by legal procedure; to suppress forcefully
words.meaning_zh: 撤销，镇压
words.derivation: 源自拉丁语quassare(打碎) → 强力压碎 → 撤销/镇压
words.example: The court decided to quash the conviction due to insufficient evidence.
words.example_zh: 法院因证据不足决定撤销定罪。
words.mnemonic: quash和squash同源：qu(力量)+ash(重击)→彻底压碎→撤销判决

words.meaning_en: to embarrass or make ashamed
words.meaning_zh: 使窘迫，使羞愧
words.derivation: a(使) + bash(打击) → 打击面子 → 使窘迫
words.example: Nothing seemed to abash the confident young speaker.
words.example_zh: 似乎没有什么能让这位自信的年轻演讲者感到窘迫。
words.mnemonic: a+bash(猛击)→给人一记当头棒喝→使人尴尬羞愧

words.meaning_en: To murder a prominent person for political or religious reasons.
words.meaning_zh: v. 暗杀，行刺
words.derivation: assassin(刺客) + -ate → 刺客行动 → 暗杀
words.example: President Lincoln was assassinated at Ford's Theatre in 1865.
words.example_zh: 林肯总统于1865年在福特剧院被暗杀。

words.meaning_en: A small rocky body orbiting the sun, mainly in the asteroid belt.
words.meaning_zh: n. 小行星
words.derivation: aster(星) + -oid(像) → 像星星的物体 → 小行星
words.example: Scientists monitor asteroids that could potentially collide with Earth.
words.example_zh: 科学家监测可能与地球相撞的小行星。

words.meaning_en: Having or showing shrewd judgment and keen discernment.
words.meaning_zh: a. 精明的，敏锐的
words.derivation: ast(狡猾) + -ute → 具有狡猾智慧 → 精明的
words.example: The astute businesswoman recognized the investment opportunity before her competitors did.
words.example_zh: 这位精明的女商人在竞争对手之前就发现了投资机会。

words.meaning_en: A chronic respiratory condition causing difficulty breathing and wheezing.
words.meaning_zh: n. 哮喘
words.derivation: asthm(气喘) + a(名词后缀) → 气喘的状态 → 哮喘
words.example: The child's asthma was triggered by cold air and pollen during spring.
words.example_zh: 这个孩子的哮喘在春天会因冷空气和花粉而发作。

words.breakdown: dis-(坏，不利) + aster(星) + -r(名词后缀)
words.meaning_en: A sudden event causing great damage, destruction, or suffering.
words.meaning_zh: n. 灾祸，灾难
words.derivation: dis(不利) + aster(星) → 星位不正 → 灾难
words.example: The earthquake was a major disaster that affected thousands of families.
words.example_zh: 这次地震是一场影响了数千家庭的重大灾难。

words.breakdown: dis-(坏，不利) + aster(星) + -ous(形容词后缀)
words.meaning_en: Causing great damage or harm; extremely unfortunate or unsuccessful.
words.meaning_zh: a. 灾难性的，损失惨重的
words.derivation: dis(不利) + aster(星) + ous(形容词后缀) → 星位不正的 → 灾难性的
words.example: The company's decision to ignore customer feedback had disastrous consequences.
words.example_zh: 公司忽视客户反馈的决定产生了灾难性的后果。

words.breakdown: astr(星) + -o-(连接) + nom(规律) + -ical(形容词后缀)
words.meaning_en: Relating to astronomy or extremely large in amount or scale.
words.meaning_zh: a. 天文学的，庞大的
words.derivation: astr(星) + nom(规律) + ical(形容词后缀) → 研究星体规律的 → 天文学的
words.example: The cost of the new space telescope reached astronomical levels.
words.example_zh: 新太空望远镜的成本达到了天文数字。

words.breakdown: astr(星) + -o-(连接) + nom(规律) + -y(名词后缀)
words.meaning_en: The scientific study of celestial objects and phenomena in the universe.
words.meaning_zh: n. 天文学
words.derivation: astr(星) + nom(规律) + y(名词后缀) → 研究星体规律 → 天文学
words.example: She majored in astronomy because of her fascination with stars and planets.
words.example_zh: 她主修天文学，因为她对恒星和行星很着迷。

words.meaning_en: To spread throughout or penetrate something gradually.
words.meaning_zh: vt. 渗透，弥漫
words.derivation: per(穿过) + me(走) + ate(动词后缀) → 穿过而走 → 渗透
words.example: The smell of coffee permeated the entire house in the morning.
words.example_zh: 咖啡的香味在早晨弥漫了整个房子。

words.breakdown: ac-(加强) + cumul(堆积) + -ate(动词后缀)
words.meaning_en: To gradually gather or acquire an increasing amount of something.
words.meaning_zh: v. 积累，堆积
words.derivation: ac(加强) + cumul(堆积) + ate(动词后缀) → 不断堆积 → 积累
words.example: Over the years, dust had accumulated on the old books in the library.
words.example_zh: 多年来，灰尘已经在图书馆的旧书上堆积起来。

words.meaning_en: To begin to grow or develop, especially from a seed.
words.meaning_zh: v. 发芽，萌芽
words.derivation: germin(芽) + ate(动词后缀) → 使生芽 → 发芽
words.example: Seeds need moisture and warmth to germinate properly.
words.example_zh: 种子需要湿度和温暖才能正常发芽。

words.meaning_en: To transfer pollen to a plant enabling fertilization and reproduction.
words.meaning_zh: vt. 对...授粉
words.derivation: pollin(花粉) + ate(动词后缀) → 使接受花粉 → 授粉
words.example: Bees pollinate flowers as they collect nectar from one bloom to another.
words.example_zh: 蜜蜂在从一朵花采集花蜜到另一朵花时为花朵授粉。

words.meaning_en: To specify or demand something as part of an agreement.
words.meaning_zh: v. 规定，约定
words.derivation: stipul(约定) + ate(动词后缀) → 使约定 → 规定
words.example: The contract stipulates that payment must be made within thirty days.
words.example_zh: 合同规定必须在三十天内付款。

words.meaning_en: An organic compound providing energy, including sugars and starches.
words.meaning_zh: n. 碳水化合物，糖类
words.derivation: carbo(碳) + hydr(水) + ate(化合物后缀) → 碳和水的化合物 → 碳水化合物
words.example: Athletes often consume carbohydrates before competitions to increase their energy levels.
words.example_zh: 运动员经常在比赛前摄入碳水化合物以提高能量水平。

words.breakdown: e-(出) + man(手) + cip(拿) + -ate(动词后缀)
words.meaning_en: To free from legal, social, or political restrictions.
words.meaning_zh: vt. 解放，释放
words.derivation: e(出) + man(手) + cip(拿) + ate(动词后缀) → 从手中放出 → 解放
words.example: Lincoln's proclamation helped emancipate millions of enslaved people.
words.example_zh: 林肯的宣言帮助解放了数百万被奴役的人。

words.meaning_en: To originate or issue from a source.
words.meaning_zh: vi. 散发，发出，发源
words.derivation: e(出) + man(流) + ate(动词后缀) → 向外流出 → 散发
words.example: A sense of calm seemed to emanate from the meditation teacher.
words.example_zh: 一种平静的感觉似乎从冥想老师身上散发出来。

words.meaning_en: A person trained in sports or physical exercises.
words.meaning_zh: n. 运动员
words.derivation: athl(竞技) + ete(名词后缀) → 参与竞技的人 → 运动员
words.example: The athlete trained for months to prepare for the Olympic Games.
words.example_zh: 这名运动员训练了数月以备战奥运会。

words.meaning_en: To succeed in achieving or reaching a goal.
words.meaning_zh: vt. 达到，获得
words.derivation: at(向) + tain(握住) → 向目标伸手握住 → 达到
words.example: She worked hard to attain her goal of becoming a doctor.
words.example_zh: 她努力工作以达到成为医生的目标。

words.meaning_en: A lawyer authorized to represent clients in legal matters.
words.meaning_zh: n. 律师，代理人
words.derivation: at(向) + torn(转) + ey(名词后缀) → 转向代理他人的人 → 律师
words.example: The attorney presented compelling evidence to support her client's case.
words.example_zh: 律师提出了令人信服的证据来支持她客户的案件。

words.meaning_en: A public sale where items are sold to the highest bidder.
words.meaning_zh: n. 拍卖
words.derivation: auct(增加) + ion(名词后缀) → 价格不断增加的销售 → 拍卖
words.example: The rare painting was sold at auction for over a million dollars.
words.example_zh: 这幅珍贵的画作在拍卖会上以超过一百万美元的价格售出。

words.meaning_en: A group of people watching or listening to a performance or presentation.
words.meaning_zh: n. 听众，观众
words.derivation: audi(听) + ence(名词后缀) → 听众
words.example: The speaker engaged the audience with her inspiring personal story.
words.example_zh: 演讲者用她鼓舞人心的个人故事吸引了观众。

words.meaning_en: A trial performance to test ability or suitability for a role.
words.meaning_zh: n. 试听，试演
words.derivation: audit(听) + ion(名词后缀) → 听
words.example: She attended an audition for the lead role in the school musical.
words.example_zh: 她参加了学校音乐剧主角的试演。

words.meaning_en: A large room or building for public gatherings or performances.
words.meaning_zh: n. 礼堂，听众席
words.derivation: audit(听) + orium(场所名词后缀) → 听众席
words.example: The graduation ceremony was held in the school's main auditorium.
words.example_zh: 毕业典礼在学校的主礼堂举行。

words.meaning_en: An official examination of financial accounts or a systematic review.
words.meaning_zh: n. 审计，查账；旁听 vt. 审计，旁听
words.derivation: audit(听) → 听取账目汇报 → 审计
words.example: The company hired an independent firm to audit its financial statements before the merger.
words.example_zh: 该公司在合并前聘请了一家独立公司审计其财务报表。

words.meaning_en: Sound, especially when recorded, transmitted, or reproduced.
words.meaning_zh: a. 音频的，声音的 n. 音频
words.derivation: audi(听) + o → 与听有关的 → 音频的
words.example: The audio quality of the podcast was excellent, making it easy to understand every word.
words.example_zh: 这个播客的音频质量很好，使得每个词都很容易听清楚。

words.meaning_en: Able to be heard; loud enough to hear.
words.meaning_zh: a. 听得见的，可闻的
words.derivation: audi(听) + ible(可…的) → 可以被听到的 → 听得见的
words.example: The speaker's voice was barely audible in the large auditorium without a microphone.
words.example_zh: 在大礼堂里，没有麦克风的话，演讲者的声音几乎听不见。

words.meaning_en: Related to the sense of hearing.
words.meaning_zh: a. 听觉的，听觉器官的
words.derivation: audit(听) + ory(…的) → 与听有关的 → 听觉的
words.example: Damage to the auditory nerve can result in permanent hearing loss.
words.example_zh: 听觉神经受损可能导致永久性听力丧失。

words.meaning_en: To make something greater by adding to it; increase.
words.meaning_zh: v. 增加，增大，增强
words.derivation: aug(增加) + ment → 使增加 → 增大
words.example: The university decided to augment its scholarship program to attract more talented students.
words.example_zh: 这所大学决定扩大其奖学金项目以吸引更多有才华的学生。

words.breakdown: author(权力) + -ity(名词后缀) + -ative(形容词后缀)
words.meaning_en: Commanding and self-confident; showing expertise or official sanction.
words.meaning_zh: a. 权威的，命令式的，当局的
words.derivation: author(权力) + ity + ative(…的) → 有权力的 → 权威的
words.example: The professor's authoritative tone made it clear that he was an expert in his field.
words.example_zh: 教授权威的语气表明他是该领域的专家。

words.meaning_en: To give official permission or approval for something.
words.meaning_zh: vt. 授权，批准，委托
words.derivation: author(权力) + ize(使…) → 给予权力 → 授权
words.example: Only the manager can authorize purchases over one thousand dollars.
words.example_zh: 只有经理才能批准超过一千美元的采购。

words.meaning_en: The power or right to give orders and enforce obedience.
words.meaning_zh: n. 权力，权威，当局，专家
words.derivation: author(权力) + ity(表性质) → 权力的性质 → 权威
words.example: The local authority announced new regulations for waste management in the city.
words.example_zh: 地方当局宣布了城市废物管理的新规定。

words.meaning_en: A number expressing the central or typical value in a set.
words.meaning_zh: n. 平均数，平均水平 a. 平均的，普通的 v. 平均为
words.derivation: aver(损害分摊) + age → 分摊后的数值 → 平均数
words.example: The average temperature in July is around 28 degrees Celsius in this region.
words.example_zh: 这个地区七月份的平均温度约为28摄氏度。

words.meaning_en: a large enclosure for keeping birds
words.meaning_zh: 鸟舍，大型鸟笼
words.derivation: avi(鸟) + ary(场所) → 鸟的场所 → 鸟舍
words.example: The zoo's aviary houses over fifty species of tropical birds.
words.example_zh: 动物园的鸟舍里饲养着五十多种热带鸟类。

words.meaning_en: the flying or operating of aircraft
words.meaning_zh: 航空，飞行
words.derivation: avi(鸟) + ation(行为) → 像鸟一样飞的行为 → 航空
words.example: The aviation industry has grown rapidly in the last decade.
words.example_zh: 航空业在过去十年中发展迅速。

words.meaning_en: conducive to success; favorable
words.meaning_zh: 吉利的，有利的
words.derivation: au(鸟) + spic(看) + ious(…的) → 观鸟占卜为吉 → 吉利的
words.example: The sunny weather was an auspicious sign for the outdoor ceremony.
words.example_zh: 晴朗的天气对户外典礼来说是个好兆头。

words.meaning_en: Very bad or unpleasant; terrible.
words.meaning_zh: a. 可怕的，糟糕的，极坏的
words.derivation: awe(敬畏) + ful(充满) → 充满敬畏的 → 可怕的
words.example: The weather was awful yesterday, with heavy rain and strong winds all day.
words.example_zh: 昨天的天气很糟糕，整天都有大雨和强风。

words.meaning_en: Extremely impressive or daunting; inspiring awe.
words.meaning_zh: a. 令人敬畏的，极好的
words.derivation: awe(敬畏) + some(引起) → 引起敬畏的 → 令人敬畏的
words.example: The view from the mountain top was absolutely awesome and worth the difficult climb.
words.example_zh: 从山顶看到的景色非常壮观，艰难的攀登是值得的。

words.meaning_en: Causing difficulty; hard to do or deal with; clumsy.
words.meaning_zh: a. 笨拙的，尴尬的，棘手的
words.derivation: awk(反方向的) + ward(向) → 朝向错误方向的 → 笨拙的
words.example: There was an awkward silence after he accidentally revealed the surprise party plan.
words.example_zh: 他不小心透露了惊喜派对的计划后，出现了一阵尴尬的沉默。

words.breakdown: bab(拟声：重复说话声) + -le(动词后缀)
words.meaning_en: To talk rapidly and continuously in a foolish or incomprehensible way.
words.meaning_zh: vi. 喋喋不休，牙牙学语 n. 含糊不清的话
words.derivation: bab(拟声：重复说话声) + le(反复) → 不断重复说话 → 喋喋不休
words.example: The excited children began to babble about their vacation experiences all at once.
words.example_zh: 兴奋的孩子们开始同时喋喋不休地谈论他们的假期经历。

words.meaning_en: Relating to the ancient city of Babylon or its culture.
words.meaning_zh: a. 巴比伦的，奢华的 n. 巴比伦人
words.derivation: Babylon(巴比伦) + ian(属于…的) → 属于巴比伦的 → 巴比伦的
words.example: The museum's exhibition featured impressive Babylonian artifacts from the ancient empire.
words.example_zh: 博物馆的展览展出了来自古代帝国的令人印象深刻的巴比伦文物。

words.meaning_en: Cured meat from the back or sides of a pig.
words.meaning_zh: n. 熏肉，咸肉
words.derivation: bacon(源自古法语：熏制的猪肉) → 熏肉
words.example: Many Americans enjoy eating bacon and eggs for breakfast on weekends.
words.example_zh: 许多美国人喜欢在周末早餐时吃熏肉和鸡蛋。

words.meaning_en: Support or help; a copy of data stored separately for safety.
words.meaning_zh: n. 后援，支持，备份 a. 后备的
words.derivation: back(后) + up(向上) → 在后面支持 → 后援，备份
words.example: It's essential to create a backup of important files to prevent data loss.
words.example_zh: 创建重要文件的备份以防止数据丢失是至关重要的。

words.meaning_en: A stroke in tennis or similar sports made with back of hand.
words.meaning_zh: n. 反手击球 a. 反手的
words.derivation: back(后) + hand(手) → 手背向前的动作 → 反手击球
words.example: Her backhand stroke in tennis has improved significantly after months of practice.
words.example_zh: 经过几个月的练习，她的网球反手击球技术有了显著提高。

words.meaning_en: Lighting from behind a subject in photography or display technology.
words.meaning_zh: n. 背光，逆光照明 v. 从背后照明
words.derivation: back(背后) + light(光) + ing → 从背后来的光 → 背光
words.example: The smartphone features advanced backlighting technology for better screen visibility in sunlight.
words.example_zh: 这款智能手机采用先进的背光技术，在阳光下屏幕能见度更好。

words.meaning_en: Microscopic single-celled organisms, some of which cause disease.
words.meaning_zh: n. 细菌（复数）
words.derivation: bacter(小杆状物) + ia(复数) → 杆状的微生物 → 细菌
words.example: Washing hands regularly helps prevent the spread of harmful bacteria.
words.example_zh: 经常洗手有助于防止有害细菌的传播。

words.meaning_en: Food or lure used to attract and catch fish or animals.
words.meaning_zh: n. 饵，诱饵 vt. 引诱，激怒
words.derivation: bait(源自古Norse：食物) → 用于引诱的食物 → 诱饵
words.example: The fisherman used worms as bait to catch fish in the lake.
words.example_zh: 渔夫用蠕虫作为诱饵在湖里钓鱼。

words.meaning_en: To cook food using dry heat in an oven.
words.meaning_zh: v. 烘焙，烤；n. 烘焙
words.derivation: bake(烤) → 用干热烹饪 → 烘焙
words.example: She decided to bake a chocolate cake for her daughter's birthday party.
words.example_zh: 她决定为女儿的生日派对烤一个巧克力蛋糕。

words.meaning_en: Having little or no hair on the head.
words.meaning_zh: a. 秃头的，光秃的，单调的
words.derivation: bald(光滑) → 没有毛发覆盖 → 秃头的
words.example: The bald eagle is a symbol of strength and freedom in the United States.
words.example_zh: 秃鹰是美国力量和自由的象征。

words.meaning_en: A platform projecting from the wall of a building with a railing.
words.meaning_zh: n. 阳台，戏院楼厅
words.derivation: balc(梁，突出物) → 从建筑突出的平台 → 阳台
words.example: We enjoyed our morning coffee on the hotel balcony overlooking the ocean.
words.example_zh: 我们在能俯瞰海洋的酒店阳台上享用早晨的咖啡。

words.meaning_en: A fragrant ointment or preparation used to heal or soothe.
words.meaning_zh: n. 镇痛软膏，香膏，安慰物
words.derivation: balm(香料) → 有香味的治疗物 → 香膏
words.example: The nurse applied a soothing balm to the patient's sunburned skin.
words.example_zh: 护士在病人晒伤的皮肤上涂抹了舒缓的软膏。

words.meaning_en: To hesitate or refuse to proceed with an action.
words.meaning_zh: v. 犹豫不前，拒绝；n. 障碍，妨碍
words.derivation: balk(梁，障碍) → 遇到阻挡而停止 → 犹豫不前
words.example: Many investors balk at the high risks associated with cryptocurrency trading.
words.example_zh: 许多投资者对加密货币交易的高风险望而却步。

words.meaning_en: A strip or loop of material used to bind or connect things.
words.meaning_zh: n. 带子，乐队，队伍；v. 联合，结合
words.derivation: band(绑) → 用来捆绑或连接的物品 → 带子
words.example: The rock band performed at the music festival last weekend.
words.example_zh: 那支摇滚乐队上周末在音乐节上表演。

words.meaning_en: A large piece of cloth bearing a slogan or design.
words.meaning_zh: n. 旗帜，横幅；a. 显著的，特别好的
words.derivation: bann(旗帜) + er(物) → 用来标识的旗帜 → 横幅
words.example: Protesters marched through the streets carrying banners demanding climate action.
words.example_zh: 抗议者举着要求采取气候行动的横幅在街上游行。

words.meaning_en: A cylindrical container typically made of wood or metal.
words.meaning_zh: n. 桶，枪管；v. 装入桶内
words.derivation: barr(棒，圆柱) + el(小) → 圆柱形容器 → 桶
words.example: The winery stores its finest wines in oak barrels for several years.
words.example_zh: 这家酒庄将其最好的葡萄酒在橡木桶中储存数年。

words.meaning_en: A large farm building used for storing grain or housing animals.
words.meaning_zh: n. 谷仓，畜棚
words.derivation: bar(大麦) + n → 存放谷物的地方 → 谷仓
words.example: The farmer stored hay in the barn to feed his cattle during winter.
words.example_zh: 农民将干草存放在谷仓里，以便在冬季喂养牛群。

words.meaning_en: To exchange goods or services without using money.
words.meaning_zh: v. 以物易物，交换；n. 物物交换
words.derivation: barter(交换) → 不用货币的交易 → 以物易物
words.example: In ancient times, people would barter crops for tools and other necessities.
words.example_zh: 在古代，人们会用农作物交换工具和其他必需品。

words.meaning_en: A flat-bottomed boat for carrying freight on rivers and canals.
words.meaning_zh: n. 驳船，平底船；v. 蹒跚而行，闯入
words.derivation: barge(船) → 平底运货船 → 驳船
words.example: Coal was transported down the river on large barges to the power plant.
words.example_zh: 煤炭通过大型驳船沿河运往发电厂。

words.meaning_en: an improvised barrier erected to block a route
words.meaning_zh: 路障，障碍物
words.derivation: barr(障碍) + icade → 用来阻挡的东西 → 路障
words.example: Protesters set up barricades across the main road.
words.example_zh: 抗议者在主干道上设置了路障。

words.meaning_en: a fence or obstacle that prevents movement or access
words.meaning_zh: 障碍，屏障
words.derivation: barr(障碍) + ier → 阻挡物 → 障碍
words.example: Language can be a major barrier to communication.
words.example_zh: 语言可能是沟通的一大障碍。

words.meaning_en: an official ban on trade or other commercial activity
words.meaning_zh: 禁运，禁令
words.derivation: em(进入) + bar(阻拦) + go → 进入阻拦状态 → 禁运
words.example: The government imposed an embargo on oil exports.
words.example_zh: 政府对石油出口实施了禁运。

words.meaning_en: too poor to produce much vegetation; not productive
words.meaning_zh: 贫瘠的，不毛的
words.derivation: barr(阻碍) + en → 生长受阻的 → 贫瘠的
words.example: The barren landscape stretched for miles without a single tree.
words.example_zh: 贫瘠的大地绵延数英里，看不到一棵树。

words.meaning_en: A person who cuts men's hair as an occupation.
words.meaning_zh: n. 理发师
words.derivation: barb(胡须) + er(人) → 修剪胡须和头发的人 → 理发师
words.example: My grandfather has been going to the same barber for over twenty years.
words.example_zh: 我祖父二十多年来一直去同一个理发师那里理发。

words.meaning_en: A sharp projection near the end of an arrow or fishhook.
words.meaning_zh: n. 倒钩，刺；v. 装倒钩于
words.derivation: barb(尖刺) → 向后弯的尖刺 → 倒钩
words.example: The fishhook had a sharp barb that made it difficult for the fish to escape.
words.example_zh: 鱼钩上有锋利的倒钩，使鱼难以逃脱。

words.meaning_en: Food cooked outdoors on a grill over an open fire.
words.meaning_zh: n. 烧烤，烤肉；v. 烧烤
words.derivation: barbecue(烤架) → 在火上烤制食物 → 烧烤
words.example: We're planning to have a barbecue in the backyard this Saturday afternoon.
words.example_zh: 我们计划这周六下午在后院举行烧烤。

words.meaning_en: Without covering or clothing; minimal or basic.
words.meaning_zh: a. 赤裸的，无遮蔽的，仅有的；v. 露出
words.derivation: bare(裸露) → 没有覆盖物 → 赤裸的
words.example: The room was bare except for a single bed and a small table.
words.example_zh: 房间里空荡荡的，只有一张床和一张小桌子。

words.meaning_en: An agreement between parties or something bought at a low price.
words.meaning_zh: n. 交易，特价商品；v. 讨价还价
words.derivation: bargain(商议) → 通过协商达成的交易 → 讨价还价
words.example: She found a real bargain at the vintage clothing store yesterday.
words.example_zh: 她昨天在古着服装店淘到了一件真正的便宜货。

words.meaning_en: The outer covering of a tree or the sound a dog makes.
words.meaning_zh: n. 树皮，吠声；v. 吠叫，剥树皮
words.derivation: bark(外壳/声音) → 树的外层/狗的叫声 → 树皮/吠叫
words.example: The dog began to bark loudly when strangers approached the house.
words.example_zh: 当陌生人靠近房子时，狗开始大声吠叫。

words.meaning_en: To begin a journey or start a new venture.
words.meaning_zh: v. 上船，着手，从事
words.derivation: em(进入) + bark(船) → 登上船 → 着手开始
words.example: After graduation, she decided to embark on a career in environmental science.
words.example_zh: 毕业后，她决定开始从事环境科学事业。

words.meaning_en: A bowl for washing or a low area of land surrounded by hills.
words.meaning_zh: n. 盆，流域，盆地
words.derivation: bas(底部) + in → 底部的容器 → 盆
words.example: The Amazon basin is home to the world's largest tropical rainforest.
words.example_zh: 亚马逊流域是世界上最大的热带雨林的所在地。

words.meaning_en: Forming an essential foundation; fundamental or primary.
words.meaning_zh: a. 基本的，基础的；n. 基本原理
words.derivation: bas(基础) + ic(的) → 构成基础的 → 基本的
words.example: Understanding grammar is basic to learning any foreign language effectively.
words.example_zh: 理解语法是有效学习任何外语的基础。

words.meaning_en: The lowest part or foundation of something; to establish on a foundation.
words.meaning_zh: n. 底部，基础，基地；v. 以...作基础；a. 卑鄙的
words.derivation: bas(底部) → 最低的部分 → 底部，基础
words.example: The company decided to base its new headquarters in Silicon Valley.
words.example_zh: 该公司决定将其新总部设在硅谷。

words.meaning_en: A device that stores and provides electrical energy or a series of similar items.
words.meaning_zh: n. 电池，蓄电池；一系列
words.derivation: bat(打) + -tery(名词后缀) → 连续打击的器具 → 电池组
words.example: The smartphone battery needs to be recharged every day.
words.example_zh: 智能手机的电池需要每天充电。

words.meaning_en: To become less intense or widespread; to reduce in amount or degree.
words.meaning_zh: v. 减少，减轻，减弱
words.derivation: a(向下) + bat(打) → 向下打击 → 减弱，减少
words.example: The storm began to abate after several hours of heavy rain.
words.example_zh: 暴雨持续数小时后，风暴开始减弱。

words.meaning_en: A formal discussion on a particular topic with opposing arguments.
words.meaning_zh: n. 辩论，讨论；v. 争论，辩论
words.derivation: de(加强意义) + bat(打) → 激烈交锋 → 辩论
words.example: The candidates will debate economic policy on national television tonight.
words.example_zh: 候选人今晚将在全国电视台辩论经济政策。

words.breakdown: bat(打) + -er(动词后缀，表示反复动作)
words.meaning_en: To strike repeatedly with hard blows; a mixture of ingredients for cooking.
words.meaning_zh: v. 连续猛打；n. 面糊，击球手
words.derivation: bat(打) + -er(反复动作) → 反复击打 → 连续猛打
words.example: Strong waves continued to batter the coastline during the hurricane.
words.example_zh: 飓风期间，巨浪持续猛烈冲击海岸线。

words.meaning_en: A partial refund to someone who has paid too much for something.
words.meaning_zh: n. 部分退款，折扣；v. 退还
words.derivation: re(向后) + bat(打) → 打回去 → 退还，折扣
words.example: Customers can receive a rebate of up to $500 on energy-efficient appliances.
words.example_zh: 顾客购买节能电器可获得高达500美元的退款。

words.meaning_en: Fighting between armed forces; to take action to reduce or prevent something.
words.meaning_zh: n. 战斗，格斗；v. 与...战斗，与...斗争
words.derivation: com(共同) + bat(打) → 互相打击 → 战斗
words.example: Scientists are working to combat the effects of climate change.
words.example_zh: 科学家们正在努力对抗气候变化的影响。

words.meaning_en: Open to discussion or argument; questionable or doubtful.
words.meaning_zh: a. 可争论的，成问题的，未决定的
words.derivation: debate(辩论) + -able(可...的) → 可以辩论的 → 可争论的
words.example: Whether this policy will succeed is highly debatable among experts.
words.example_zh: 这项政策能否成功在专家中间是高度可争议的。

words.meaning_en: to cause someone to become perplexed and confused
words.meaning_zh: 使困惑，使迷惑
words.derivation: be(使) + wilder(迷路) → 使人迷路 → 使困惑
words.example: The complex instructions bewildered the new employees.
words.example_zh: 复杂的操作说明让新员工感到困惑。

words.meaning_en: to make someone or something seem unimportant
words.meaning_zh: 贬低，小看
words.derivation: be(使) + little(小) → 使变小 → 贬低
words.example: A good leader should never belittle the contributions of team members.
words.example_zh: 一个好的领导者绝不应该贬低团队成员的贡献。

words.meaning_en: to surround with armed forces; to overwhelm with requests
words.meaning_zh: 围困，围攻
words.derivation: be(使) + siege(围困) → 使被围困 → 围攻
words.example: The castle was besieged for three months before it finally surrendered.
words.example_zh: 城堡被围困了三个月才最终投降。

words.meaning_en: to confer or present an honor, right, or gift
words.meaning_zh: 授予，赐予
words.derivation: be(使) + stow(放置) → 郑重放置给某人 → 授予
words.example: The university bestowed an honorary degree upon the distinguished scientist.
words.example_zh: 大学授予这位杰出科学家荣誉学位。

words.meaning_en: to charm or enchant, sometimes in a deceptive way
words.meaning_zh: 欺骗，迷惑
words.derivation: be(使) + guile(欺骗) → 使被欺骗 → 迷惑
words.example: The con artist beguiled investors with promises of enormous returns.
words.example_zh: 骗子用巨额回报的承诺迷惑了投资者。

words.meaning_en: A long piece of wood or metal used in building; a ray of light.
words.meaning_zh: n. 横梁，光束；v. 发光，微笑
words.derivation: beam(树木) → 树干做的横木 → 横梁，光束
words.example: A beam of sunlight streamed through the window into the dark room.
words.example_zh: 一束阳光透过窗户照进黑暗的房间。

words.meaning_en: The hard, pointed part of a bird's mouth.
words.meaning_zh: n. 鸟嘴，喙
words.derivation: beak(尖的) → 鸟类的尖嘴 → 鸟嘴
words.example: The eagle used its sharp beak to tear apart its prey.
words.example_zh: 老鹰用它锋利的喙撕碎猎物。

words.meaning_en: A large rodent known for building dams in rivers and streams.
words.meaning_zh: n. 海狸
words.derivation: beaver(棕色的) → 棕色的动物 → 海狸
words.example: The beaver built an elaborate dam across the stream.
words.example_zh: 海狸在溪流上建造了一个精巧的水坝。

words.meaning_en: A sandy or pebbly shore along a body of water.
words.meaning_zh: n. 海滩，沙滩
words.derivation: beach(岸边) → 水边的沙地 → 海滩
words.example: Tourists enjoy relaxing on the beach during summer vacation.
words.example_zh: 游客们喜欢在暑假期间在海滩上放松。

words.meaning_en: A small piece of glass, stone, or similar material with a hole for threading.
words.meaning_zh: n. 珠子，水珠
words.derivation: bead(祈祷) → 祈祷用的珠子 → 珠子
words.example: She strung colorful beads together to make a beautiful necklace.
words.example_zh: 她把彩色珠子串在一起做成了一条漂亮的项链。

words.meaning_en: A legume native to East Asia widely cultivated for its edible bean.
words.meaning_zh: n. 大豆
words.derivation: soy(酱油) + bean(豆) → 做酱油的豆 → 大豆
words.example: Soybeans are an important source of protein in many Asian diets.
words.example_zh: 大豆是许多亚洲饮食中重要的蛋白质来源。

words.meaning_en: To strike repeatedly; to defeat; a regular rhythm or pattern.
words.meaning_zh: v. 打，击败；n. 节拍，心跳
words.derivation: beat(击打) → 反复击打 → 打，击败
words.example: The drummer beat the drums loudly during the performance.
words.example_zh: 表演期间，鼓手大声敲击鼓面。

words.meaning_en: To fix firmly and deeply in a surrounding mass.
words.meaning_zh: v. 使嵌入，使插入，使深留脑中
words.derivation: em(进入) + bed(基座) → 使进入基座 → 嵌入
words.example: The journalist was embedded with military troops during the conflict.
words.example_zh: 这名记者在冲突期间随军队一起行动。

words.meaning_en: A device with an air bag that emits a stream of air when squeezed.
words.meaning_zh: n. 风箱，波纹管
words.derivation: bellow(吼叫) → 发出声音的装置 → 风箱
words.example: The blacksmith used bellows to make the fire hotter.
words.example_zh: 铁匠用风箱使火更旺。

words.meaning_en: To give a false impression of; to contradict or show to be false.
words.meaning_zh: v. 掩饰，与...不符，证明...为假
words.derivation: be(使) + lie(说谎) → 使成为谎言 → 掩饰，证明为假
words.example: Her calm expression belied the anxiety she felt inside.
words.example_zh: 她平静的表情掩饰了内心的焦虑。

words.meaning_en: A person who resists authority or control; to resist or fight against authority.
words.meaning_zh: n. 叛徒，反叛者；v. 造反，反抗
words.derivation: re(相反) + bel(战争) → 反向战斗 → 反叛
words.example: The rebels fought against the oppressive government regime.
words.example_zh: 叛军与压迫性的政府政权作战。

words.meaning_en: To make more attractive by adding decorative details; to exaggerate a story.
words.meaning_zh: v. 装饰，修饰，润色
words.derivation: em(使) + bell(美) + -ish(动词后缀) → 使变美 → 装饰，修饰
words.example: The author tends to embellish his stories with fictional details.
words.example_zh: 这位作者倾向于用虚构的细节来润色他的故事。

words.meaning_en: A strip of material worn around the waist or a region with distinctive characteristics.
words.meaning_zh: n. 带子，腰带，地带
words.derivation: belt(带子) → 围绕腰部的带状物 → 带子，地带
words.example: The agricultural belt in the Midwest produces most of the nation's corn and wheat.
words.example_zh: 中西部的农业地带生产了全国大部分的玉米和小麦。

words.meaning_en: an advantage or profit gained from something
words.meaning_zh: 益处，好处
words.derivation: bene(好的) + fit(做) → 做好事 → 益处
words.example: Exercise has many health benefits.
words.example_zh: 运动有很多健康方面的益处。

words.breakdown: bene-(好的) + fic-(做) + -ial(形容词后缀)
words.meaning_en: favorable or advantageous; resulting in good
words.meaning_zh: 有益的，有利的
words.derivation: bene(好的) + fic(做) + ial(…的) → 做好事的 → 有益的
words.example: A good diet is beneficial to health.
words.example_zh: 良好的饮食对健康有益。

words.breakdown: bene-(好的) + vol-(意愿) + -ent(形容词后缀)
words.meaning_en: well-meaning and kindly
words.meaning_zh: 仁慈的，慈善的
words.derivation: bene(好的) + vol(意愿) + ent(…的) → 有好意愿的 → 仁慈的
words.example: The benevolent organization provided food for the homeless.
words.example_zh: 这个慈善组织为无家可归者提供食物。

words.meaning_en: a person who gives money or other help to a person or cause
words.meaning_zh: 恩人，捐助者
words.derivation: bene(好的) + fact(做) + or(人) → 做好事的人 → 恩人
words.example: The museum was built thanks to a generous benefactor.
words.example_zh: 这座博物馆的建成多亏了一位慷慨的捐助者。

words.meaning_en: the utterance or bestowing of a blessing
words.meaning_zh: 祝福，祈祷
words.derivation: bene(好的) + dict(说) + ion(行为) → 说好话 → 祝福
words.example: The priest offered a benediction at the end of the ceremony.
words.example_zh: 牧师在仪式结束时献上了祝福。

words.meaning_en: To risk money on the outcome of an event or competition.
words.meaning_zh: v. 打赌；n. 赌注
words.derivation: bet(打赌) → 对未知结果下注 → 打赌，赌注
words.example: Scientists bet that the new vaccine would be effective against multiple virus strains.
words.example_zh: 科学家们确信新疫苗将对多种病毒株有效。

words.meaning_en: A statement of money owed or a draft of a proposed law.
words.meaning_zh: n. 账单，法案，钞票
words.derivation: bill(账单) → 记录应付款项的文件 → 账单，法案
words.example: Congress passed a bill to provide funding for renewable energy research.
words.example_zh: 国会通过了一项法案，为可再生能源研究提供资金。

words.meaning_en: A joining or merging of different elements into a unified whole.
words.meaning_zh: n. 组合，结合，联合
words.derivation: com(共同) + bin(二，合) → 放在一起 → 组合，结合
words.example: The combination of high temperature and low humidity created perfect conditions for wildfires.
words.example_zh: 高温和低湿度的结合为野火创造了完美的条件。

words.meaning_en: To join or merge multiple things together into one.
words.meaning_zh: v. 结合，联合；n. 联合企业
words.derivation: com(共同) + bin(合) → 使共同在一起 → 结合，联合
words.example: Researchers combined traditional methods with modern technology to analyze the ancient artifacts.
words.example_zh: 研究人员将传统方法与现代技术相结合来分析古代文物。

words.meaning_en: the variety of plant and animal life in the world or in a particular habitat
words.meaning_zh: 生物多样性
words.derivation: bio(生物) + diversity(多样性) → 生物的多样性 → 生物多样性
words.example: The rainforest is known for its incredible biodiversity.
words.example_zh: 热带雨林以其惊人的生物多样性而闻名。

words.meaning_en: the branch of science concerned with chemical processes in living organisms
words.meaning_zh: 生物化学
words.derivation: bio(生命) + chemistry(化学) → 生命体中的化学 → 生物化学
words.example: She earned her degree in biochemistry.
words.example_zh: 她获得了生物化学学位。

words.breakdown: anti-(反对) + bio-(生命) + -tic(形容词后缀)
words.meaning_en: a medicine that inhibits the growth of or destroys microorganisms
words.meaning_zh: 抗生素
words.derivation: anti(反对) + bio(生命) + tic(…的) → 反对微生物生命的 → 抗生素
words.example: The doctor prescribed an antibiotic for the bacterial infection.
words.example_zh: 医生为细菌感染开了抗生素。

words.breakdown: bio-(生命) + chem(化学) + -ical(形容词后缀)
words.meaning_en: Relating to chemical processes that occur within living organisms.
words.meaning_zh: a. 生物化学的
words.derivation: bio(生命) + chem(化学) + -ical(的) → 生命体中的化学 → 生物化学的
words.example: Biochemical reactions in cells convert nutrients into energy through complex metabolic pathways.
words.example_zh: 细胞中的生物化学反应通过复杂的代谢途径将营养物质转化为能量。

words.breakdown: amphi-(两) + bio(生命) + -ous(形容词后缀)
words.meaning_en: Able to live or operate both on land and in water.
words.meaning_zh: a. 两栖的，水陆两用的
words.derivation: amphi(两) + bio(生命) → 有两种生活方式 → 两栖的
words.example: Amphibious vehicles were essential for the military operation that required crossing both rivers and terrain.
words.example_zh: 两栖车辆对于需要跨越河流和陆地的军事行动至关重要。

words.breakdown: bio-(生命) + log(学科) + -ist(从事...的人)
words.meaning_en: A scientist who studies living organisms and their life processes.
words.meaning_zh: n. 生物学家
words.derivation: bio(生命) + log(学科) + -ist(人) → 研究生命的人 → 生物学家
words.example: Marine biologists discovered a new species of fish in the deep ocean trenches.
words.example_zh: 海洋生物学家在深海海沟中发现了一种新的鱼类。

words.meaning_en: A tiny bird that hovers and makes a humming sound with its wings.
words.meaning_zh: n. 蜂鸟
words.derivation: humming(嗡嗡声) + bird(鸟) → 翅膀发出嗡嗡声的鸟 → 蜂鸟
words.example: The hummingbird can beat its wings up to 80 times per second while hovering near flowers.
words.example_zh: 蜂鸟在花朵附近悬停时，翅膀每秒可以扇动80次。

words.meaning_en: a plant disease; something that spoils or damages
words.meaning_zh: 枯萎病；损害，破坏
words.derivation: bl(暗淡) + ight → 使植物变暗枯萎 → 枯萎病/损害
words.example: Urban blight has affected many once-thriving neighborhoods in the city.
words.example_zh: 城市衰败影响了该市许多曾经繁荣的社区。
words.mnemonic: blight → bl(黑暗) + light(光) → 光被黑暗吞噬 → 枯萎/损害

words.meaning_en: lacking warmth or cheer; not hopeful; cold and bare
words.meaning_zh: 暗淡的，凄凉的，荒凉的
words.derivation: bl(暗淡) → 暗淡无光的 → 凄凉的
words.example: The economic outlook remains bleak for developing nations affected by the crisis.
words.example_zh: 受危机影响的发展中国家经济前景仍然暗淡。
words.mnemonic: bleak → bl(暗淡) +eak(像beak鸟嘴) → 寒风中孤零零的鸟嘴 → 凄凉荒凉

words.meaning_en: lacking strong features or characteristics; dull
words.meaning_zh: 平淡无奇的，乏味的
words.derivation: bl(模糊) + and → 模糊无特征的 → 平淡无奇的
words.example: Critics described the author's writing style as bland and lacking originality.
words.example_zh: 评论家称这位作者的写作风格平淡无奇，缺乏独创性。
words.mnemonic: bland → bl(暗淡) + and(和) → 什么都和稀泥 → 平淡无味的

words.meaning_en: to whiten by exposure to sunlight or chemicals; a whitening agent
words.meaning_zh: 漂白；漂白剂
words.derivation: bl(苍白) + each → 使变苍白 → 漂白
words.example: Coral bleaching occurs when rising ocean temperatures stress marine organisms.
words.example_zh: 当海洋温度升高对海洋生物造成压力时，就会发生珊瑚白化。
words.mnemonic: bleach → bl(苍白) + each(每个) → 让每个东西都变苍白 → 漂白

words.meaning_en: To hold someone responsible for a fault or wrong.
words.meaning_zh: v. 责备，归咎于；n. 责任
words.derivation: blame(责备) → 认为某人有过错 → 责备，归咎
words.example: Experts blame climate change for the increasing frequency of severe storms.
words.example_zh: 专家们将强烈风暴频率的增加归咎于气候变化。

words.meaning_en: A covering used for warmth or something that covers completely.
words.meaning_zh: n. 毯子；v. 覆盖；a. 全面的
words.derivation: blank(空白的，素色的) + -et(小) → 素色的覆盖物 → 毯子
