words.example: A blanket ban on plastic bags was implemented to reduce environmental pollution.
words.example_zh: 为了减少环境污染，实施了对塑料袋的全面禁令。

words.meaning_en: A violent explosion or a strong gust of wind or air.
words.meaning_zh: n. 爆炸，一阵强风；v. 炸毁
words.derivation: blast(爆炸) → 突然的强烈释放 → 爆炸，冲击波
words.example: The blast from the volcanic eruption destroyed buildings within a five-mile radius.
words.example_zh: 火山爆发的冲击波摧毁了方圆五英里内的建筑物。

words.meaning_en: A bright flame or fire that burns intensely.
words.meaning_zh: n. 火焰，烈火；v. 燃烧
words.derivation: blaz(火焰) → 明亮燃烧的火 → 烈火，燃烧
words.example: Firefighters worked through the night to control the blaze that threatened the forest.
words.example_zh: 消防员通宵工作以控制威胁森林的大火。

words.meaning_en: Burning fiercely or filled with bright light or color.
words.meaning_zh: a. 着火的，闪亮的；adv. 燃烧着
words.derivation: a(在...状态) + blaz(火焰) → 处于燃烧状态 → 着火的
words.example: The entire building was ablaze within minutes of the initial spark.
words.example_zh: 在最初的火花出现后几分钟内，整栋建筑就燃起了大火。

words.meaning_en: A symbol or design that represents a quality, group, or organization.
words.meaning_zh: n. 象征，徽章，标志
words.derivation: em(入) + blem(投射，显示) → 投射出的标志 → 象征，徽章
words.example: The eagle serves as an emblem of freedom and strength in many cultures.
words.example_zh: 鹰在许多文化中是自由和力量的象征。

words.meaning_en: To mix different substances or elements together smoothly.
words.meaning_zh: v. 混合，融合；n. 混合物
words.derivation: blend(混合) → 使不同物质结合 → 混合，融合
words.example: The architect designed a house that blends modern style with traditional elements.
words.example_zh: 建筑师设计了一座将现代风格与传统元素融合的房子。

words.meaning_en: To close and open the eyes quickly or to shine intermittently.
words.meaning_zh: v. 眨眼，闪烁；n. 眨眼，瞬间
words.derivation: bli(闪光，快速) → 快速开合 → 眨眼，闪烁
words.example: The computer cursor continues to blink while waiting for user input.
words.example_zh: 计算机光标在等待用户输入时不断闪烁。

words.meaning_en: A severe snowstorm with strong winds and poor visibility.
words.meaning_zh: n. 暴风雪，大风雪
words.derivation: bli(猛烈) + -zzard(暴风) → 猛烈的暴风雪 → 大风雪
words.example: The blizzard brought transportation to a halt and closed schools across the region.
words.example_zh: 暴风雪使交通陷入停顿，整个地区的学校都关闭了。

words.meaning_en: To produce flowers or to develop and flourish.
words.meaning_zh: n. 花，开花期；v. 开花，繁荣
words.derivation: blo(花，绽放) → 植物开花 → 开花，繁荣
words.example: Cherry trees bloom in early spring, covering the landscape with pink flowers.
words.example_zh: 樱桃树在早春开花，粉色的花朵覆盖了整个景观。

words.meaning_en: A flower or the state of flowering on a plant.
words.meaning_zh: n. 花，花朵；v. 开花，繁盛
words.derivation: blo(花) + -ssom(花朵) → 植物的花 → 花朵，开花
words.example: Apple trees are covered with white blossoms before producing fruit in the fall.
words.example_zh: 苹果树在秋天结果之前开满了白色的花朵。

words.meaning_en: A solid piece of material or an obstruction that prevents movement.
words.meaning_zh: n. 街区；木块；障碍物 v. 阻塞；封锁
words.derivation: block(块状物) → 成块的东西 → 街区/阻塞
words.example: The construction debris will block the entrance to the building.
words.example_zh: 建筑垃圾会堵塞大楼的入口。

words.meaning_en: To make something unclear or less distinct in appearance.
words.meaning_zh: v. 使模糊；弄脏 n. 模糊
words.derivation: blur(模糊的状态) → 使变得不清晰 → 使模糊
words.example: Tears began to blur her vision as she read the emotional letter.
words.example_zh: 当她读这封感人的信时，眼泪开始模糊了她的视线。

words.meaning_en: To become red in the face from embarrassment or shame.
words.meaning_zh: v. 脸红；羞愧 n. 脸红
words.derivation: blush(脸部发红) → 因羞愧而变红 → 脸红
words.example: She began to blush when everyone applauded her presentation.
words.example_zh: 当大家为她的演讲鼓掌时，她开始脸红了。

words.meaning_en: To speak loudly and aggressively, often with empty threats.
words.meaning_zh: v. 咆哮；恐吓 n. 狂风声；大话
words.derivation: bluster(猛烈吹刮) → 像风一样咆哮 → 大声恐吓
words.example: Despite his bluster, the manager rarely followed through on his threats.
words.example_zh: 尽管经理大声威胁，但他很少真正执行。

words.meaning_en: To say something suddenly and without thinking carefully.
words.meaning_zh: v. 脱口说出；冲口而出
words.derivation: blurt(突然说出) → 未经思考说出 → 脱口而出
words.example: He accidentally blurt out the secret during the casual conversation.
words.example_zh: 他在闲聊时不小心脱口说出了秘密。

words.meaning_en: A style of music or a feeling of sadness and melancholy.
words.meaning_zh: n. 布鲁斯音乐；忧郁；沮丧
words.derivation: blue(蓝色，忧郁) + s → 忧郁的情绪 → 布鲁斯/忧郁
words.example: After the exam results, many students had the blues for several days.
words.example_zh: 考试成绩出来后，许多学生沮丧了好几天。

words.meaning_en: To deceive someone by pretending to have strength or confidence.
words.meaning_zh: v. 虚张声势；欺骗 n. 悬崖；吓唬
words.derivation: bluff(吓唬) → 假装强大来欺骗 → 虚张声势
words.example: The poker player tried to bluff his opponents with a confident smile.
words.example_zh: 这位扑克玩家试图用自信的微笑来欺骗对手。

words.meaning_en: Having a dull edge or being direct in speech without subtlety.
words.meaning_zh: a. 钝的；直率的 v. 使变钝
words.derivation: blunt(不锋利) → 不尖锐 → 钝的/直率的
words.example: The professor's blunt criticism helped students improve their research methods.
words.example_zh: 教授直率的批评帮助学生改进了研究方法。

words.meaning_en: A flat piece of wood or a group of officials.
words.meaning_zh: n. 木板；董事会；膳食 v. 登上；寄宿
words.derivation: board(木板) → 平面的板 → 木板/董事会/登船
words.example: The board of directors will meet next week to discuss the merger.
words.example_zh: 董事会将于下周开会讨论合并事宜。

words.meaning_en: To talk with excessive pride about one's achievements or possessions.
words.meaning_zh: v. 吹嘘；自夸 n. 夸耀
words.derivation: boast(自我夸耀) → 过分炫耀 → 吹嘘
words.example: The company can boast an impressive record of customer satisfaction.
words.example_zh: 该公司可以自豪地宣称拥有令人印象深刻的客户满意度记录。

words.meaning_en: To represent an idea or quality in a visible or tangible form.
words.meaning_zh: v. 体现；具体表达；包含
words.derivation: em(使) + body(身体) → 使成为具体形式 → 体现
words.example: The new policy will embody the principles of equality and fairness.
words.example_zh: 新政策将体现平等和公平的原则。

meaning_en: words related to noise and rowdiness
meaning_zh: 与喧闹和吵嚷相关的词

words.meaning_en: noisy, energetic, and cheerful; rowdy
words.meaning_zh: 喧闹的，精力旺盛的
words.derivation: 源自中古英语 boistous(粗鲁的)
words.example: The boisterous crowd cheered loudly throughout the entire game.
words.example_zh: 喧闹的人群在整场比赛中大声欢呼。
words.mnemonic: boy(男孩) + sterous → 男孩子般吵闹的 → 喧闹的

words.meaning_en: tending to attract attention because of exuberance and confidence
words.meaning_zh: 炫耀的，华丽的
words.derivation: 源自法语 flamboyer(闪耀)，与flame(火焰)同源
words.example: The designer was known for her flamboyant style and bold color choices.
words.example_zh: 这位设计师以她华丽的风格和大胆的色彩选择而闻名。
words.mnemonic: flame(火焰) + boy + ant → 像火焰男孩一样耀眼 → 华丽的

words.meaning_en: Showing courage and willingness to take risks; confident and brave.
words.meaning_zh: a. 大胆的；勇敢的；粗体的
words.derivation: bold(勇敢) → 有勇气的 → 大胆的
words.example: The researcher made a bold claim that challenged conventional scientific wisdom.
words.example_zh: 这位研究员提出了一个大胆的主张，挑战了传统的科学观念。

words.breakdown: meta-(变化) + bol(投掷) + ic(形容词后缀)
words.meaning_en: Relating to the chemical processes that occur within living organisms.
words.meaning_zh: a. 新陈代谢的；变化的
words.derivation: meta(变化) + bol(投掷，改变) + ic → 化学变化的 → 新陈代谢的
words.example: Regular exercise can increase your metabolic rate and help with weight loss.
words.example_zh: 定期锻炼可以提高你的新陈代谢率，有助于减肥。

words.meaning_en: A mark or character representing an object, idea, or relationship.
words.meaning_zh: n. 符号；象征；标志
words.derivation: sym(共同) + bol(投掷，放在一起) → 放在一起的标记 → 符号
words.example: The dove is a universal symbol of peace and harmony.
words.example_zh: 鸽子是和平与和谐的普遍象征。

meaning_en: words related to support and undermining
meaning_zh: 与支持和破坏相关的词

words.meaning_en: to support or strengthen; to prop up
words.meaning_zh: 支持，加强
words.derivation: 源自古英语 bolster(长枕头) → 像枕头一样支撑 → 加强
words.example: The new evidence bolstered the prosecution's case.
words.example_zh: 新证据加强了控方的案件。
words.mnemonic: bowl(碗) + ster → 像碗一样托住 → 支撑

words.meaning_en: to erode the base or foundation of; to weaken gradually
words.meaning_zh: 暗中破坏，逐渐削弱
words.derivation: under(下面) + mine(挖) → 在下面挖掘 → 暗中破坏基础
words.example: Constant criticism can undermine a child's self-confidence.
words.example_zh: 不断的批评会削弱孩子的自信心。
words.mnemonic: under(下面) + mine(挖矿) → 在下面挖地基 → 暗中破坏

words.meaning_en: A situation that creates sudden wealth or good fortune.
words.meaning_zh: n. 富矿带；幸运；带来好运之事
words.derivation: bonanza(好天气，好运) → 带来财富的事 → 富矿/幸运
words.example: The discovery of oil proved to be a bonanza for the small nation.
words.example_zh: 石油的发现证明对这个小国来说是一笔意外之财。

words.meaning_en: Having prominent bones or consisting of bone; very thin.
words.meaning_zh: a. 多骨的；瘦骨嶙峋的；骨头般的
words.derivation: bon(骨头) + y → 像骨头的 → 多骨的/瘦的
words.example: The archaeologists carefully examined the bony remains found at the site.
words.example_zh: 考古学家仔细检查了在遗址发现的骨骼遗骸。

words.meaning_en: A connection or relationship between people or things that join together.
words.meaning_zh: n. 纽带；债券；契约 v. 结合；粘合
words.derivation: bond(绑定) → 连接在一起 → 纽带/债券
words.example: The shared experience helped form a strong bond between the teammates.
words.example_zh: 共同的经历帮助队友之间形成了牢固的纽带。

meaning_en: words related to bondage and servitude
meaning_zh: 与束缚和奴役相关的词

words.meaning_en: the state of being a slave or prisoner
words.meaning_zh: 束缚，奴役
words.derivation: bond(绑) + age(状态) → 被绑缚的状态 → 奴役
words.example: The civil rights movement fought to free people from the bondage of discrimination.
words.example_zh: 民权运动为将人们从歧视的枷锁中解放出来而奋斗。
words.mnemonic: bond(绑) + age(状态) → 被绑住的状态 → 束缚

words.meaning_en: a chain or manacle used to restrain a prisoner; to restrict
words.meaning_zh: 脚镣；束缚
words.derivation: 源自古英语 feter(脚镣)，与foot(脚)同源
words.example: Excessive regulations can fetter economic growth.
words.example_zh: 过多的法规会束缚经济增长。
words.mnemonic: feet(脚) + er → 脚上的东西 → 脚镣 → 束缚

words.meaning_en: to give the right to vote; to set free
words.meaning_zh: 给予选举权，解放
words.derivation: en(使) + franch(自由) + ise → 使获得自由 → 赋予权利
words.example: The 19th Amendment enfranchised women in the United States.
words.example_zh: 第十九修正案赋予了美国女性选举权。
words.mnemonic: en + French(法国) + ise → 法国大革命给予自由 → 解放

words.meaning_en: A period of rapid economic growth or a deep resonant sound.
words.meaning_zh: n. 繁荣；隆隆声 v. 迅速发展；发出隆隆声
words.derivation: boom(隆隆响) → 声势浩大 → 繁荣/隆隆声
words.example: The technology sector experienced a boom in the late 1990s.
words.example_zh: 科技行业在20世纪90年代末经历了一次繁荣。

words.meaning_en: To increase or improve something; to help or encourage.
words.meaning_zh: v. 促进；提高；推动 n. 推进；帮助
words.derivation: boost(向上推) → 使提高 → 促进/提高
words.example: The new marketing campaign will boost sales significantly this quarter.
words.example_zh: 新的营销活动将大幅提升本季度的销售额。

words.meaning_en: A benefit or advantage; something helpful that is welcomed.
words.meaning_zh: n. 恩惠；福利；优势
words.derivation: boon(恩赐) → 带来好处的事 → 恩惠
words.example: The new subway line proved to be a boon for commuters in the area.
words.example_zh: 新地铁线对该地区的通勤者来说是一大福利。

words.meaning_en: A sheltered port where ships can dock; to give shelter or refuge to.
words.meaning_zh:
n. 港口，避难所
v. 庇护，藏匿，(使)入港停泊
words.derivation: har(遮蔽) + bor(港湾) → 遮蔽的港湾 → 港口；庇护
words.example: The coastal town has a natural harbor that protects boats from storms.
words.example_zh: 这个海滨小镇有一个天然港口，可以保护船只免受风暴侵袭。

words.meaning_en: A large smooth rock, typically rounded by erosion or weathering.
words.meaning_zh: n. 大圆石，巨石
words.derivation: bould(膨胀的) + -er(名词后缀) → 膨大之物 → 大圆石
words.example: Massive boulders blocked the mountain trail after the landslide.
words.example_zh: 山体滑坡后，巨大的石块堵住了山间小径。

words.meaning_en: An attractively arranged bunch of flowers; the aroma of wine.
words.meaning_zh: n. 花束，芳香
words.derivation: bouqu(小树林) + -et(小) → 小树丛般的 → 花束
words.example: The bride carried a beautiful bouquet of white roses and lilies.
words.example_zh: 新娘手捧一束美丽的白玫瑰和百合花束。

words.meaning_en: Large in quantity; abundant and generous.
words.meaning_zh: a. 慷慨的，丰富的，充足的
words.derivation: bount(善良，慷慨) + -ful(充满) → 充满慷慨的 → 慷慨的；丰富的
words.example: The farmers celebrated a bountiful harvest after months of careful cultivation.
words.example_zh: 经过数月的精心耕作，农民们庆祝丰收。

words.meaning_en: To spring back from a surface after hitting it; rebound.
words.meaning_zh: n./v. 弹跳，反弹
words.derivation: bounc(弹跳) → 回弹 → 弹跳
words.example: The basketball will bounce higher if you inflate it properly.
words.example_zh: 如果你把篮球充气适当，它会弹得更高。

words.meaning_en: A line that marks the limits or edges of something.
words.meaning_zh: n. 边界，界限
words.derivation: bound(界限) + -ary(名词后缀) → 界限之处 → 边界
words.example: The river forms a natural boundary between the two countries.
words.example_zh: 这条河流构成了两国之间的天然边界。

words.meaning_en: Restricted or confined within limits; heading toward a destination.
words.meaning_zh:
a. 受约束的，一定的
v. 跳跃
n. 界限
words.derivation: bound(界限；跳跃) → 被限制的；跳跃 → 受约束的；跳
words.example: The train is bound for Chicago and will arrive in three hours.
words.example_zh: 这列火车开往芝加哥，三小时后到达。

words.meaning_en: A device that holds something firmly in position; to prepare for difficulty.
words.meaning_zh:
n. 支柱，支撑
v. 支撑，准备应对
words.derivation: brace(臂；支撑) → 用臂支撑 → 支柱；支撑
words.example: Engineers installed metal braces to strengthen the building's foundation.
words.example_zh: 工程师安装了金属支撑来加固建筑物的地基。

words.meaning_en: To hold someone closely in one's arms; to accept willingly.
words.meaning_zh: v./n. 拥抱，欣然接受
words.derivation: em-(进入) + brace(臂) → 进入双臂中 → 拥抱
words.example: Many companies are beginning to embrace new environmental policies.
words.example_zh: 许多公司开始欣然接受新的环保政策。

words.meaning_en: To interweave strands of hair or fabric into a pattern.
words.meaning_zh:
n. 辫子
v. 编成辫
words.derivation: braid(编织) → 编织成带状 → 辫子
words.example: She learned to braid her daughter's long hair into intricate patterns.
words.example_zh: 她学会了把女儿的长发编成复杂的辫子。

words.meaning_en: A type of product made by a particular company; a trademark.
words.meaning_zh:
n. 商标，品牌
v. 打烙印
words.derivation: brand(烙印) → 烙印标记 → 商标
words.example: This brand of smartphone is known for its innovative features and reliability.
words.example_zh: 这个品牌的智能手机以其创新功能和可靠性而闻名。

words.meaning_en: A yellow alloy of copper and zinc; boldness or confidence.
words.meaning_zh:
n. 黄铜，黄铜制品
a. 黄铜的
words.derivation: brass(黄铜) → 黄铜金属 → 黄铜
words.example: The antique door handle was made of polished brass.
words.example_zh: 这个古董门把手是用抛光黄铜制成的。

meaning_en: words related to courage and boldness
meaning_zh: 与勇气和胆量相关的词

words.meaning_en: a bold manner or show of boldness intended to impress (often false courage)
words.meaning_zh: 虚张声势，逞能
words.derivation: 源自西班牙语 bravada → 虚假的勇敢 → 虚张声势
words.example: His bravado concealed a deep fear of failure.
words.example_zh: 他的虚张声势掩盖了对失败的深深恐惧。
words.mnemonic: brave + ado → 做出勇敢的样子 → 虚张声势

words.meaning_en: fearless; adventurous
words.meaning_zh: 无畏的，勇猛的
words.derivation: in(不) + trepid(恐惧) → 不恐惧的 → 无畏的
words.example: The intrepid explorers ventured deep into the uncharted jungle.
words.example_zh: 无畏的探险家们深入了未知的丛林。
words.mnemonic: in(不) + trepid(害怕) → 不害怕的 → 勇猛的

words.meaning_en: brave; heroic; also, courteous and attentive to women
words.meaning_zh: 英勇的，勇敢的
words.derivation: 源自古法语 galant，意为欢乐的、英勇的
words.example: The gallant firefighter rescued three children from the burning building.
words.example_zh: 英勇的消防员从燃烧的大楼中救出了三个孩子。
words.mnemonic: gala(庆典) + nt → 庆典上的勇士 → 英勇的

words.meaning_en: A gentle wind; something easy to accomplish.
words.meaning_zh:
n. 微风，轻而易举的事
v. 轻松通过
words.derivation: breeze(吹风) → 轻轻吹的风 → 微风
words.example: A cool breeze made the hot summer afternoon more pleasant.
words.example_zh: 凉爽的微风使炎热的夏日午后变得更加宜人。

words.meaning_en: A gap or break in something; violation of a law or agreement.
words.meaning_zh:
n. 裂口，违反
v. 攻破，违反
words.derivation: breach(破裂) → 破开缺口 → 裂口；违反
words.example: The company was sued for breach of contract after failing to deliver goods.
words.example_zh: 该公司因未能交货而被起诉违反合同。

words.meaning_en: To separate into pieces; an interruption or pause in activity.
words.meaning_zh:
v. 打破，中断
n. 休息，间断
words.derivation: break(破裂) → 使破裂 → 打破
words.example: Students need a short break between classes to rest and recharge.
words.example_zh: 学生需要在课间休息片刻以恢复精力。

words.meaning_en: A sudden important discovery or development in a field.
words.meaning_zh: n. 突破，重大进展
words.derivation: break(突破) + through(穿过) → 突破阻碍 → 突破
words.example: Scientists announced a major breakthrough in cancer research this week.
words.example_zh: 科学家本周宣布在癌症研究方面取得重大突破。

words.meaning_en: Side by side and facing the same way; keeping up with current information.
words.meaning_zh: adv. 并肩地，并列地
words.derivation: a-(在) + breast(胸) → 胸对胸 → 并肩地
words.example: Managers must stay abreast of the latest developments in their industry.
words.example_zh: 管理者必须及时了解行业的最新发展。

words.meaning_en: The process of taking air into and expelling it from the lungs.
words.meaning_zh:
n. 呼吸
a. 呼吸的
words.derivation: breath(呼吸) + -ing(进行) → 进行呼吸 → 呼吸
words.example: Deep breathing exercises can help reduce stress and anxiety.
words.example_zh: 深呼吸练习可以帮助减轻压力和焦虑。

words.meaning_en: To produce offspring; a particular type or variety of animal.
words.meaning_zh:
v. 繁殖，养育
n. 品种
words.derivation: breed(繁殖) → 生育后代 → 繁殖；品种
words.example: Farmers carefully breed cattle to improve milk production and meat quality.
words.example_zh: 农民精心培育牛以提高牛奶产量和肉质。

words.meaning_en: Lasting only a short time; concise in expression.
words.meaning_zh:
a. 简短的，短暂的
n. 摘要
v. 作简报
words.derivation: brief(←brev 短) → 短的 → 简短的；摘要
words.example: The professor gave a brief summary of the main points before the exam.
words.example_zh: 教授在考试前简要总结了要点。

words.breakdown: ab-(加强意义) + brev(短) + -i-(-) + -ate(动词后缀)
words.meaning_en: To shorten a word or phrase by omitting letters or using initials.
words.meaning_zh: vt. 缩写，缩略，缩短
words.derivation: ab(加强) + brev(短) + ate(使) → 使变短 → 缩写
words.example: The professor asked students to abbreviate the long technical terms in their notes.
words.example_zh: 教授要求学生在笔记中缩写那些冗长的专业术语。

meaning_en: to make by fermentation or steeping

words.meaning_en: To make beer or tea by mixing, boiling, and fermentation.
words.meaning_zh: v. 酿造，冲泡；酝酿 n. 酿造的饮料
words.derivation: brew(酿造) → 通过发酵制作饮料 → 酿造
words.example: The company has been brewing quality beer for over a century.
words.example_zh: 这家公司酿造优质啤酒已有一个多世纪了。

words.meaning_en: Impossible to reconcile or overcome; unable to be bridged.
words.meaning_zh: a. 不能架桥的，不能逾越的，无法弥合的
words.derivation: un(不) + bridge(桥) + able(能够) → 不能架桥的 → 无法弥合的
words.example: The unbridgeable gap between their political views made compromise impossible.
words.example_zh: 他们政治观点之间无法弥合的鸿沟使得妥协变得不可能。

words.meaning_en: To make or become brighter, lighter, or more cheerful.
words.meaning_zh: v. 使变亮，使快活，变得活跃
words.derivation: bright(明亮) + en(使) → 使明亮 → 使变亮
words.example: A fresh coat of paint will brighten the room considerably.
words.example_zh: 刷一层新漆会让房间明亮许多。

words.meaning_en: Exceptionally clever, talented, or impressive; very bright and radiant.
words.meaning_zh: a. 光辉的，灿烂的，杰出的，有才气的
words.derivation: brilliant(发光) → 像光一样耀眼 → 杰出的
words.example: The scientist made a brilliant discovery that revolutionized the field.
words.example_zh: 这位科学家做出了一项杰出的发现，彻底改变了该领域。

words.meaning_en: Quick, energetic, and active in manner or movement.
words.meaning_zh: a. 轻快的，活泼的，兴隆的，凉爽的
words.derivation: brisk(快速) → 动作迅速有力 → 轻快的
words.example: They took a brisk walk through the park to get some exercise.
words.example_zh: 他们在公园里轻快地散步以做些锻炼。

words.meaning_en: A small book or magazine containing pictures and information about something.
words.meaning_zh: n. 小册子，手册
words.derivation: brochure(法语：缝订物) → 装订成册的小书 → 小册子
words.example: The travel agency provided a colorful brochure about vacation destinations.
words.example_zh: 旅行社提供了一本关于度假目的地的彩色小册子。

words.meaning_en: A yellowish-brown alloy of copper and tin; a reddish-brown color.
words.meaning_zh: n. 青铜，铜像，青铜色 a. 青铜色的
words.derivation: bronze(金属合金) → 铜锡合金 → 青铜
words.example: The museum displayed ancient bronze sculptures from the Roman period.
words.example_zh: 博物馆展出了古罗马时期的青铜雕塑。

words.meaning_en: To look through or glance at casually; to feed on leaves or grass.
words.meaning_zh: v. 浏览，吃草 n. 浏览，嫩叶
words.derivation: browse(吃嫩叶) → 像动物啃食般随意查看 → 浏览
words.example: Students can browse the library's extensive collection of academic journals online.
words.example_zh: 学生可以在线浏览图书馆广泛的学术期刊收藏。

words.meaning_en: A tool with bristles for cleaning or painting; to touch lightly in passing.
words.meaning_zh: n. 刷子，毛笔，刷洗 v. 刷，掠过
words.derivation: brush(刷毛工具) → 用刷子清洁 → 刷
words.example: The artist used a fine brush to add delicate details to the painting.
words.example_zh: 艺术家用一支细毛笔为画作添加精致的细节。

words.meaning_en: A male deer; an informal term for dollar; to resist or oppose.
words.meaning_zh: n. 雄鹿，美元 v. 反抗，抵制
words.derivation: buck(雄鹿) → 像雄鹿般跳跃反抗 → 反抗
words.example: The company decided to buck the trend and invest in traditional retail stores.
words.example_zh: 该公司决定逆势而行，投资传统零售店。

words.meaning_en: A fastener with a frame and prong; to bend or collapse under pressure.
words.meaning_zh: n. 扣子，带扣 v. 扣住，弯曲，屈服
words.derivation: buckle(扣环) → 扣环在压力下弯曲 → 弯曲
words.example: The intense pressure caused the metal beam to buckle during the test.
words.example_zh: 强烈的压力导致金属梁在测试中弯曲。

words.meaning_en: An estimate of income and expenditure for a set period of time.
words.meaning_zh: n. 预算，经费 v. 编预算 a. 廉价的
words.derivation: budget(钱袋) → 计划如何使用钱袋里的钱 → 预算
words.example: The government announced a new budget aimed at reducing the national deficit.
words.example_zh: 政府宣布了一项旨在减少国家赤字的新预算。

words.meaning_en: The mass or size of something large; the majority or greater part.
words.meaning_zh: n. 体积，大量，大部分 a. 大批的
words.derivation: bulk(大块) → 占据空间的大东西 → 体积
words.example: The bulk of the research was completed during the summer semester.
words.example_zh: 大部分研究工作在夏季学期完成。

words.meaning_en: A short official statement or broadcast summary of news.
words.meaning_zh: n. 公告，公报，布告，新闻快报
words.derivation: bulletin(官方文件) → 发布简短信息 → 公告
words.example: The university posts important announcements on the bulletin board near the entrance.
words.example_zh: 大学在入口附近的布告栏上张贴重要公告。

words.meaning_en: A rounded underground storage organ of plants; a light bulb.
words.meaning_zh: n. 球茎，鳞茎，电灯泡
words.derivation: bulb(球形物) → 球形的植物器官或灯具 → 球茎
words.example: Remember to replace the bulb in the desk lamp before the exam period.
words.example_zh: 记得在考试期间前更换台灯的灯泡。

words.meaning_en: A collection of things tied or wrapped together; to tie things together.
words.meaning_zh: n. 捆，束，包 v. 捆扎，匆忙打发
words.derivation: bund(捆绑) + le(小词缀) → 捆在一起的东西 → 捆
words.example: The merchant carried a bundle of newspapers under his arm.
words.example_zh: 商人腋下夹着一捆报纸。

words.meaning_en: To begin to grow or develop rapidly; to flourish.
words.meaning_zh: v. 萌芽，迅速发展 n. 嫩芽
words.derivation: burgeon(发芽) → 像植物发芽般快速生长 → 迅速发展
words.example: The technology industry began to burgeon in the late 1990s.
words.example_zh: 科技产业在20世纪90年代末开始迅速发展。

words.meaning_en: A hole or tunnel dug by an animal as a dwelling.
words.meaning_zh: n. 地洞，洞穴 v. 挖洞，钻入
words.derivation: burrow(挖洞) → 动物挖掘的藏身处 → 洞穴
words.example: Rabbits burrow underground to create safe nests for their young.
words.example_zh: 兔子在地下挖洞为幼兔建造安全的巢穴。

words.meaning_en: A government department or office; a desk with drawers.
words.meaning_zh: n. 局，办公处，办事处，衣柜
words.derivation: bureau(办公桌) → 使用办公桌的机构 → 办公处
words.example: The Federal Bureau of Investigation handles major criminal cases nationwide.
words.example_zh: 联邦调查局处理全国范围内的重大刑事案件。

words.meaning_en: A shrub or clump of shrubs with stems of moderate length.
words.meaning_zh: n. 灌木，矮树丛
words.derivation: bush(灌木) → 矮树丛
words.example: The explorers hid behind a large bush to observe the wildlife without being detected.
words.example_zh: 探险者躲在一大片灌木丛后面观察野生动物而不被发现。

words.meaning_en: A pale yellow edible fatty substance made by churning cream.
words.meaning_zh: n. 黄油，奶油
words.derivation: butter(黄油) → 奶油制品
words.example: She spread butter on her toast and added a thin layer of strawberry jam.
words.example_zh: 她在吐司上涂了黄油，并加了一层薄薄的草莓酱。

words.meaning_en: A thick rope of wire or hemp used for supporting or transmitting.
words.meaning_zh: n. 电缆，缆绳
words.derivation: cab(绳索) + le(名词后缀) → 粗绳 → 电缆
words.example: The construction crew used steel cables to support the suspension bridge.
words.example_zh: 施工人员使用钢缆来支撑悬索桥。

words.meaning_en: A cupboard with shelves or drawers for storing items or displaying objects.
words.meaning_zh: n. 橱柜，内阁
words.derivation: cabin(小房间) + et(小指后缀) → 小柜子 → 橱柜
words.example: The president met with his cabinet to discuss the new economic policy.
words.example_zh: 总统与他的内阁成员会面讨论新的经济政策。

words.meaning_en: A small shelter or house, typically made of wood.
words.meaning_zh: n. 小屋，客舱
words.derivation: cabin(小屋) → 简陋小房间 → 小屋
words.example: The family rented a cabin in the mountains for their summer vacation.
words.example_zh: 这家人在山里租了一间小屋度过暑假。

words.breakdown: de-(向下) + cad(降落) + -ent(形容词后缀)
words.meaning_en: Characterized by moral or cultural decline and excessive self-indulgence.
words.meaning_zh: a. 颓废的，堕落的
words.derivation: de(向下) + cad(降落) + ent(形容词后缀) → 向下降落的 → 衰微的
words.example: The novel portrayed the decadent lifestyle of the wealthy aristocrats before the revolution.
words.example_zh: 这部小说描绘了革命前富有贵族颓废的生活方式。

words.breakdown: calc(石子，计算) + -ul(名词后缀) + -ate(动词后缀)
words.meaning_en: To determine mathematically by using numbers or to estimate carefully.
words.meaning_zh: v. 计算，估计
words.derivation: calc(石子，计算) + ul + ate(动词后缀) → 用石子计数 → 计算
words.example: Scientists calculate that the asteroid will pass safely by Earth next month.
words.example_zh: 科学家计算出小行星将在下个月安全地从地球旁边经过。

words.meaning_en: A branch of mathematics dealing with rates of change and accumulation.
words.meaning_zh: n. 微积分
words.derivation: calc(石子，计算) + ulus(小指后缀) → 小石子计算 → 微积分
words.example: Students must complete calculus before they can enroll in advanced physics courses.
words.example_zh: 学生必须完成微积分课程才能注册高级物理课程。

words.breakdown: calc(石子，计算) + -ul(名词后缀) + -able(可...的)
words.meaning_en: Able to be measured or estimated by mathematical calculation.
words.meaning_zh: a. 可计算的
words.derivation: calc(石子，计算) + ul + able(可...的) → 可以计算的
words.example: The risk of investment in government bonds is calculable and relatively low.
words.example_zh: 投资政府债券的风险是可计算的，而且相对较低。

words.meaning_en: To remember or bring back to mind a past event or fact.
words.meaning_zh: v. 回忆，召回
words.derivation: re(再次) + call(叫喊) → 再次叫回 → 回忆，召回
words.example: I cannot recall the exact date when we first met at the conference.
words.example_zh: 我记不起我们第一次在会议上见面的确切日期了。

words.meaning_en: Not showing or feeling nervousness, anger, or strong emotion; peaceful.
words.meaning_zh: a. 平静的，冷静的
words.derivation: calm(平静) → 无风无浪的 → 平静的
words.example: The teacher remained calm despite the chaos in the classroom during the fire drill.
words.example_zh: 尽管消防演习期间教室里很混乱，老师仍然保持冷静。

meaning_en: words related to slander and defamation
meaning_zh: 与诽谤和中伤相关的词

words.meaning_en: to make false and defamatory statements about someone
words.meaning_zh: 诽谤，中伤
words.derivation: 源自拉丁语 calumnia，意为欺骗、诽谤
words.example: The politician calumniated his opponent with baseless accusations.
words.example_zh: 政客用毫无根据的指控诽谤对手。
words.mnemonic: column(柱) + ni + ate → 在柱子上刻坏话 → 诽谤

words.meaning_en: to speak or write about in an abusively disparaging manner
words.meaning_zh: 诋毁，诽谤
words.derivation: vil(卑鄙) + ify(使) → 使变得卑鄙 → 诋毁
words.example: The media vilified the company after the environmental scandal.
words.example_zh: 环境丑闻后，媒体诋毁了这家公司。
words.mnemonic: vile(卑鄙的) + fy → 使变得卑鄙 → 诋毁

words.meaning_en: the action of making false spoken statements damaging to a person's reputation
words.meaning_zh: 口头诽谤，中伤
words.derivation: 源自古法语 esclandre，意为丑闻
words.example: The actor sued the tabloid for slander.
words.example_zh: 那位演员因口头诽谤起诉了小报。
words.mnemonic: s + lander(着陆者) → 嘴巴着陆在别人名声上 → 诽谤

words.meaning_en: The grounds and buildings of a university or college.
words.meaning_zh: n. 校园
words.derivation: camp(场地) + us(名词后缀) → 学校场地 → 校园
words.example: The university campus includes a library, dormitories, and several academic buildings.
words.example_zh: 这所大学的校园包括一座图书馆、宿舍楼和几栋教学楼。

words.meaning_en: Disguise or concealment by blending with surroundings.
words.meaning_zh: n./v. 伪装，掩饰
words.derivation: camoufl(伪装) + age(名词后缀) → 伪装物 → 伪装
words.example: The soldiers wore camouflage uniforms to blend in with the forest environment.
words.example_zh: 士兵们穿着迷彩服以融入森林环境。

words.meaning_en: An organized course of action to achieve a particular goal.
words.meaning_zh: n. 运动，战役
words.derivation: camp(战场) + aign(名词后缀) → 野战行动 → 战役，运动
words.example: The environmental organization launched a campaign to reduce plastic waste in the ocean.
words.example_zh: 这个环保组织发起了一场减少海洋塑料垃圾的运动。

words.meaning_en: An artificial waterway constructed for navigation, irrigation, or drainage.
words.meaning_zh: n. 运河，水道
words.derivation: can(管道) + al(名词后缀) → 人工水道 → 运河
words.example: The Panama Canal connects the Atlantic and Pacific Oceans, facilitating international trade.
words.example_zh: 巴拿马运河连接大西洋和太平洋，促进国际贸易。

words.meaning_en: A deep gorge with steep sides, typically formed by river erosion.
words.meaning_zh: n. 峡谷
words.derivation: can(管道) + yon(后缀) → 深邃的管状地形 → 峡谷
words.example: The Grand Canyon is one of the most spectacular natural wonders in the United States.
words.example_zh: 大峡谷是美国最壮观的自然奇观之一。

words.meaning_en: The practice of eating the flesh of one's own species.
words.meaning_zh: n. 同类相食，食人行为
words.derivation: cannibal(食人者) + ism(行为后缀) → 食人的行为 → 同类相食
words.example: Anthropologists have studied instances of cannibalism in various ancient cultures.
words.example_zh: 人类学家研究了各种古代文化中同类相食的实例。

words.meaning_en: A covering, typically of fabric, suspended above something.
words.meaning_zh: n. 天篷，树冠
words.derivation: can(覆盖) + opy(后缀) → 遮盖物 → 天篷
words.example: The rainforest canopy is home to countless species of birds and insects.
words.example_zh: 雨林的树冠层是无数鸟类和昆虫物种的家园。

words.meaning_en: To solicit votes or opinions from people systematically.
words.meaning_zh: v. 游说，拉选票
words.derivation: canv(彻底) + ass(后缀) → 彻底调查 → 游说
words.example: Volunteers canvass door-to-door to gather support for the local candidate.
words.example_zh: 志愿者挨家挨户游说以争取对当地候选人的支持。

words.meaning_en: A strong, coarse cloth used for making items like tents and sails.
words.meaning_zh: n. 帆布，画布
words.derivation: canv(麻布) + as(后缀) → 粗布 → 帆布
words.example: The artist stretched a fresh canvas across the wooden frame before beginning the painting.
words.example_zh: 艺术家在开始绘画前把一块新画布绷在木框上。

words.meaning_en: A narrow boat propelled by paddles, often made from a hollowed log.
words.meaning_zh: n. 独木舟，轻舟；vi. 乘独木舟；vt. 用独木舟运
words.derivation: canoe(独木舟) → 一种小型轻便的船只
words.example: The explorers paddled their canoe down the river to reach the remote village.
words.example_zh: 探险者们划着独木舟顺河而下，到达了偏远的村庄。

meaning_zh: 格子，交叉删除（源自拉丁语）

words.meaning_en: To decide that something planned will not happen or be valid.
words.meaning_zh: vt. 取消，删去，抵销；n. 取消
words.derivation: cancel(交叉删除) → 用交叉线划掉 → 取消
words.example: The airline had to cancel several flights due to the severe weather conditions.
words.example_zh: 由于恶劣的天气条件，航空公司不得不取消了几个航班。

words.meaning_en: Truthful and straightforward; frank and honest in expression.
words.meaning_zh: a. 坦白的，率直的，公正的
words.derivation: cand(白色，纯净) + id(形容词后缀) → 纯净的，无隐瞒的 → 坦白的
words.example: The politician gave a candid interview about the challenges facing his campaign.
words.example_zh: 这位政治家坦率地接受了采访，谈论了他竞选活动面临的挑战。

words.breakdown: in-(加强) + cand-(发光) + -escent(逐渐变成…的)
words.meaning_en: emitting light as a result of being heated; brilliant
words.meaning_zh: 白热化的，光辉灿烂的
words.derivation: in(加强) + cand(发光) + escent(逐渐…的) → 逐渐发出强光 → 白热化的
words.example: The incandescent bulbs were gradually replaced by energy-efficient LEDs.
words.example_zh: 白炽灯泡逐渐被节能LED灯取代。

words.meaning_en: the quality of being open and honest; frankness
words.meaning_zh: 坦率，直率
words.derivation: cand(白/光) + or(性质) → 像白光一样透明 → 坦率
words.example: The scientist's candor about the limitations of the study earned respect from peers.
words.example_zh: 这位科学家对研究局限性的坦率态度赢得了同行的尊重。

words.meaning_en: a person who applies for a job or is nominated for election
words.meaning_zh: 候选人，申请人
words.derivation: cand(白) + id + ate → 穿白色长袍的人（古罗马竞选者）→ 候选人
words.example: Several qualified candidates applied for the doctoral fellowship.
words.example_zh: 几位合格的候选人申请了博士奖学金。

words.meaning_en: A sleeveless cloak or a point of land extending into water.
words.meaning_zh: n. 海角，岬；披肩，斗篷
words.derivation: cap(头部，顶端) → 陆地伸入海中的顶端 → 海角；覆盖头部的衣物 → 披肩
words.example: The ship rounded the cape and sailed into calmer waters.
words.example_zh: 船只绕过海角，驶入了更平静的水域。

words.meaning_en: tending to find fault; difficult to please
words.meaning_zh: 吹毛求疵的，挑剔的
words.derivation: capt(抓) + ious(…的) → 爱抓毛病的 → 吹毛求疵的
words.example: The captious critic found something to complain about in every performance.
words.example_zh: 那个吹毛求疵的评论家在每场演出中都能找到可抱怨的地方。

words.meaning_en: to attract and hold the attention or interest of
words.meaning_zh: 迷住，吸引
words.derivation: capt(抓) + ivate(使) → 使被抓住注意力 → 迷住
words.example: The speaker captivated the audience with her powerful storytelling.
words.example_zh: 演讲者以她有力的叙述吸引了观众。

words.meaning_en: to cease to resist; to surrender
words.meaning_zh: 屈服，投降
words.derivation: capit(头/条款) + ulate → 按条款投降 → 屈服
words.example: After months of pressure, the company capitulated to the union's demands.
words.example_zh: 在数月的压力下，公司对工会的要求做出了让步。

words.meaning_en: A profession or occupation chosen as one's life work.
words.meaning_zh: n. 事业，职业，生涯
words.derivation: car(跑道，奔跑) + eer(名词后缀) → 人生奔跑的道路 → 职业生涯
words.example: She decided to pursue a career in medicine after volunteering at a hospital.
words.example_zh: 在医院做志愿者后，她决定从事医学职业。

words.meaning_en: Goods carried by a ship, aircraft, or vehicle.
words.meaning_zh: n. 货物，船货
words.derivation: car(车辆，运载工具) + go(装载) → 运输工具上装载的物品 → 货物
words.example: The ship's cargo included electronics, textiles, and agricultural products.
words.example_zh: 这艘船的货物包括电子产品、纺织品和农产品。

words.meaning_en: The provision of attention or concern for someone or something.
words.meaning_zh: n. 小心，照料，忧虑；vi. 关心，介意
words.derivation: care(关心，忧虑) → 对某人或某事的关注 → 照料
words.example: The nurses provided excellent care to all the patients in the hospital.
words.example_zh: 护士们为医院里的所有病人提供了优质的照护。

words.meaning_en: Relating to the heart or heart disease.
words.meaning_zh: a. 心脏的；n. 心脏病患者
words.derivation: cardi(心脏) + ac(形容词后缀) → 与心脏有关的
words.example: The patient was rushed to the emergency room after suffering cardiac arrest.
words.example_zh: 患者心脏骤停后被紧急送往急诊室。

words.meaning_en: Firm, flexible connective tissue found in various parts of the body.
words.meaning_zh: n. 软骨
words.derivation: cartil(软骨) + age(名词后缀) → 软骨组织
words.example: The cartilage in his knee was damaged during the football game.
words.example_zh: 他的膝盖软骨在足球比赛中受伤了。

words.meaning_en: A large North American reindeer with branching antlers.
words.meaning_zh: n. 北美驯鹿
words.derivation: caribou(北美驯鹿) → 源自美洲原住民语言 → 一种大型鹿科动物
words.example: The caribou migrate thousands of miles each year across the Arctic tundra.
words.example_zh: 驯鹿每年在北极冻原上迁徙数千英里。

words.meaning_en: A chemical element that forms the basis of organic compounds.
words.meaning_zh: n. 碳，碳元素
words.derivation: carb(煤炭) + on(名词后缀) → 煤炭中的主要元素 → 碳
words.example: Carbon dioxide emissions contribute significantly to global warming.
words.example_zh: 二氧化碳排放对全球变暖有重大影响。

words.meaning_en: To get rid of something as no longer useful or desirable.
words.meaning_zh: vt. 丢弃，抛弃；n. 被抛弃的东西
words.derivation: dis(分离) + card(卡片) → 把卡片扔掉 → 丢弃
words.example: Please discard any food items that have passed their expiration date.
words.example_zh: 请丢弃所有已过期的食品。

words.meaning_en: of the greatest importance; fundamental
words.meaning_zh: 最重要的，基本的
words.derivation: card(核心) + inal(…的) → 核心的 → 最重要的
words.example: Trust is a cardinal principle in any successful relationship.
words.example_zh: 信任是任何成功关系中最基本的原则。

words.meaning_en: warm and friendly
words.meaning_zh: 亲切的，热忱的
words.derivation: cord(心) + ial(…的) → 发自内心的 → 亲切的
words.example: Despite their disagreements, the two leaders maintained a cordial relationship.
words.example_zh: 尽管存在分歧，两位领导人保持了友好的关系。

words.meaning_en: agreement or harmony between people or groups
words.meaning_zh: 和谐，一致
words.derivation: con(共同) + cord(心) → 心在一起 → 和谐
words.example: The treaty established a lasting concord between the two nations.
words.example_zh: 该条约在两国之间建立了持久的和谐关系。

words.meaning_en: disagreement between people; lack of harmony
words.meaning_zh: 不和，纷争
words.derivation: dis(分开) + cord(心) → 心分离 → 不和
words.example: Discord among team members can undermine a project's success.
words.example_zh: 团队成员之间的不和会破坏项目的成功。

words.meaning_en: the killing of a large number of people
words.meaning_zh: 大屠杀，残杀
words.derivation: carn(肉) + age(行为) → 变成肉的行为 → 大屠杀
words.example: The battlefield was a scene of terrible carnage.
words.example_zh: 战场上一片惨烈的杀戮景象。

words.meaning_en: relating to physical, especially sexual, needs and activities
words.meaning_zh: 肉体的，肉欲的
words.derivation: carn(肉) + al(…的) → 肉体的
words.example: The novel explored both spiritual and carnal desires.
words.example_zh: 这部小说探讨了精神和肉体的欲望。

words.breakdown: re-(再) + in-(进入) + carn-(肉) + -ate(动词后缀)
words.meaning_en: to be born again in another body
words.meaning_zh: 转世，再生
words.derivation: re(再) + in(进入) + carn(肉) + ate → 再次进入肉体 → 转世
words.example: Some religions believe that the soul is reincarnated after death.
words.example_zh: 一些宗教相信灵魂在死后会转世。

words.meaning_en: An animal that feeds on flesh or meat.
words.meaning_zh: n. 食肉动物
words.derivation: carni(肉) + vor(吃) + e → 吃肉的动物 → 食肉动物
words.example: Lions are carnivores that hunt large prey animals on the African savanna.
words.example_zh: 狮子是食肉动物，在非洲大草原上捕猎大型猎物。

words.meaning_en: A wheeled vehicle used for transporting goods or people.
words.meaning_zh: n. 手推车，运货马车；vt. 用车装载
words.derivation: cart(车) → 用于运输的带轮工具 → 手推车
words.example: The farmer loaded hay onto the cart to transport it to the barn.
words.example_zh: 农夫把干草装上马车，运往谷仓。

words.meaning_en: To cut or shape a hard material to create an object.
words.meaning_zh: v. 雕刻，切开
words.derivation: carv(切割) + e → 切割材料以制作物品 → 雕刻
words.example: The sculptor used special tools to carve intricate details into the marble statue.
words.example_zh: 雕塑家用特殊工具在大理石雕像上雕刻精美的细节。

words.meaning_en: Happening by chance or without definite intention; relaxed and informal.
words.meaning_zh: a. 偶然的，随便的，非正式的
words.derivation: cas(降临，发生) + ual(形容词后缀) → 偶然降临的 → 偶然的
words.example: The office has a casual dress code on Fridays, allowing employees to wear jeans.
words.example_zh: 办公室在周五实行便装着装规定，允许员工穿牛仔裤。

words.breakdown: oc-(向) + cas(降，发生) + -ion(名词后缀) + -al(形容词后缀)
words.meaning_en: Occurring from time to time but not regularly or frequently.
words.meaning_zh: a. 偶然的，偶尔的，临时的
words.derivation: oc(向) + cas(降临) + ion + al → 偶然降临的 → 偶尔的
words.example: She makes occasional trips to the city to visit her relatives.
words.example_zh: 她偶尔去城里探望亲戚。

words.meaning_en: A waterfall or series of waterfalls; a process of falling or flowing.
words.meaning_zh: n. 小瀑布，瀑布状物；vi. 成瀑布落下
words.derivation: cas(落下) + cade(落下) → 水流连续落下 → 瀑布
words.example: The water formed a beautiful cascade as it flowed down the rocky mountainside.
words.example_zh: 水流沿着多岩的山坡流下，形成了美丽的瀑布。

words.meaning_zh: n. 意外事故, 伤亡, 受害者\n[化] 事故
words.derivation: 见(上) + ty(名词后缀) → 意外事故

words.meaning_en: To enclose or cover something completely in a protective material.
words.meaning_zh: vt. 把...装入箱内，包住
words.derivation: en(使进入) + case(箱子) → 使进入箱子 → 包装，包住
words.example: The fragile artifact was encased in glass to protect it from damage.
words.example_zh: 这件易碎的文物被装在玻璃罩里以防损坏。

words.meaning_en: A person who handles payments and receipts in a store or bank.
words.meaning_zh: n. 出纳员，收银员
words.derivation: cash(现金) + -ier(表示人) → 处理现金的人 → 出纳员
words.example: The cashier scanned all my items and told me the total price.
words.example_zh: 收银员扫描了我所有的商品并告诉我总价。

words.meaning_en: A small plastic container holding magnetic tape for audio or video recording.
words.meaning_zh: n. 盒式磁带，卡带
words.derivation: cass(盒子) + -ette(小) → 小盒子 → 盒式磁带
words.example: My father still has a collection of old music cassettes from the 1980s.
words.example_zh: 我父亲还保留着一些20世纪80年代的旧音乐磁带。

words.meaning_en: A prediction or estimate of future events, especially weather conditions.
words.meaning_zh: n./v. 预测，预报
words.derivation: fore-(预先) + cast(投掷) → 预先投出 → 预测
words.example: The weather forecast predicts heavy rain for the weekend.
words.example_zh: 天气预报预测周末将有大雨。

words.meaning_en: To transmit a program or information by radio or television.
words.meaning_zh: v./n. 广播，播送
words.derivation: broad(广泛的) + cast(投掷) → 广泛投出 → 广播
words.example: The documentary will be broadcast on national television tonight.
words.example_zh: 这部纪录片将于今晚在国家电视台播出。

words.meaning_en: To throw something or to assign roles to actors in a play.
words.meaning_zh: v. 投掷，选派角色 n. 演员阵容
words.derivation: cast(投掷) → 投出，分配角色
words.example: The director will cast the leading role next week.
words.example_zh: 导演将在下周选定主角。

words.meaning_en: to rebuke or reprimand severely
words.meaning_zh: 严厉批评，惩罚
words.derivation: chast(纠正) + ise(使) → 使被纠正 → 严厉批评
words.example: The coach chastised the players for their lack of effort.
words.example_zh: 教练严厉批评了球员们不够努力。

words.meaning_en: to reprimand someone severely
words.meaning_zh: 严厉斥责，惩罚
words.derivation: cast(纠正) + igate(使) → 使被纠正 → 严厉斥责
words.example: The editorial castigated the government for its failure to act.
words.example_zh: 社论严厉斥责政府未能采取行动。

words.meaning_en: abstaining from extramarital or immoral sexual intercourse; pure
words.meaning_zh: 贞洁的，纯洁的
words.derivation: 源自拉丁语 castus，意为纯洁的
words.example: The novel portrays a chaste and virtuous heroine.
words.example_zh: 这部小说描绘了一位纯洁而贤淑的女主人公。

words.meaning_en: The larva of a butterfly or moth, typically having a segmented body.
words.meaning_zh: n. 毛虫，履带
words.derivation: cater(毛茸茸的) + pillar(柱状物) → 毛茸茸的柱状物 → 毛虫
words.example: The caterpillar will eventually transform into a beautiful butterfly.
words.example_zh: 毛虫最终会变成美丽的蝴蝶。

words.meaning_en: A substance that increases the rate of a chemical reaction or an agent of change.
words.meaning_zh: n. 催化剂，促进因素
words.derivation: cata-(向下) + lyst(松开) → 使分解加速 → 催化剂
words.example: The new policy served as a catalyst for economic reform.
words.example_zh: 新政策成为经济改革的催化剂。

words.meaning_en: a large-scale and violent event; a sudden and dramatic upheaval
words.meaning_zh: 大灾难，剧变
words.derivation: cata(向下) + clysm(冲洗) → 向下冲刷 → 大灾难
words.example: The eruption of Vesuvius was a cataclysm that destroyed the city of Pompeii.
words.example_zh: 维苏威火山的喷发是一场摧毁庞贝城的大灾难。

words.meaning_en: an event causing great and often sudden damage or suffering
words.meaning_zh: 灾难，大祸
words.derivation: cata(向下) + strophe(转) → 向下转折 → 灾难
words.example: The oil spill was an environmental catastrophe for the coastal region.
words.example_zh: 石油泄漏对沿海地区来说是一场环境灾难。

words.meaning_en: an event causing great and often sudden damage or distress
words.meaning_zh: 灾难，不幸
words.derivation: 源自拉丁语 calamitas，意为损害、灾难
words.example: The earthquake was the worst calamity to strike the region in decades.
words.example_zh: 这次地震是该地区几十年来遭受的最严重的灾难。

words.meaning_zh: n. 种类, 类项\n[计] 分类

words.meaning_en: To place into a particular class or group based on shared characteristics.
words.meaning_zh: v. 分类，归类
words.derivation: categor(分类) + -ize(使成为) → 使成为某一类 → 分类
words.example: Scientists categorize animals according to their biological characteristics.
words.example_zh: 科学家根据生物特征对动物进行分类。

words.meaning_en: To provide food and service or to satisfy a particular need or demand.
words.meaning_zh: v. 提供饮食服务，迎合
words.derivation: cater(购买食物) → 提供饮食 → 迎合需求
words.example: The restaurant caters to customers with various dietary requirements.
words.example_zh: 这家餐厅迎合有各种饮食需求的顾客。

words.meaning_en: Relating to or acting as a cause; involving causation.
words.meaning_zh: a. 因果关系的，原因的
words.derivation: caus(原因) + -al(形容词后缀) → 与原因有关的 → 因果的
words.example: Researchers are investigating the causal relationship between diet and disease.
words.example_zh: 研究人员正在调查饮食与疾病之间的因果关系。

words.meaning_en: Showing care and thought, especially to avoid danger or mistakes.
words.meaning_zh: a. 谨慎的，小心的
words.derivation: caut(小心) + -ious(充满) → 充满小心的 → 谨慎的
words.example: Investors should be cautious when dealing with unfamiliar markets.
words.example_zh: 投资者在处理不熟悉的市场时应该谨慎。

words.breakdown: pre-(预先) + caut(小心) + -ion(名词后缀) + -ary(形容词后缀)
words.meaning_en: Done as a measure taken in advance to prevent something dangerous or unpleasant.
words.meaning_zh: a. 预防的，预先警戒的
words.derivation: pre-(预先) + caut(小心) + -ionary(形容词后缀) → 预先小心的 → 预防的
words.example: The government took precautionary measures to prevent the spread of the disease.
words.example_zh: 政府采取了预防措施以防止疾病传播。

words.meaning_en: To dig out material from the ground; to uncover by digging.
words.meaning_zh: v. 挖掘，发掘
words.derivation: ex-(向外) + cav(洞，挖空) + -ate(使) → 使成为空洞 → 挖掘
words.example: Archaeologists excavate ancient sites to learn about past civilizations.
words.example_zh: 考古学家挖掘古代遗址以了解过去的文明。

words.meaning_en: An empty space within a solid object, especially in a tooth.
words.meaning_zh: n. 洞，腔，蛀牙
words.derivation: cav(洞) + -ity(名词后缀) → 洞穴，空腔
words.example: The dentist found a cavity in my molar during the checkup.
words.example_zh: 牙医在检查时发现我的臼齿有个蛀洞。

words.meaning_en: The action of excavating or the site where excavating is done.
words.meaning_zh: n. 挖掘，发掘，挖掘的洞穴
words.derivation: ex-(向外) + cav(洞) + -ation(行为) → 向外挖洞的行为 → 挖掘
words.example: The excavation of the ancient temple revealed valuable historical artifacts.
words.example_zh: 对古庙的挖掘发现了珍贵的历史文物。

words.meaning_en: A large cave or a large chamber in a cave.
words.meaning_zh: n. 大洞穴，巨穴
words.derivation: cav(洞) + -ern(名词后缀) → 洞穴 → 大洞穴
words.example: Explorers discovered a vast cavern deep beneath the mountain.
words.example_zh: 探险者在山下深处发现了一个巨大的洞穴。

words.meaning_en: To rot or decompose through natural processes or to decline in quality.
words.meaning_zh: v./n. 腐烂，衰退
words.derivation: de-(向下) + cay(落下) → 向下落下 → 腐烂，衰退
words.example: Without proper maintenance, the old building began to decay rapidly.
words.example_zh: 没有适当的维护，这座老建筑开始迅速衰败。

words.meaning_en: A powdery substance that hardens when mixed with water, used in construction.
words.meaning_zh: n. 水泥，胶结剂 v. 巩固
words.derivation: ce(切碎的石头) + -ment(材料) → 碎石胶合材料 → 水泥
words.example: Workers mixed cement with sand and water to make concrete.
words.example_zh: 工人们将水泥与沙子和水混合制成混凝土。

words.meaning_en: To hide something or keep it secret from others.
words.meaning_zh: v. 隐藏，掩盖，隐瞒
words.derivation: con-(完全) + ceal(隐藏) → 完全隐藏 → 隐瞒
words.example: The witness tried to conceal important information from the police.
words.example_zh: 证人试图向警方隐瞒重要信息。

words.meaning_en: To stop or come to an end.
words.meaning_zh: v. 停止，终止；n. 停止
words.derivation: ceas(停止) → 停止
words.example: The company will cease operations at the end of the month due to financial difficulties.
words.example_zh: 由于财务困难，该公司将在月底停止运营。

words.meaning_en: To move back or away from a previous position.
words.meaning_zh: vi. 后退，减弱，降低
words.derivation: re(向后) + ced(行走) → 向后行走 → 后退
words.example: As the flood waters began to recede, residents could finally return to their homes.
words.example_zh: 随着洪水开始退去，居民们终于可以返回家园。

words.breakdown: re-(向后) + cess(行走) + -ion(名词后缀)
words.meaning_en: A period of temporary economic decline during which trade and industrial activity decrease.
words.meaning_zh: n. 衰退，经济萧条，后退
words.derivation: re(向后) + cess(行走) + ion(名词后缀) → 向后退的状态 → 衰退
words.example: Many businesses closed during the economic recession of 2008.
words.example_zh: 许多企业在2008年的经济衰退期间倒闭。

words.breakdown: pro-(向前) + ced(行走) + -ure(名词后缀)
words.meaning_en: An established or official way of doing something.
words.meaning_zh: n. 程序，步骤，手续
words.derivation: pro(向前) + ced(行走) + ure(名词后缀) → 向前进行的方式 → 程序
words.example: All employees must follow the safety procedure when operating heavy machinery.
words.example_zh: 所有员工在操作重型机械时必须遵守安全程序。

words.meaning_en: A temporary break from work or activity, or a recessed space.
words.meaning_zh: n. 休息，课间休息，凹处；vi. 休息
words.derivation: re(向后) + cess(行走) → 退回去 → 休息
words.example: The children played outside during their morning recess.
words.example_zh: 孩子们在上午的课间休息时间在外面玩耍。

words.breakdown: re-(向后) + cess(行走) + -ive(形容词后缀)
words.meaning_en: Tending to recede or characterized by recession, especially genetically.
words.meaning_zh: a. 后退的，隐性的；n. 隐性基因
words.derivation: re(向后) + cess(行走) + ive(形容词后缀) → 后退的 → 隐性的
words.example: Blue eyes are a recessive trait that requires two copies of the gene.
words.example_zh: 蓝眼睛是一种隐性特征，需要两个基因副本。

words.meaning_en: the formal giving up of rights, property, or territory
words.meaning_zh: 割让，转让
words.derivation: cess(让步) + ion(行为) → 让步的行为 → 割让
words.example: The treaty required the cession of territory to the victorious nation.
words.example_zh: 该条约要求向战胜国割让领土。

words.meaning_en: to admit that something is true after first denying it; to yield
words.meaning_zh: 承认，让步
words.derivation: con(完全) + cede(让步) → 完全让步 → 承认
words.example: The candidate conceded the election after the final votes were counted.
words.example_zh: 最终计票后，候选人承认了选举失败。

words.meaning_en: to withdraw formally from membership in an organization or alliance
words.meaning_zh: 退出，脱离
words.derivation: se(分开) + cede(走) → 分开走 → 退出
words.example: Several southern states attempted to secede from the Union.
words.example_zh: 几个南方州试图脱离联邦。

words.meaning_en: to intervene on behalf of another
words.meaning_zh: 调解，求情
words.derivation: inter(之间) + cede(走) → 走到中间 → 调解
words.example: The teacher interceded when the argument between students became heated.
words.example_zh: 当学生之间的争论变得激烈时，老师出面调解。

words.meaning_en: to agree to a demand, request, or treaty
words.meaning_zh: 同意，加入
words.derivation: ac(朝向) + cede(让步) → 朝着让步方向走 → 同意
words.example: The government acceded to the protesters' demands for reform.
words.example_zh: 政府同意了抗议者的改革要求。

words.meaning_en: To go beyond a limit or surpass.
words.meaning_zh: vt. 超过，超越，胜过
words.derivation: ex(向外) + ceed(行走) → 走出界限 → 超过
words.example: The final cost of the project exceeded the original budget by 20 percent.
words.example_zh: 该项目的最终成本超出原预算的20%。

words.meaning_en: To continue with an action or process.
words.meaning_zh: vi. 继续进行，着手，开始
words.derivation: pro(向前) + ceed(行走) → 向前行走 → 继续进行
words.example: After the brief interruption, the speaker proceeded with her presentation.
words.example_zh: 短暂中断后，演讲者继续她的演讲。

words.meaning_en: An amount that is more than necessary or permitted.
words.meaning_zh: n. 过量，超额，过度；a. 额外的，过量的
words.derivation: ex(向外) + cess(行走) → 走出界限 → 过度
words.example: The excess inventory must be sold at a discount to clear warehouse space.
words.example_zh: 多余的库存必须打折出售以清理仓库空间。

words.breakdown: suc-(在下) + cess(行走) + -ive(形容词后缀)
words.meaning_en: Following one after another without interruption.
words.meaning_zh: a. 连续的，相继的
words.derivation: suc(在下) + cess(行走) + ive(形容词后缀) → 接着走 → 连续的
words.example: The team won three successive championships, establishing a new record.
words.example_zh: 该队连续赢得三次冠军，创造了新纪录。

words.meaning_en: Excessive pride in oneself or one's achievements.
words.meaning_zh: n. 自负，自大，狂妄
words.derivation: con(完全) + ceit(拿，取) → 完全拿住自己 → 自负
words.example: His conceit prevented him from accepting constructive criticism from colleagues.
words.example_zh: 他的自负使他无法接受同事的建设性批评。

words.meaning_en: Guilty of or involving deceit; deliberately misleading.
words.meaning_zh: a. 欺诈的，不诚实的
words.derivation: de(离开) + ceit(拿，取) + ful(充满的) → 从真相拿走 → 欺诈的
words.example: The deceitful salesman made false promises about the product's capabilities.
words.example_zh: 这个欺诈的推销员对产品性能做出虚假承诺。

words.meaning_en: To become aware of or interpret through the senses.
words.meaning_zh: vt. 感知，察觉，理解
words.derivation: per(完全) + ceive(拿，取) → 完全拿到 → 感知
words.example: Students may perceive the same lecture differently based on their background knowledge.
words.example_zh: 学生可能会根据其背景知识对同一讲座有不同的理解。

words.meaning_en: To cause someone to believe something that is not true.
words.meaning_zh: v. 欺骗，蒙骗
words.derivation: de(离开) + ceive(拿，取) → 从真相拿走 → 欺骗
words.example: The magician's skill allowed him to deceive the entire audience with his illusions.
words.example_zh: 魔术师的技巧使他能够用幻觉欺骗整个观众。

words.meaning_en: Capable of being imagined or understood.
words.meaning_zh: a. 可想象的，可理解的
words.derivation: con(共同) + ceiv(拿，取) + able(能够的) → 能够拿到一起 → 可想象的
words.example: It is conceivable that humans will establish colonies on Mars within this century.
words.example_zh: 可以想象，人类将在本世纪内在火星上建立殖民地。

words.meaning_en: To form or devise an idea or plan in the mind.
words.meaning_zh: vt. 构思，想象，怀孕；vi. 怀孕
words.derivation: con(共同) + ceive(拿，取) → 把想法拿到一起 → 构思
words.example: The architect conceived a revolutionary design that would change urban planning.
words.example_zh: 建筑师构思了一个将改变城市规划的革命性设计。

words.meaning_en: A person or device that receives something.
words.meaning_zh: n. 接收者，接收器，收信机
words.derivation: re(回) + ceiv(拿，取) + er(者) → 拿回来的人 → 接收者
words.example: The radio receiver picked up signals from stations hundreds of miles away.
words.example_zh: 无线电接收器接收到数百英里外电台的信号。

words.meaning_en: Relating to the sky or heavens.
words.meaning_zh: a. 天空的，天国的，天体的
words.derivation: celest(天空) + ial(形容词后缀) → 天空的
words.example: Astronomers study celestial bodies such as stars, planets, and galaxies.
words.example_zh: 天文学家研究诸如恒星、行星和星系等天体。

words.meaning_en: A person who plays the cello.
words.meaning_zh: n. 大提琴演奏家
words.derivation: cell(大提琴) + ist(从事…的人) → 大提琴演奏家
words.example: The cellist performed a beautiful solo during the orchestra's concert.
words.example_zh: 在管弦乐队的音乐会上，大提琴手演奏了一段优美的独奏。

words.meaning_en: To observe a day or event with festivities or ceremony.
words.meaning_zh: v. 庆祝，庆贺，举行
words.derivation: celebr(荣誉) + ate(动词后缀) → 给予荣誉 → 庆祝
words.example: The family gathered to celebrate their grandmother's 90th birthday.
words.example_zh: 全家人聚在一起庆祝祖母的90岁生日。

words.meaning_en: To increase speed or rate of progress.
words.meaning_zh: v. 加速，促进
words.derivation: ac(向) + celer(速度) → 使向着速度 → 加速
words.example: The new technology helped accelerate the development of renewable energy sources.
words.example_zh: 新技术帮助加速了可再生能源的发展。

words.meaning_en: The smallest structural unit of an organism or a small room.
words.meaning_zh: n. 细胞，单元，小室
words.derivation: cell(小室) → 小的独立单位 → 细胞
words.example: The scientist examined the cell structure under a microscope.
words.example_zh: 科学家在显微镜下检查了细胞结构。

words.meaning_en: A temperature scale where water freezes at 0° and boils at 100°.
words.meaning_zh: a. 摄氏的，百分度的
words.derivation: centi(百) + grade(度) → 分成一百度 → 摄氏的
words.example: The temperature today reached 30 degrees centigrade.
words.example_zh: 今天的温度达到了摄氏30度。

words.meaning_en: To examine and remove unacceptable parts from books, films, or news.
words.meaning_zh: n. 审查员 vt. 审查，删改
words.derivation: cens(评判) + or(人) → 进行评判的人 → 审查员
words.example: The government attempted to censor the controversial news article.
words.example_zh: 政府试图审查这篇有争议的新闻文章。

words.meaning_en: Having a center or being at the center.
words.meaning_zh: a. 中心的，中央的
words.derivation: centr(中心) + ic(形容词) → 与中心有关的 → 中心的
words.example: The organization adopted a customer-centric approach to improve service quality.
words.example_zh: 该组织采用了以客户为中心的方法来提高服务质量。

words.meaning_en: The hundredth anniversary of a significant event.
words.meaning_zh: n. 百年纪念 a. 一百年的
words.derivation: cent(百) + enn(年) + ial(形容词) → 一百年的 → 百年纪念
words.example: The university celebrated its centennial with a grand ceremony.
words.example_zh: 这所大学举行盛大典礼庆祝其百年校庆。

words.meaning_en: severely critical of others
words.meaning_zh: 挑剔的，好批评的
words.derivation: cens(判断) + orious(…的) → 爱判断别人的 → 好批评的
words.example: Her censorious tone made everyone uncomfortable during the meeting.
words.example_zh: 她挑剔的语气让会议上的每个人都不自在。

words.meaning_en: to express severe disapproval of someone, typically in a formal statement
words.meaning_zh: 谴责，责难
words.derivation: cens(判断) + ure(行为) → 判断后的行为 → 谴责
words.example: The senator faced censure from colleagues for his unethical behavior.
words.example_zh: 这位参议员因不道德行为遭到同僚的谴责。

words.meaning_en: an official count or survey of a population
words.meaning_zh: 人口普查
words.derivation: cens(评估) + us → 对人口的评估 → 人口普查
words.example: The national census is conducted every ten years.
words.example_zh: 全国人口普查每十年进行一次。

words.meaning_en: A substance that produces a pleasant smell when burned.
words.meaning_zh: n. 香，香气 vt. 用香熏
words.derivation: in(使) + cens(燃烧) → 使燃烧产生香气 → 香
words.example: The temple was filled with the sweet smell of burning incense.
words.example_zh: 寺庙里充满了燃香的甜美气味。

words.meaning_en: A distinctive way of pronouncing words in a language.
words.meaning_zh: n. 口音，重音 vt. 强调
words.derivation: ac(向) + cent(唱) → 唱向某处 → 重音
words.example: Her British accent made her stand out among the American students.
words.example_zh: 她的英国口音使她在美国学生中显得与众不同。

words.breakdown: con-(共同) + centr-(中心) + -ate(动词后缀)
words.meaning_en: To focus all attention or effort on something.
words.meaning_zh: v. 集中，专心 n. 浓缩物
words.derivation: con(共同) + centr(中心) + ate(动词) → 使共同向中心 → 集中
words.example: Students need to concentrate on their studies to achieve good grades.
words.example_zh: 学生需要专心学习才能取得好成绩。

words.breakdown: con-(共同) + centr-(中心) + -ation(名词后缀)
words.meaning_en: The action of focusing attention or the degree of density.
words.meaning_zh: n. 集中，专心，浓度
words.derivation: con(共同) + centr(中心) + ation(名词) → 向中心集中的状态 → 集中
words.example: High concentration of pollutants in the water made it unsafe to drink.
words.example_zh: 水中污染物的高浓度使其不安全饮用。

words.breakdown: ec-(出) + centr-(中心) + -ic(形容词后缀)
words.meaning_en: Unconventional and slightly strange in behavior or appearance.
words.meaning_zh: a. 古怪的，反常的 n. 怪人
words.derivation: ec(出) + centr(中心) + ic(形容词) → 偏离中心的 → 古怪的
words.example: The professor was known for his eccentric behavior and unconventional teaching methods.
words.example_zh: 这位教授以其古怪的行为和非传统的教学方法而闻名。

words.breakdown: sus-(从下) + cept-(拿取) + -ible(形容词后缀)
words.meaning_en: Likely to be influenced or affected by something.
words.meaning_zh: a. 易受影响的，易感的
words.derivation: sus(从下) + cept(拿取) + ible(能够) → 能够从下接受 → 易受影响的
words.example: Young children are more susceptible to infectious diseases than adults.
words.example_zh: 幼儿比成人更容易感染传染病。

words.meaning_en: An abstract idea or general notion.
words.meaning_zh: n. 概念，观念
words.derivation: con(共同) + cept(拿取) → 共同拿取的东西 → 概念
words.example: The concept of sustainable development is crucial for environmental protection.
words.example_zh: 可持续发展的概念对环境保护至关重要。

words.meaning_en: A person or thing that is excluded from a general rule.
words.meaning_zh: n. 例外，除外
words.derivation: ex(出) + cept(拿取) + ion(名词) → 拿出去的 → 例外
words.example: All students must attend the meeting, with no exceptions allowed.
words.example_zh: 所有学生必须参加会议，不允许有例外。

words.breakdown: de-(离开) + cept-(拿取) + -ion(名词后缀)
words.meaning_en: The act of deliberately causing someone to believe something untrue.
words.meaning_zh: n. 欺骗，诡计
words.derivation: de(离开) + cept(拿取) + ion(名词) → 拿走真相 → 欺骗
words.example: The company was accused of deception in its advertising practices.
words.example_zh: 该公司被指控在广告宣传中存在欺骗行为。

words.breakdown: de-(离开) + cept-(拿取) + -ive(形容词后缀)
words.meaning_en: Giving an appearance that misleads or creates a false impression.
words.meaning_zh: a. 欺骗的，虚伪的
words.derivation: de(离开) + cept(拿取) + ive(形容词) → 使远离真相的 → 欺骗的
words.example: The calm water surface was deceptive; dangerous currents lurked beneath.
words.example_zh: 平静的水面具有欺骗性；危险的暗流潜藏在下面。

words.meaning_en: A grain used for food or a breakfast food made from grain.
words.meaning_zh: n. 谷类食品，谷物 a. 谷类的
words.derivation: cere(谷物) + al(形容词) → 与谷物有关的 → 谷类的
words.example: Many people prefer eating cereal with milk for breakfast.
words.example_zh: 许多人喜欢早餐吃麦片加牛奶。

words.meaning_en: Made of clay and hardened by heat.
words.meaning_zh: a. 陶瓷的 n. 陶瓷制品
words.derivation: ceram(陶土) + ic(形容词) → 与陶土有关的 → 陶瓷的
words.example: The museum displayed a collection of ancient ceramic pottery.
words.example_zh: 博物馆展出了一批古代陶瓷器皿。

words.meaning_en: Relating to the brain or intellect.
words.meaning_zh: a. 大脑的，理智的
words.derivation: cerebr(大脑) + al(形容词) → 与大脑有关的 → 大脑的
words.example: His writing style is highly cerebral and appeals to intellectual readers.
words.example_zh: 他的写作风格非常理性，吸引有思想的读者。

words.meaning_en: A formal religious or public occasion with traditional rituals.
words.meaning_zh: n. 典礼，仪式，礼节
words.derivation: ceremon(神圣仪式) + y(名词) → 神圣的仪式 → 典礼
words.example: The graduation ceremony was attended by hundreds of proud families.
words.example_zh: 数百个自豪的家庭参加了毕业典礼。

words.meaning_en: Relating to or used for formal religious or public events.
words.meaning_zh: a. 仪式的，正式的 n. 仪式
words.derivation: ceremon(仪式) + ial(形容词后缀) → 与仪式有关的 → 仪式的
words.example: The tribe performed a ceremonial dance to celebrate the harvest season.
words.example_zh: 部落表演了一场仪式性的舞蹈来庆祝收获季节。

words.meaning_en: To perceive or recognize something with difficulty by sight or mind.
words.meaning_zh: v. 辨别，看清楚，了解
words.derivation: dis(分开) + cern(分辨) → 分开辨别 → 辨别
words.example: It was difficult to discern the truth from all the conflicting reports.
words.example_zh: 从所有相互矛盾的报告中很难辨别出真相。

words.meaning_en: A matter of interest or importance; worry or anxiety about something.
words.meaning_zh: n. 关心，忧虑 vt. 与...有关，使担心
words.derivation: con(共同) + cern(分辨) → 共同分辨关注 → 关心
words.example: The teacher expressed concern about the student's declining grades.
words.example_zh: 老师对学生成绩下降表示担忧。

words.meaning_en: An official document attesting to a status, achievement, or fact.
words.meaning_zh: n. 证书，证明书 vt. 发给证明书
words.derivation: cert(确实) + ific(做) + ate(名词后缀) → 使确实的文件 → 证书
words.example: She received a certificate of completion after finishing the training program.
words.example_zh: 她在完成培训课程后获得了结业证书。

words.meaning_en: To find out definitely; to determine or verify something with certainty.
words.meaning_zh: vt. 确定，查明
words.derivation: as(加强意义) + certain(确实) → 使完全确实 → 确定
words.example: Investigators are trying to ascertain the cause of the accident.
words.example_zh: 调查人员正试图查明事故的原因。

words.meaning_en: Absolute certainty or conviction that something is the case.
words.meaning_zh: n. 确实性，确信
words.derivation: cert(确实) + itude(名词后缀) → 确实的状态 → 确实性
words.example: He spoke with certitude about his plans for the future.
words.example_zh: 他满怀信心地谈论自己未来的计划。

meaning_en: to go, to move, to yield

words.meaning_en: The means or opportunity to approach, enter, or use something.
words.meaning_zh: n. 通路，入口，接近，使用权 vt. 访问，存取
words.derivation: ac(向) + cess(行走) → 向...走去 → 接近
words.example: Students have access to the library's online database 24 hours a day.
words.example_zh: 学生每天24小时都可以访问图书馆的在线数据库。

words.meaning_en: To make something necessary or unavoidable; to require as essential.
words.meaning_zh: vt. 迫使，使成为必需，需要
words.derivation: ne(不) + cess(让步) + itate(动词后缀) → 不能让步的 → 使成为必需
words.example: The storm damage will necessitate extensive repairs to the building.
words.example_zh: 风暴造成的损坏将需要对建筑物进行大规模维修。

words.meaning_zh: n. 需要, 必需品, 必然\n[法] 必要性, 必然性, 必要

words.meaning_en: A series of actions or steps taken to achieve a particular end.
words.meaning_zh: n. 过程，程序 vt. 加工，处理
words.derivation: pro(向前) + cess(行走) → 向前行进 → 过程
words.example: The process of applying to graduate school can take several months.
words.example_zh: 申请研究生院的过程可能需要几个月的时间。

words.breakdown: in-(不) + ac-(向) + cess(行走) + -ible(形容词后缀)
words.meaning_en: Unable to be reached, entered, or approached; unavailable or unobtainable.
words.meaning_zh: a. 难接近的，难达成的，难得到的
words.derivation: in(不) + ac(向) + cess(行走) + ible(能...的) → 不能走近的 → 难接近的
words.example: The remote village was inaccessible during the winter months due to heavy snow.
words.example_zh: 由于大雪，这个偏远的村庄在冬季难以到达。

words.breakdown: in-(不) + cess(停止) + -ant(形容词后缀)
words.meaning_en: Continuing without pause or interruption; constant and unending.
words.meaning_zh: a. 不断的，不绝的，无尽的
words.derivation: in(不) + cess(停止) + ant(形容词后缀) → 不停止的 → 不断的
words.example: The incessant noise from the construction site made it impossible to concentrate.
words.example_zh: 建筑工地不断的噪音使人无法集中注意力。

words.breakdown: in-(不) + cess(停止) + -ant(形容词后缀) + -ly(副词后缀)
words.meaning_en: In a constant, continuous manner without stopping or pausing.
words.meaning_zh: adv. 不断地，不停地，连绵不断
words.derivation: in(不) + cess(停止) + ant(形容词后缀) + ly(副词后缀) → 不停止地 → 不断地
words.example: The baby cried incessantly throughout the entire flight.
words.example_zh: 婴儿在整个航班期间不停地哭泣。

words.breakdown: micro-(微小) + pro-(向前) + cess(行走) + -or(名词后缀)
words.meaning_en: A small integrated circuit that contains the processing functions of a computer.
words.meaning_zh: n. 微处理器
words.derivation: micro(微小) + pro(向前) + cess(行走) + or(表物) → 微小的处理器 → 微处理器
words.example: Modern smartphones contain powerful microprocessors that rival desktop computers from a decade ago.
words.example_zh: 现代智能手机包含强大的微处理器，其性能可与十年前的台式电脑媲美。

words.meaning_en: In a state of complete confusion and disorder; lacking organization.
words.meaning_zh: a. 混乱的，无秩序的
words.derivation: chaos(混乱) + tic(形容词后缀) → 混乱的状态 → 混乱的
words.example: The evacuation became chaotic as people rushed toward the exits.
words.example_zh: 当人们冲向出口时，疏散变得混乱不堪。

words.meaning_en: Complete disorder and confusion; a state lacking organization or predictability.
words.meaning_zh: n. 混乱，混沌
words.derivation: chaos(原始混沌状态) → 混乱
words.example: The city descended into chaos after the power outage lasted for three days.
words.example_zh: 停电持续三天后，城市陷入混乱。

words.meaning_en: A black carbon residue made by heating wood in absence of air.
words.meaning_zh: n. 木炭
words.derivation: char(烧焦) + coal(煤) → 烧焦的煤状物 → 木炭
words.example: The artist used charcoal to create dramatic shadows in her portrait drawings.
words.example_zh: 艺术家用木炭在她的肖像画中创造出戏剧性的阴影。

words.meaning_en: Distress or embarrassment at having failed or been humiliated.
words.meaning_zh: n. 懊恼，失望 vt. 使懊恼
words.derivation: chagrin(源自法语：忧愁) → 懊恼
words.example: Much to his chagrin, he realized he had forgotten his presentation notes.
words.example_zh: 令他懊恼的是，他意识到自己忘记了演讲笔记。

words.meaning_en: To make sore by rubbing; to feel irritated or impatient.
words.meaning_zh: v. 摩擦，擦痛，激怒 n. 擦伤
words.derivation: chafe(摩擦生热) → 擦伤
words.example: The tight collar chafed against his neck during the long ceremony.
words.example_zh: 在漫长的仪式期间，紧身衣领摩擦着他的脖子。

words.meaning_en: A small building or room used for Christian worship in institutions.
words.meaning_zh: n. 小教堂，礼拜堂
words.derivation: chapel(源自拉丁语：小斗篷) → 存放圣物的小建筑 → 小教堂
words.example: The university chapel hosts weekly services for students and faculty.
words.example_zh: 大学礼拜堂每周为学生和教职员工举行礼拜仪式。

words.meaning_en: A series of connected metal links or a sequence of related things.
words.meaning_zh: n. 链条，链，一系列 vt. 用链条锁住，束缚
words.derivation: chain(链条) → 连接的物体 → 链条，束缚
words.example: The supply chain was disrupted due to the pandemic, affecting global trade.
words.example_zh: 供应链因疫情而中断，影响了全球贸易。

meaning_en: to call to a contest; to question

words.meaning_en: A difficult task that tests someone's abilities or a call to compete.
words.meaning_zh: n. 挑战，质疑 vt. 向...挑战，质疑
words.derivation: challenge(挑战) → 要求竞争或证明 → 挑战，质疑
words.example: Climate change presents a significant challenge to future generations.
words.example_zh: 气候变化对未来几代人提出了重大挑战。

words.meaning_en: A room used for a specific purpose or an enclosed space.
words.meaning_zh: n. 房间，会议厅，腔室
words.derivation: chamber(室) → 封闭的空间 → 房间，会议厅
words.example: The legislative chamber was filled with politicians debating the new policy.
words.example_zh: 立法会议厅里满是辩论新政策的政治家。

words.meaning_en: A person who has defeated all rivals in a competition.
words.meaning_zh: n. 冠军，拥护者 vt. 支持，拥护
words.derivation: champ(战斗) + -ion(表人) → 战斗中的胜利者 → 冠军
words.example: She became the world champion in tennis after winning the final match.
words.example_zh: 她在赢得决赛后成为了网球世界冠军。

words.meaning_en: A competition to determine the best competitor or the title of champion.
words.meaning_zh: n. 锦标赛，冠军称号，冠军地位
words.derivation: champ(战斗) + -ion(表人) + -ship(状态) → 冠军的状态 → 锦标赛
words.example: The basketball team won the national championship for the third consecutive year.
words.example_zh: 这支篮球队连续第三年赢得全国锦标赛冠军。

words.meaning_en: A passage for water or communication; a means of transmitting information.
words.meaning_zh: n. 频道，渠道，海峡 vt. 引导，输送
words.derivation: chan(管道) + -el(小) → 小的管道 → 渠道，频道
words.example: The company uses social media as a channel to reach younger customers.
words.example_zh: 该公司利用社交媒体作为接触年轻客户的渠道。

words.meaning_en: A possibility or opportunity; something that happens without being planned.
words.meaning_zh: n. 机会，可能性，运气 v. 碰巧，冒险
words.derivation: chance(落下) → 偶然发生的事 → 机会，运气
words.example: There is a good chance that the meeting will be postponed until next week.
words.example_zh: 会议很有可能会推迟到下周。

words.meaning_en: The act of giving something and receiving something else in return.
words.meaning_zh: n. 交换，交流，交易所 v. 交换，兑换
words.derivation: ex-(向外) + change(改变) → 向外改变 → 交换
words.example: Students can participate in an exchange program to study abroad for one semester.
words.example_zh: 学生可以参加交换项目，在国外学习一个学期。

words.meaning_en: To sing or repeat words in a rhythmic, monotonous way.
words.meaning_zh: n. 圣歌，反复呼喊 v. 吟唱，反复呼喊
words.derivation: chant(歌唱) → 有节奏地重复 → 吟唱，圣歌
words.example: The protesters began to chant slogans demanding political reform.
words.example_zh: 抗议者开始高呼要求政治改革的口号。

words.breakdown: character(特征) + -ist(表性质) + -ic(形容词后缀)
words.meaning_en: A typical feature or quality that distinguishes someone or something.
words.meaning_zh: n. 特征，特性 a. 典型的，特有的
words.derivation: character(特征) + -ist + -ic(形容词) → 具有特征的 → 典型的
words.example: Patience is a characteristic of successful teachers who work with young children.
words.example_zh: 耐心是与幼儿打交道的成功教师的特征。

meaning_en: to load; to fill with power

words.meaning_zh: vt. 卸下, 放出, 解雇, 拔染, 履行, 放电\nvi. 卸货, 流出\nn. 卸货, 流出, 放电

words.meaning_en: To restore electrical energy or to renew one's energy and strength.
words.meaning_zh: v. 再充电，恢复精力 n. 再充电
words.derivation: re-(再次) + charge(充电) → 再次充电 → 再充电，恢复精力
words.example: I need to recharge my phone battery before leaving for the trip.
words.example_zh: 出发旅行前我需要给手机充电。

words.meaning_en: To charge too high a price or to load excessively.
words.meaning_zh: v. 索价过高，过度充电 n. 过高的收费
words.derivation: over-(过度) + charge(收费) → 收费过度 → 索价过高
words.example: The restaurant tried to overcharge tourists by adding hidden fees to the bill.
words.example_zh: 这家餐厅试图通过在账单中添加隐藏费用来向游客多收费。

words.meaning_en: An additional charge or payment added to the usual cost.
words.meaning_zh: n. 额外费用，附加税 v. 征收附加费
words.derivation: sur-(超过) + charge(收费) → 超过基本收费 → 附加费
words.example: Airlines often add a fuel surcharge to ticket prices during peak travel seasons.
words.example_zh: 航空公司在旅游旺季通常会在票价上增加燃油附加费。

words.meaning_en: A compelling attractiveness or charm that inspires devotion in others.
words.meaning_zh: n. 魅力，感召力，超凡的个人魅力
words.derivation: charis(恩惠，魅力) + -ma(名词) → 神赐的魅力 → 个人魅力
words.example: The political leader's charisma helped him win overwhelming support from voters.
words.example_zh: 这位政治领导人的魅力帮助他赢得了选民的压倒性支持。

words.meaning_en: Possessing an appealing charm that inspires loyalty and enthusiasm in others.
words.meaning_zh: a. 有魅力的，有感召力的
words.derivation: charis(恩惠，魅力) + -mat + -ic(形容词) → 具有魅力的 → 有魅力的
words.example: The charismatic speaker captivated the audience with his inspiring message.
words.example_zh: 这位富有魅力的演讲者以鼓舞人心的信息吸引了观众。

words.meaning_en: A written document granting rights or privileges; to rent or hire.
words.meaning_zh: n. 宪章，特许状，租契 vt. 特许，租用
words.derivation: chart(文件，地图) + -er(表物) → 正式文件 → 宪章，特许状
words.example: The organization was established under a royal charter in the 17th century.
words.example_zh: 该组织于17世纪根据皇家特许状成立。

words.meaning_en: A visual representation of data or information; a map for navigation.
words.meaning_zh: n. 图表，海图 vt. 制图，绘制
words.derivation: chart(纸) → 记录信息的纸 → 图表，海图
words.example: The scientist used a chart to display the results of the experiment clearly.
words.example_zh: 科学家用图表清晰地展示了实验结果。

words.meaning_en: To buy something or the act of buying something.
words.meaning_zh: v. 购买，采购 n. 购买，购买物
words.derivation: pur-(向前) + chase(追逐) → 追求获得 → 购买
words.example: Consumers should carefully research products before making a major purchase.
words.example_zh: 消费者在进行重大购买前应该仔细研究产品。

meaning_en: to stop; to verify; to control

words.meaning_en: To verify, examine, or control; a written order for payment.
words.meaning_zh: v. 检查，核对，阻止 n. 支票，检查
words.derivation: check(阻止) → 停下来验证 → 检查，核对
words.example: Please check your answers carefully before submitting the test.
words.example_zh: 请在提交测试前仔细检查你的答案。

words.meaning_en: Having a pattern of squares; verified or examined.
words.meaning_zh: a. 有格子图案的；经过检查的
words.derivation: check(检查) → 经过检查的 → 有格子的；已核实的
words.example: She wore a checked shirt with blue and white squares to the picnic.
words.example_zh: 她穿着一件蓝白格子衬衫去野餐。

words.breakdown: al-(阿拉伯冠词) + chem(化学) + -ist(从事者)
words.meaning_en: A person who practices alchemy, attempting to transform base metals into gold.
words.meaning_zh: n. 炼金术士
words.derivation: al(阿拉伯冠词) + chem(化学) → 从事化学转化的人 → 炼金术士
words.example: The medieval alchemist spent years trying to discover the secret of eternal life.
words.example_zh: 这位中世纪的炼金术士花了多年时间试图发现永生的秘密。

words.meaning_en: To hold something dear; to care for tenderly and protect lovingly.
words.meaning_zh: vt. 珍爱；怀有；爱护
words.derivation: cher(珍贵的) → 对待为珍贵的 → 珍爱
words.example: She will always cherish the memories of her childhood summers at the beach.
words.example_zh: 她将永远珍藏童年时在海滩度过的夏日回忆。

words.meaning_en: Uncomfortably cool or cold; unfriendly in manner.
words.meaning_zh: a. 寒冷的；冷淡的；不友好的
words.derivation: chill(寒冷) + -y(具有...性质) → 带有寒意的 → 寒冷的
words.example: The weather was chilly this morning, so I wore a jacket.
words.example_zh: 今天早上天气寒冷，所以我穿了一件夹克。

words.meaning_en: A highly intelligent great ape native to African forests.
words.meaning_zh: n. 黑猩猩
words.derivation: 源自非洲土著语言 → 黑猩猩
words.example: Researchers observed the chimpanzee using tools to extract termites from a mound.
words.example_zh: 研究人员观察到黑猩猩使用工具从土堆中提取白蚁。

words.meaning_en: A leader or head of an organization, tribe, or group.
words.meaning_zh: n. 领袖；酋长；长官 a. 主要的；首位的
words.derivation: chief(头) → 位于首位的人 → 首领；主要的
words.example: The chief executive officer announced a major restructuring of the company.
words.example_zh: 首席执行官宣布对公司进行重大重组。

words.breakdown: mis-(坏) + chief(成就) + -ous(形容词后缀)
words.meaning_en: Playfully causing trouble or harm; naughty but not seriously harmful.
words.meaning_zh: a. 淘气的；有害的；恶作剧的
words.derivation: mis(坏) + chief(成就) → 带来坏结果的 → 淘气的；恶作剧的
words.example: The mischievous children hid their teacher's chalk before class started.
words.example_zh: 这些淘气的孩子在上课前把老师的粉笔藏了起来。

words.meaning_en: A feeling of coldness; to make or become cold.
words.meaning_zh: n. 寒冷；寒意 vt. 使变冷；使寒心 vi. 变冷
words.derivation: chill(冷) → 寒冷的感觉 → 寒意；使变冷
words.example: There was a chill in the air as autumn approached.
words.example_zh: 随着秋天临近，空气中有一丝寒意。

words.meaning_en: A small piece broken off from something; a thin slice.
words.meaning_zh: n. 碎片；薄片；芯片 vt. 削；切成碎片
words.derivation: chip(切削) → 切削下来的小片 → 碎片；芯片
words.example: The computer chip revolutionized the technology industry in the 1970s.
words.example_zh: 计算机芯片在20世纪70年代彻底改变了科技产业。

words.meaning_en: A toxic greenish-yellow gas used as a disinfectant and bleaching agent.
words.meaning_zh: n. 氯
words.derivation: chlor(绿色) + -ine(元素) → 绿色的元素 → 氯
words.example: Swimming pools use chlorine to kill bacteria and keep the water clean.
words.example_zh: 游泳池使用氯来杀死细菌并保持水质清洁。

words.meaning_en: A waxy substance found in blood that can affect heart health.
words.meaning_zh: n. 胆固醇
words.derivation: chole(胆汁) + sterol(固醇) → 胆汁中的固醇 → 胆固醇
words.example: High cholesterol levels can increase the risk of heart disease.
words.example_zh: 高胆固醇水平会增加心脏病的风险。

words.meaning_en: An organized group of singers who perform together.
words.meaning_zh: n. 唱诗班；合唱团 v. 合唱
words.derivation: choir(合唱) → 一起歌唱的团体 → 合唱团
words.example: The church choir performed a beautiful hymn during the Sunday service.
words.example_zh: 教堂唱诗班在周日礼拜时演唱了一首优美的赞美诗。

words.meaning_en: A part of a song repeated after verses; a group singing together.
words.meaning_zh: n. 合唱队；副歌；齐声 v. 齐声说；合唱
words.derivation: chorus(共同歌唱) → 一起唱的部分 → 合唱；副歌
words.example: The audience joined in singing the chorus of the popular song.
words.example_zh: 观众一起合唱这首流行歌曲的副歌部分。

words.meaning_en: Having short, irregular waves; abruptly shifting or disconnected.
words.meaning_zh: a. 波浪起伏的；突变的；不连贯的
words.derivation: chop(劈开) + -y(具有...性质) → 像被劈开的 → 波浪起伏的
words.example: The boat rocked violently in the choppy waters of the harbor.
words.example_zh: 小船在港口波涛汹涌的水面上剧烈摇晃。

words.meaning_en: A structure in cells containing genetic information in the form of DNA.
words.meaning_zh: n. 染色体
words.derivation: chromo(颜色) + some(体) → 能被染色的细胞体 → 染色体
words.example: Humans normally have 46 chromosomes arranged in 23 pairs.
words.example_zh: 人类通常有46条染色体，排列成23对。

words.meaning_en: persisting for a long time or constantly recurring
words.meaning_zh: 慢性的，长期的
words.derivation: chron(时间) + ic(…的) → 持续很长时间的 → 慢性的
words.example: He suffers from chronic back pain.
words.example_zh: 他患有慢性背痛。

words.meaning_en: a factual written account of important events in the order of their occurrence
words.meaning_zh: 编年史，年代记
words.derivation: chron(时间) + icle(名词后缀) → 按时间记录的文献 → 编年史
words.example: The book is a chronicle of the nation's history.
words.example_zh: 这本书是一部国家历史的编年史。

words.breakdown: chron-(时间) + -o- + log-(学科) + -ical(形容词后缀)
words.meaning_en: arranged in the order of time
words.meaning_zh: 按时间顺序排列的
words.derivation: chron(时间) + o + log(学科) + ical(…的) → 按时间逻辑排列的 → 按时间顺序的
words.example: Please list the events in chronological order.
words.example_zh: 请按时间顺序列出这些事件。

words.breakdown: syn-(共同) + chron-(时间) + -ize(动词后缀)
words.meaning_en: to cause to occur or operate at the same time or rate
words.meaning_zh: 使同步
words.derivation: syn(共同) + chron(时间) + ize(使) → 使时间一致 → 使同步
words.example: The dancers synchronized their movements perfectly.
words.example_zh: 舞者们完美地同步了他们的动作。

words.breakdown: ana-(向后) + chron-(时间) + -ism(名词后缀)
words.meaning_en: a thing belonging to a period other than that in which it exists
words.meaning_zh: 时代错误
words.derivation: ana(向后) + chron(时间) + ism(现象) → 时间倒错的现象 → 时代错误
words.example: Using a typewriter in the digital age seems like an anachronism.
words.example_zh: 在数字时代使用打字机似乎是一种时代错误。

words.breakdown: syn-(同时) + chron-(时间) + -ous(形容词后缀)
words.meaning_en: existing or occurring at the same time
words.meaning_zh: 同步的，同时发生的
words.derivation: syn(同时) + chron(时间) + ous(…的) → 同一时间的 → 同步的
words.example: The satellites maintain synchronous orbits around the Earth.
words.example_zh: 这些卫星保持着围绕地球的同步轨道。

words.meaning_en: Lasting for a long time; constantly recurring or persistent.
words.meaning_zh: a. 慢性的；长期的
words.derivation: chron(时间) + -ical(形容词) → 与时间有关的 → 长期的；慢性的
words.example: The patient suffered from chronical back pain for many years.
words.example_zh: 这位病人多年来一直患有慢性背痛。

words.meaning_en: A thick, solid piece of something; a substantial amount.
words.meaning_zh: n. 大块；厚块；相当大的量
words.derivation: chunk(厚块) → 切下的厚实部分 → 大块
words.example: She broke off a large chunk of bread and dipped it in the soup.
words.example_zh: 她掰下一大块面包，蘸进汤里。

words.meaning_en: Pleasantly plump; having a rounded body shape.
words.meaning_zh: a. 圆胖的；丰满的
words.derivation: chub(圆胖的鱼) + -y(像...的) → 像圆胖的鱼 → 圆胖的
words.example: The baby had chubby cheeks that everyone loved to pinch.
words.example_zh: 这个婴儿有着圆嘟嘟的脸颊，人人都喜欢捏一捏。

words.meaning_en: A device used to slow descent through the air after jumping from aircraft.
words.meaning_zh: n. 降落伞 vi. 跳伞
words.derivation: para(防护) + chute(落下) → 防止快速落下的装置 → 降落伞
words.example: The skydiver pulled the cord and his parachute opened smoothly.
words.example_zh: 跳伞者拉开绳索，降落伞顺利打开。

words.meaning_en: An unexpected event that happens by chance or causes damage or injury.
