words.meaning_zh: n. 意外事件；事故；偶然
words.derivation: ac(向) + cid(落下) → 意外降临的事 → 意外事件；事故
words.example: The traffic accident on the highway caused a major delay during rush hour.
words.example_zh: 高速公路上的交通事故在高峰时段造成了严重延误。

words.breakdown: in-(进入) + cid(落下) + -ent(名词后缀)
words.meaning_en: An event or occurrence, especially one that is noteworthy or problematic.
words.meaning_zh: n. 事件，事变
words.derivation: in(进入) + cid(落下) + ent(名词后缀) → 落入其中的事 → 事件
words.example: The police were called to investigate an incident at the shopping mall yesterday.
words.example_zh: 警方昨天被叫去调查购物中心发生的一起事件。

words.breakdown: de-(向下) + cis(切) + -ive(形容词后缀)
words.meaning_en: Settling an issue or producing a definite result; showing determination.
words.meaning_zh: a. 决定性的，果断的
words.derivation: de(向下) + cis(切) + ive(形容词后缀) → 切断犹豫 → 果断的，决定性的
words.example: Her decisive leadership during the crisis helped the company avoid bankruptcy.
words.example_zh: 她在危机期间果断的领导能力帮助公司避免了破产。

words.breakdown: co-(共同) + in-(在) + cid(落下) + -e(动词后缀)
words.meaning_en: To occur at the same time or to correspond in nature.
words.meaning_zh: vi. 一致，符合，同时发生
words.derivation: co(共同) + in(在) + cid(落下) + e(动词后缀) → 共同落在一起 → 一致，同时发生
words.example: The conference dates coincide with my vacation, so I cannot attend.
words.example_zh: 会议日期与我的假期重合，所以我无法参加。

words.breakdown: in-(进入) + cid(落下) + -ent(形容词后缀) + -al(形容词后缀)
words.meaning_en: Occurring as a minor or subordinate element; happening by chance.
words.meaning_zh: a. 附带的，偶然的
words.derivation: in(进入) + cid(落下) + ent + al(形容词后缀) → 偶然落入的 → 附带的，偶然的
words.example: The book provides useful information, though some details are merely incidental to the main topic.
words.example_zh: 这本书提供了有用的信息，尽管一些细节只是主题的附带内容。

words.meaning_en: a substance used to destroy unwanted vegetation
words.meaning_zh: 除草剂
words.derivation: herb(草) + icide(杀) → 杀草的东西 → 除草剂
words.example: The widespread use of herbicides has raised concerns about soil health.
words.example_zh: 除草剂的广泛使用引起了人们对土壤健康的担忧。

words.meaning_en: a substance used to kill insects or other organisms harmful to crops
words.meaning_zh: 杀虫剂，农药
words.derivation: pest(害虫) + icide(杀) → 杀害虫的东西 → 杀虫剂
words.example: Organic farming avoids synthetic pesticides to protect biodiversity.
words.example_zh: 有机农业避免使用合成农药以保护生物多样性。

words.meaning_en: the deliberate killing of a large group of people, especially of an ethnic group
words.meaning_zh: 种族灭绝
words.derivation: gen(种族) + icide(杀) → 杀害一个种族 → 种族灭绝
words.example: The international community has established laws to prevent and punish genocide.
words.example_zh: 国际社会已建立法律来预防和惩罚种族灭绝。

words.breakdown: coun-(共同) + cil(召集) + 一起商议(的组织)
words.meaning_en: An advisory or legislative body of people formally constituted.
words.meaning_zh: n. 委员会，理事会
words.derivation: coun(共同) + cil(召集) → 召集在一起商议 → 委员会
words.example: The city council voted unanimously to approve the new environmental regulations.
words.example_zh: 市政委员会一致投票通过了新的环境法规。

words.breakdown: anti-(先，前) + cip(拿，取) + -ate(动词后缀)
words.meaning_en: To expect or predict something and prepare for it.
words.meaning_zh: vt. 预期，预料，预见
words.derivation: anti(先，前) + cip(拿，取) + ate(动词后缀) → 提前拿到 → 预期，预料
words.example: Economists anticipate a slowdown in economic growth next quarter.
words.example_zh: 经济学家预期下个季度经济增长会放缓。

words.breakdown: muni-(公共服务) + cip(拿，取) + -al(形容词后缀)
words.meaning_en: Relating to a city or town or its governing body.
words.meaning_zh: a. 市政的，自治市的
words.derivation: muni(公共服务) + cip(拿，取) + al(形容词后缀) → 承担公共职责的 → 市政的
words.example: The municipal government announced plans to renovate the downtown area.
words.example_zh: 市政府宣布了翻新市中心地区的计划。

meaning_zh: 密码，编码（信息编解码联想）

words.meaning_en: to convert coded text into normal language; to interpret
words.meaning_zh: 破译，辨认
words.derivation: de(解开) + cipher(密码) → 解开密码 → 破译
words.example: Archaeologists worked for years to decipher the ancient inscriptions on the tomb.
words.example_zh: 考古学家花了数年时间来破译墓碑上的古代铭文。
words.mnemonic: de(解开) + cipher(密码) → 解密 → 破译

words.meaning_en: to convert a coded message into intelligible language
words.meaning_zh: 解码，破译
words.derivation: de(解开) + code(代码) → 解开代码 → 解码
words.example: Scientists are working to decode the complex signals received from deep space.
words.example_zh: 科学家们正在努力解码从外太空接收到的复杂信号。
words.mnemonic: de(解开) + code(代码) → 把代码解开 → 解码

words.meaning_en: to convert information into a coded form
words.meaning_zh: 编码，加密
words.derivation: en(使成为) + code(代码) → 使成为代码 → 编码
words.example: Genes encode the instructions needed for building proteins in living organisms.
words.example_zh: 基因编码了生物体构建蛋白质所需的指令。
words.mnemonic: en(使成为) + code(代码) → 使变成代码 → 编码

words.meaning_en: To move continuously through a closed system or area.
words.meaning_zh: v. (使)流通，(使)循环，(使)传播
words.derivation: circul(=circle 环) + ate(动词后缀) → 使成环状运动 → (使)流通
words.example: Blood circulates through the body, delivering oxygen to all organs.
words.example_zh: 血液在体内循环，向所有器官输送氧气。

words.meaning_en: Having the form of a circle; round.
words.meaning_zh: a. 圆形的，循环的
words.derivation: circul(=circle 圆) + ar(形容词后缀) → 圆形的
words.example: The students sat in a circular arrangement to facilitate group discussion.
words.example_zh: 学生们围成一个圆圈坐着，以便进行小组讨论。

words.meaning_en: A complete path around which electricity can flow.
words.meaning_zh: n. 电路，环行道，巡回
words.derivation: circ(圆) + u + it(行) → 绕圈行走 → 电路，环行道
words.example: The electrician tested the circuit to find where the power failure occurred.
words.example_zh: 电工检测了电路以找出停电发生的位置。

words.meaning_en: A fact or condition connected with an event or action.
words.meaning_zh: n. 环境，情况，境遇
words.derivation: circum(周围) + st(站) + ance(名词后缀) → 站在周围的事物 → 环境，情况
words.example: Under normal circumstances, the project would have been completed by now.
words.example_zh: 在正常情况下，这个项目现在应该已经完成了。

words.breakdown: circum-(周围) + fer(带，运) + -ence(名词后缀)
words.meaning_en: The distance around the edge of a circle or other curved figure.
words.meaning_zh: n. 圆周，周长
words.derivation: circum(周围) + fer(带，运) + ence(名词后缀) → 围绕一周的距离 → 圆周，周长
words.example: The circumference of the Earth at the equator is approximately 40,075 kilometers.
words.example_zh: 地球赤道的周长约为40,075公里。

words.meaning_en: Marked by exactness and accuracy of expression or detail.
words.meaning_zh: a. 精确的，准确的，严谨的
words.derivation: pre(先，前) + cis(切) → 事先切好的，界限分明的 → 精确的
words.example: The scientist gave precise measurements for all the chemical compounds used in the experiment.
words.example_zh: 科学家给出了实验中使用的所有化合物的精确测量值。

words.meaning_en: Giving much information clearly and in few words; brief but comprehensive.
words.meaning_zh: a. 简洁的，简明的
words.derivation: con(加强) + cis(切) → 把多余的切掉 → 简洁的
words.example: The professor appreciated the student's concise summary of the complex theory.
words.example_zh: 教授很欣赏学生对这一复杂理论的简明总结。

words.meaning_en: Lacking exactness and accuracy; not clearly defined or stated.
words.meaning_zh: a. 不精确的，不严密的
words.derivation: im(否定) + pre(先，前) + cis(切) → 没有切确界定的 → 不精确的
words.example: The witness gave an imprecise description of the suspect, making identification difficult.
words.example_zh: 证人对嫌疑人的描述不够精确，使得辨认变得困难。

words.meaning_en: To quote as evidence or justification for an argument.
words.meaning_zh: vt. 引用，引证，举例
words.derivation: cit(召唤，引用) → 召唤出来作证 → 引用，引证
words.example: The researcher cited several studies to support her hypothesis about climate change.
words.example_zh: 研究人员引用了几项研究来支持她关于气候变化的假设。

words.breakdown: re-(再次) + cit(召唤，引用) + -al(名词后缀)
words.meaning_en: A performance of music or poetry, typically by one person.
words.meaning_zh: n. 独奏会，独唱会，背诵
words.derivation: re(再次) + cit(召唤，引用) + al(名词后缀) → 反复引述 → 背诵，演奏会
words.example: The young pianist gave her first public recital at the city concert hall.
words.example_zh: 这位年轻的钢琴家在市音乐厅举行了她的首次公开独奏会。

words.meaning_en: To ask for or try to obtain something from someone.
words.meaning_zh: v. 请求，恳求，征求
words.derivation: sol(全部) + cit(召唤，引用) → 全力召唤请求 → 恳求，征求
words.example: The charity organization will solicit donations from local businesses next month.
words.example_zh: 该慈善组织下个月将向当地企业征求捐款。

words.meaning_en: Relating to ordinary citizens and their concerns, rather than military matters.
words.meaning_zh: a. 公民的，民用的，有礼貌的
words.derivation: civ(公民) + il(形容词后缀) → 公民的，民用的
words.example: The civil rights movement of the 1960s brought significant social change.
words.example_zh: 20世纪60年代的民权运动带来了重大的社会变革。

words.meaning_en: A group of close-knit families sharing a common ancestor.
words.meaning_zh: n. 宗族，氏族，家族
words.derivation: clan(呼喊) → 因呼喊而聚集的群体 → 宗族，氏族
words.example: The Scottish clan gathered annually to celebrate their heritage and traditions.
words.example_zh: 这个苏格兰宗族每年聚会庆祝他们的传统和文化遗产。

words.meaning_en: A loud and confused noise, especially from people complaining or demanding something.
words.meaning_zh: n. 喧闹，叫嚷，大声的要求 v. 喧嚷，大声地要求
words.derivation: clam(喊叫) + or(名词后缀) → 大声喊叫 → 喧闹
words.example: The protesters continued their clamor for political reform outside the government building.
words.example_zh: 抗议者在政府大楼外继续大声要求政治改革。

words.breakdown: ac-(表示加强意义) + claim(叫，呼喊)
words.meaning_en: Public praise and approval, or to praise enthusiastically and publicly.
words.meaning_zh: n. 喝彩，欢呼，赞同 v. 欢呼，喝彩，称赞
words.derivation: ac(表示加强意义) + claim(叫 → 呼喊) → 喝彩
words.example: The novel received widespread acclaim from both critics and readers.
words.example_zh: 这部小说受到评论家和读者的广泛赞誉。

words.meaning_en: To announce officially or publicly; to declare something openly.
words.meaning_zh: vt. 宣布，公告，宣言，表明，赞扬
words.derivation: pro(向前) + claim(叫喊 → 声言) → 宣布
words.example: The mayor proclaimed a state of emergency after the devastating hurricane.
words.example_zh: 在毁灭性飓风之后，市长宣布进入紧急状态。

words.meaning_en: To state that something is true or to demand something as a right.
words.meaning_zh: n. 要求，要求权，断言，权利 vt. 要求，认领，主张
words.derivation: claim(喊叫 → 声言) → 提出主张 → 要求
words.example: The company claims that its new product can reduce energy consumption by 40%.
words.example_zh: 该公司声称其新产品可以减少40%的能源消耗。

words.meaning_en: To cry out suddenly in surprise, anger, or other strong emotion.
words.meaning_zh: v. 大叫，呼喊，大声叫
words.derivation: ex(外) + claim(叫) → 大叫
words.example: She exclaimed in delight when she saw the surprise birthday party.
words.example_zh: 当她看到惊喜生日派对时高兴地大叫起来。

words.meaning_en: A marine mollusk with a shell in two parts, or to dig for clams.
words.meaning_zh: n. 蛤，沉默寡言的人 vi. 捞蛤
words.derivation: clam(贝壳紧闭) → 蛤蜊
words.example: We went to the beach to clam and collected enough for dinner.
words.example_zh: 我们去海滩捞蛤，收集了足够的蛤蜊做晚餐。

words.breakdown: de-(加强意义) + clar(清楚，明白) + -e
words.meaning_en: To announce something clearly, firmly, publicly, or officially.
words.meaning_zh: v. 宣布，声明，申报，断言
words.derivation: de(加强意义) + clar(清楚，明白) → 说清楚 → 宣布
words.example: The government declared war on corruption in all public institutions.
words.example_zh: 政府宣布对所有公共机构的腐败现象开战。

words.breakdown: clar(=clear 清楚) + 明(白) + -i(-) + -fy(动词后缀) + 使(…)
words.meaning_zh: vi. 澄清, 阐明\nvt. 使明晰
words.derivation: clar(=clear 清楚) + 明(白) + i(-) + fy(动词后缀) + 使(…) → 澄清

words.meaning_en: the supposed faculty of perceiving things beyond normal sensory contact
words.meaning_zh: 洞察力，透视力
words.derivation: clair(清晰) + voy(看) + ance(性质) → 看得清晰的能力 → 洞察力
words.example: Some people claim to possess clairvoyance and the ability to predict the future.
words.example_zh: 有些人声称拥有洞察力和预测未来的能力。

words.meaning_en: To grasp something tightly with one's hand or to fasten with a device.
words.meaning_zh: n. 扣子，钩，紧握 v. 扣紧，紧握
words.derivation: clasp(抓紧，扣住) → 紧握
words.example: She clasped her hands together nervously before giving the presentation.
words.example_zh: 在做演讲之前，她紧张地紧握双手。

words.meaning_en: Judged over time to be of highest quality and outstanding of its kind.
words.meaning_zh: n. 古典作品，杰作，大艺术家 a. 第一流的，最优秀的，古典的
words.derivation: class(等级) + ic(形容词后缀) → 最高等级的 → 经典的
words.example: Pride and Prejudice is considered a classic of English literature.
words.example_zh: 《傲慢与偏见》被认为是英国文学的经典之作。

words.meaning_en: To arrange things in groups according to shared characteristics or categories.
words.meaning_zh: vt. 分类，归类，分等
words.derivation: class(类别) + i + fy(使…) → 使成类别 → 分类
words.example: Scientists classify animals into different species based on their genetic characteristics.
words.example_zh: 科学家根据动物的遗传特征将它们分类为不同的物种。

words.breakdown: class(等级，类别) + -ic(形容词后缀) + -al(形容词后缀)
words.meaning_en: Relating to ancient Greek or Roman culture, or traditional in style or form.
words.meaning_zh: a. 古典的，正统派的，经典的
words.derivation: class(等级) + ic + al → 最高等级的 → 古典的
words.example: She studied classical music at the conservatory for eight years.
words.example_zh: 她在音乐学院学习古典音乐八年。

words.breakdown: neo-(新) + class(等级) + -ic(形容词后缀) + -al(形容词后缀)
words.meaning_en: Relating to a revival of classical style in art, architecture, or literature.
words.meaning_zh: a. 新古典主义的
words.derivation: neo(新) + class(等级) + ic + al → 新的古典风格 → 新古典主义的
words.example: The museum features a neoclassical facade with tall columns and symmetrical design.
words.example_zh: 博物馆的外立面采用新古典主义风格，有高大的柱子和对称的设计。

words.meaning_en: A natural sticky earth material that becomes hard when baked or dried.
words.meaning_zh: n. 泥土，肉体，黏土
words.derivation: clay(粘性土壤) → 粘土
words.example: The artist molded the clay into a beautiful sculpture of a horse.
words.example_zh: 艺术家将粘土塑造成一匹漂亮的马的雕塑。

words.meaning_en: A person or organization using the services of a professional or company.
words.meaning_zh: n. 客户，顾客，委托人
words.derivation: cli(倾向，依附) + ent(人) → 依附于他人的人 → 委托人，客户
words.example: The lawyer met with her client to discuss the details of the case.
words.example_zh: 律师与她的委托人会面讨论案件细节。

words.meaning_en: A high, steep rock face, especially one at the edge of the sea.
words.meaning_zh: n. 悬崖，绝壁
words.derivation: cliff(陡峭的岩石面) → 悬崖
words.example: The ancient castle was built on top of a cliff overlooking the ocean.
words.example_zh: 这座古老的城堡建在俯瞰大海的悬崖顶上。

words.meaning_en: To cut something with scissors or shears, or a small device for holding things together.
words.meaning_zh: n. 修剪，夹子，回形针，剪下来的东西 vt. 修剪，痛打，夹牢，剪报
words.derivation: clip(夹住 / 剪切) → 夹子 / 修剪
words.example: Please clip these documents together and file them in the cabinet.
words.example_zh: 请把这些文件夹在一起并归档到柜子里。

words.meaning_en: A tool for cutting or trimming, especially hair or nails.
words.meaning_zh: n. 大剪刀
words.derivation: clip(剪) + er(工具) → 剪切工具 → 大剪刀
words.example: The barber used electric clippers to trim the customer's hair.
words.example_zh: 理发师用电动剪刀修剪顾客的头发。

words.meaning_en: The general weather conditions prevailing in an area over a long period.
words.meaning_zh: n. 气候，社会趋势，气候区
words.derivation: clim(倾斜 → 地带) + ate → 地带的特征 → 气候
words.example: The tropical climate of the region makes it ideal for growing coffee.
words.example_zh: 该地区的热带气候使其非常适合种植咖啡。

words.meaning_en: A medical facility focused on outpatient care or specialized treatment.
words.meaning_zh: n. 诊所，临床教学
words.derivation: clin(倾斜，躺) + ic → 病人躺下的地方 → 诊所
words.example: The community health clinic provides free vaccinations for children every Saturday.
words.example_zh: 社区卫生诊所每周六为儿童提供免费疫苗接种。

words.meaning_en: To decrease in quantity, quality, or importance; to refuse politely.
words.meaning_zh: v./n. 下降，衰退；婉拒
words.derivation: de(向下) + clin(倾斜) → 向下倾斜 → 衰退
words.example: The population of the city has declined significantly over the past decade.
words.example_zh: 这座城市的人口在过去十年中显著下降。

words.meaning_en: To have a tendency toward something; to slope or slant.
words.meaning_zh: v. 倾向于，使倾斜 n. 斜坡
words.derivation: in(加强意义) + clin(倾斜) → 使倾斜 → 倾向
words.example: Students who study regularly are inclined to perform better on exams.
words.example_zh: 经常学习的学生往往在考试中表现更好。

words.meaning_en: To lean or lie back in a relaxed position.
words.meaning_zh: v. 斜倚，靠
words.derivation: re(向后) + clin(倾斜) → 向后倾斜 → 斜靠
words.example: Passengers can recline their seats during the long flight for more comfort.
words.example_zh: 乘客可以在长途飞行中调低座椅以获得更多舒适。

words.breakdown: in-(加强) + clin(倾斜) + -ation(名词后缀)
words.meaning_en: A natural tendency or preference toward something.
words.meaning_zh: n. 倾向，意愿，倾斜度
words.derivation: in(加强) + clin(倾斜) + ation(名词后缀) → 倾斜状态 → 倾向
words.example: She showed an early inclination toward mathematics and science.
words.example_zh: 她早期就表现出对数学和科学的倾向。

words.meaning_en: To hold on tightly to something; to stick or adhere.
words.meaning_zh: v. 紧贴，附着，坚持
words.derivation: cling(粘附) → 紧贴
words.example: The wet clothes cling to her body after she got caught in the rain.
words.example_zh: 被雨淋湿后，湿衣服紧贴在她身上。

words.meaning_en: An organism or cell produced asexually from one ancestor; an identical copy.
words.meaning_zh: n. 克隆，无性繁殖 v. 克隆
words.derivation: clon(枝，芽) → 无性繁殖的枝芽 → 克隆
words.example: Scientists successfully cloned the sheep using advanced genetic technology.
words.example_zh: 科学家使用先进的基因技术成功克隆了这只羊。

words.meaning_en: A small room or cabinet for storing clothes or supplies.
words.meaning_zh: n. 壁橱，储藏室
words.derivation: clos(关闭) + et(小) → 关闭的小空间 → 壁橱
words.example: She hung her winter coats in the bedroom closet for storage.
words.example_zh: 她把冬季外套挂在卧室的壁橱里储存。

words.meaning_en: To surround or close off on all sides; to include something with a letter.
words.meaning_zh: v. 围住，封入，附上
words.derivation: en(使) + clos(关闭) → 使关闭 → 围住
words.example: Please enclose a copy of your resume with the application form.
words.example_zh: 请随申请表附上一份简历副本。

words.meaning_en: To reveal or make known information that was previously hidden.
words.meaning_zh: v. 揭露，透露，公开
words.derivation: dis(相反) + clos(关闭) → 打开 → 揭露
words.example: The company refused to disclose details about the merger negotiations.
words.example_zh: 该公司拒绝透露有关并购谈判的细节。

words.meaning_en: A group of similar things growing or held together.
words.meaning_zh: n. 串，丛，群 v. 聚集
words.derivation: clust(聚集) + er → 聚集的东西 → 群
words.example: A cluster of stars is visible in the night sky through the telescope.
words.example_zh: 通过望远镜可以看到夜空中的一团星群。

words.meaning_en: Awkward in movement or lacking skill; badly done.
words.meaning_zh: a. 笨拙的，不灵活的
words.derivation: clums(笨重) + y(形容词) → 笨重的 → 笨拙的
words.example: His clumsy attempt to fix the computer only made the problem worse.
words.example_zh: 他笨拙地试图修理电脑，结果只是让问题变得更糟。

words.meaning_en: To grasp or hold something tightly; a device for engaging gears.
words.meaning_zh: v. 抓紧，握紧 n. 离合器
words.derivation: clutch(紧抓) → 抓住
words.example: She clutched her purse tightly as she walked through the crowded market.
words.example_zh: 她在拥挤的市场中行走时紧紧抓住她的钱包。

words.meaning_en: A compact mass or group of things growing together.
words.meaning_zh: n. 丛，块，团 v. 结块
words.derivation: clump(成块) → 成块的东西 → 丛
words.example: A clump of bushes provided shade for the hikers resting by the trail.
words.example_zh: 一丛灌木为在小路旁休息的徒步旅行者提供了阴凉。

words.meaning_en: To deliberately leave out or not include something or someone.
words.meaning_zh: v. 排除，排斥，不包括
words.derivation: ex(外) + clud(关闭) → 关在外面 → 排除
words.example: The study excluded participants who had previous medical conditions.
words.example_zh: 该研究排除了之前有健康问题的参与者。

words.breakdown: ex-(外) + clus(关闭) + -ive(形容词后缀)
words.meaning_en: Limited to only one person or group; not shared.
words.meaning_zh: a. 独有的，排外的，专用的
words.derivation: ex(外) + clus(关闭) + ive(…的) → 把他人关在外面的 → 排外的
words.example: The hotel offers exclusive access to a private beach for its guests.
words.example_zh: 该酒店为客人提供私人海滩的专属使用权。

words.breakdown: con-(完全) + clus(关闭) + -ive(形容词后缀)
words.meaning_en: Serving to prove something decisively; leaving no doubt.
words.meaning_zh: a. 决定性的，conclusive的，确凿的
words.derivation: con(完全) + clus(关闭) + ive(…的) → 完全关闭的 → 决定性的
words.example: The DNA evidence provided conclusive proof of the suspect's innocence.
words.example_zh: DNA证据为嫌疑人的清白提供了确凿的证明。

words.breakdown: se-(分离) + clus(关闭) + -ion(名词后缀)
words.meaning_en: The state of being private and away from other people.
words.meaning_zh: n. 隔离，隐居，隐退
words.derivation: se(分离) + clus(关闭) + ion(名词后缀) → 分离关闭 → 隔离
words.example: The writer sought seclusion in a mountain cabin to finish his novel.
words.example_zh: 作家在山中小屋寻求隐居以完成他的小说。

words.meaning_en: A piece of evidence or information that helps solve a problem.
words.meaning_zh: n. 线索，提示 v. 提供线索
words.derivation: clue(线团) → 引导走出迷宫的线 → 线索
words.example: The detective found an important clue that led to the criminal's arrest.
words.example_zh: 侦探发现了一条重要线索，导致罪犯被捕。

words.meaning_en: A musical performance given in public; joint action or agreement.
words.meaning_zh: n. 音乐会，一致
words.derivation: con(共同) + cert(确定) → 共同确定 → 协调一致
words.example: The orchestra will perform Beethoven's Fifth Symphony at tonight's concert.
words.example_zh: 管弦乐队将在今晚的音乐会上演奏贝多芬第五交响曲。

words.meaning_en: A person with whom one works in a profession or business.
words.meaning_zh: n. 同事，同僚
words.derivation: col(共同) + leag(选择) → 共同选出的人 → 同事
words.example: She discussed the project with her colleagues during the weekly meeting.
words.example_zh: 她在每周会议期间与同事讨论了这个项目。

words.meaning_en: To examine similarities and differences between two or more things.
words.meaning_zh: v. 比较，对照；比喻
words.derivation: com(一起) + par(相等) → 放在一起看是否相等 → 比较
words.example: Researchers often compare different experimental results to identify patterns and draw conclusions.
words.example_zh: 研究人员经常比较不同的实验结果以识别模式并得出结论。

words.meaning_en: Having a rough or harsh texture; lacking refinement.
words.meaning_zh: a. 粗糙的，粗劣的，粗俗的
words.derivation: coarse(粗糙) → 粗糙的
words.example: The coarse fabric of the burlap sack felt uncomfortable against her skin.
words.example_zh: 粗麻布袋粗糙的质地让她感到皮肤不舒服。

words.meaning_en: A child of one's uncle or aunt.
words.meaning_zh: n. 堂兄弟姐妹，表兄弟姐妹
words.derivation: cousin(表亲) → 堂兄弟姐妹
words.example: My cousin and I spent every summer together at our grandparents' farm.
words.example_zh: 我和我的表兄弟每年夏天都在祖父母的农场一起度过。

words.meaning_en: A place where legal cases are heard and decided.
words.meaning_zh: n. 法院，法庭；庭院；球场
words.derivation: court(院子 → 法庭) → 法院
words.example: The defendant appeared in court to face charges of fraud and embezzlement.
words.example_zh: 被告出庭面对欺诈和挪用公款的指控。

words.meaning_en: A voucher entitling the holder to a discount or special offer.
words.meaning_zh: n. 优惠券，赠券；息票
words.derivation: coupon(票券) → 优惠券
words.example: She used a coupon to save twenty percent on her grocery purchase.
words.example_zh: 她使用优惠券在购买食品杂货时节省了百分之二十。

words.meaning_en: Relating to comedy or causing laughter; a comedian or comic book.
words.meaning_zh: a. 滑稽的，喜剧的 n. 连环漫画，喜剧演员
words.derivation: com(欢乐) + ic(形容词后缀) → 喜剧的
words.example: The comic relief in the play provided a welcome break from the dramatic tension.
words.example_zh: 剧中的喜剧性穿插为紧张的戏剧气氛提供了令人愉快的调剂。

words.breakdown: pre-(提前) + coc-(成熟) + -ious(形容词后缀)
words.meaning_en: having developed certain abilities at an earlier age than usual
words.meaning_zh: 早熟的，早慧的
words.derivation: pre(提前) + coc(成熟) + ious(…的) → 提前成熟的 → 早熟的
words.example: The precocious child was reading novels by the age of five.
words.example_zh: 那个早慧的孩子五岁就在读小说了。

words.meaning_en: to make a dish or plan by combining ingredients; to devise a story or plan
words.meaning_zh: 调制，编造
words.derivation: con(一起) + coct(烹煮) → 将材料一起烹煮 → 调制，编造
words.example: She concocted an elaborate excuse for missing the deadline.
words.example_zh: 她编造了一个精心策划的借口来解释错过截止日期的原因。

words.meaning_en: the liquor resulting from concentrating the essence of a substance by boiling
words.meaning_zh: 煎液，药汁
words.derivation: de(下) + coct(烹煮) + ion(行为) → 煮下来的液体 → 煎液
words.example: Traditional medicine often relies on herbal decoctions to treat common ailments.
words.example_zh: 传统医学常常依赖草药煎剂来治疗常见疾病。

meaning_en: book, trunk of tree; system of laws

words.meaning_en: A system of symbols or rules for representing information or instructions.
words.meaning_zh: n. 代码，密码，法规，法典 vt. 编码
words.derivation: code(法典 → 代码) → 代码
words.example: Computer programmers write code to create software applications and websites.
words.example_zh: 计算机程序员编写代码来创建软件应用程序和网站。

words.meaning_en: To arrange laws or rules into a systematic code.
words.meaning_zh: vt. 编成法典，编纂
words.derivation: cod(法典) + ify(动词后缀：使...) → 使成为法典 → 编成法典
words.example: The committee worked to codify the regulations into a comprehensive legal framework.
words.example_zh: 委员会致力于将这些规定编纂成一个全面的法律框架。

meaning_en: words related to deep thinking and reflection
meaning_zh: 与深思和反省相关的词

words.meaning_en: to think deeply about something; to ponder
words.meaning_zh: 深思，仔细考虑
words.derivation: 源自拉丁语 cogitare(思考)，co(一起) + agitare(驱动) → 驱动思维
words.example: The philosopher cogitated on the meaning of existence.
words.example_zh: 哲学家深思着存在的意义。
words.mnemonic: cog(齿轮) + itate → 大脑齿轮转动 → 深思

words.breakdown: con-(完全) + templ-(观察) + -ate(动词后缀)
words.meaning_en: to think about something carefully and at length
words.meaning_zh: 沉思，深思熟虑
words.derivation: con(完全) + templ(观察) + ate → 完全观察 → 深思
words.example: She sat by the lake to contemplate her future career.
words.example_zh: 她坐在湖边思考自己未来的职业。
words.mnemonic: con + temple(寺庙) + ate → 在寺庙中冥想 → 沉思

words.meaning_en: to think deeply about something; to chew the cud
words.meaning_zh: 反复思考，沉思
words.derivation: 源自拉丁语 ruminare(反刍) → 像牛反复咀嚼食物一样反复思考
words.example: He spent hours ruminating over the decision before making up his mind.
words.example_zh: 他花了几个小时反复思考这个决定才下定决心。
words.mnemonic: rumen(瘤胃) + ate → 像牛反刍一样反复咀嚼 → 反复思考

words.breakdown: cogn(知道 → 认识) + -itive(形容词后缀...的)
words.meaning_en: Relating to mental processes of perception, memory, judgment, and reasoning.
words.meaning_zh: a. 认知的，认识的
words.derivation: cogn(知道 → 认识) + itive(形容词后缀...的) → 认知的
words.example: Cognitive development in children involves learning language, problem-solving, and memory skills.
words.example_zh: 儿童的认知发展包括学习语言、解决问题和记忆技能。

words.breakdown: re-(加强意义) + cogn(知道 → 认识) + -ition(名词后缀)
words.meaning_en: Identification of something as having been known before; acknowledgment of achievement.
words.meaning_zh: n. 识别，承认，认可，赞誉
words.derivation: re(加强意义) + cogn(知道 → 认识) + ition(名词后缀) → 再次认识 → 识别，承认
words.example: The scientist received international recognition for her groundbreaking research on climate change.
words.example_zh: 这位科学家因其在气候变化方面的开创性研究获得了国际认可。

words.meaning_en: the mental action or process of acquiring knowledge through thought and experience
words.meaning_zh: 认知，认识
words.derivation: cogn(知道) + ition → 知道的过程 → 认知
words.example: Research in cognition has revealed how memory and attention interact.
words.example_zh: 认知研究揭示了记忆和注意力如何相互作用。

words.meaning_en: having knowledge or being aware of
words.meaning_zh: 认知的，意识到的
words.derivation: cogn(知道) + izant → 知道的 → 有意识的
words.example: Investors should be cognizant of the risks associated with volatile markets.
words.example_zh: 投资者应该意识到与波动市场相关的风险。

words.breakdown: re-(再次) + cogn-(知道) + -ize(动词后缀)
words.meaning_en: to identify someone or something from having encountered them before
words.meaning_zh: 认出，识别；承认
words.derivation: re(再次) + cogn(知道) + ize → 再次知道 → 认出
words.example: The scientific community finally recognized her contributions to the field of genetics.
words.example_zh: 科学界终于承认了她对遗传学领域的贡献。

words.meaning_en: A vertical pillar supporting a structure or a regular section in a publication.
words.meaning_zh: n. 柱，圆柱；专栏；纵队
words.derivation: column(柱子) → 柱，专栏
words.example: The ancient temple featured several marble columns supporting its impressive roof.
words.example_zh: 这座古老的寺庙有几根大理石柱子支撑着其宏伟的屋顶。

meaning_en: words related to burning and fire

words.meaning_en: able to catch fire and burn easily
words.meaning_zh: 易燃的
words.derivation: 源自拉丁语 combustus(烧尽) + ible(能…的) → 能燃烧的
words.example: Keep combustible materials away from open flames.
words.example_zh: 易燃物品要远离明火。
words.mnemonic: come + bust(爆) + ible → 一来就爆 → 易燃的

words.meaning_en: to catch fire or cause to catch fire
words.meaning_zh: 点燃，引燃
words.derivation: 源自拉丁语 ignis(火) + ite → 使着火 → 点燃
words.example: A single spark can ignite a devastating forest fire.
words.example_zh: 一点火星就能引发毁灭性的森林大火。
words.mnemonic: ig(火) + nite(夜) → 夜晚点火 → 点燃

words.meaning_en: easily set on fire (same meaning as flammable)
words.meaning_zh: 易燃的
words.derivation: in(进入) + flamm(火焰) + able(能…的) → 能进入火焰状态 → 易燃的
words.example: The sign warned that the chemicals stored inside were highly inflammable.
words.example_zh: 标志警告说里面储存的化学品极易燃烧。
words.mnemonic: in + flame(火焰) + able → 能着火的 → 易燃的

words.meaning_en: To successfully deal with or defeat a problem or difficulty.
words.meaning_zh: vt. 战胜，克服，胜过
words.derivation: over(超过) + come(来) → 越过困难而来 → 克服
words.example: She worked hard to overcome her fear of public speaking through practice and preparation.
words.example_zh: 她通过练习和准备努力克服了对公开演讲的恐惧。

meaning_en: words related to self-satisfaction and smugness
meaning_zh: 与自满和得意相关的词

words.breakdown: com-(完全) + plac-(取悦) + -ent(形容词后缀)
words.meaning_en: showing smug or uncritical satisfaction with oneself
words.meaning_zh: 自满的，得意的
words.derivation: com(完全) + plac(取悦) + ent(…的) → 完全自我满足的 → 自满的
words.example: We must not become complacent about the progress we have made.
words.example_zh: 我们不能因为取得的进步而变得自满。
words.mnemonic: com + place(位置) + ent → 对自己的位置完全满意 → 自满的

words.breakdown: com-(完全) + plais-(取悦) + -ant(形容词后缀)
words.meaning_en: willing to please others; obliging
words.meaning_zh: 彬彬有礼的，殷勤的
words.derivation: com(完全) + plais(取悦) + ant(…的) → 完全取悦他人的 → 殷勤的
words.example: The complaisant host made sure every guest felt welcome.
words.example_zh: 殷勤的主人确保每位客人都感到受欢迎。
words.mnemonic: 与complacent仅一字之差：complaisant是对别人满意(彬彬有礼)，complacent是对自己满意(自满)

meaning_en: words related to reconciliation and mediation
meaning_zh: 与调和与斡旋相关的词

words.breakdown: con-(一起) + cili-(召集) + -ation(名词后缀)
words.meaning_en: the action of stopping someone from being angry; mediation
words.meaning_zh: 调解，和解
words.derivation: con(一起) + cili(召集) + ation(行为) → 召集到一起的行为 → 调解
words.example: International conciliation efforts helped end the border dispute.
words.example_zh: 国际调解努力帮助结束了边界争端。
words.mnemonic: con + 西里(cili) + ation → 把人召集在一起商议 → 调解

words.meaning_en: to restore friendly relations; to make compatible
words.meaning_zh: 和解，调和
words.derivation: re(再) + con(一起) + cile(召集) → 再次召集到一起 → 和解
words.example: The couple reconciled after months of separation.
words.example_zh: 这对夫妻在分居数月后和好了。
words.mnemonic: re + con + 赛(cile) → 再次让双方一起比赛 → 和好

words.meaning_en: An official agreement or treaty; to give or grant someone power or recognition.
words.meaning_zh: n. 一致，协定 vt. 给予，使一致
words.derivation: ac(表示to) + cord(心) → 心心相印 → 一致
words.example: The two nations signed a peace accord after years of conflict and negotiation.
words.example_zh: 经过多年的冲突和谈判，两国签署了和平协定。

words.meaning_en: The central or most important part of something.
words.meaning_zh: n. 核心，要点，果心
words.derivation: cor(=cord 心) → 中心 → 核心
words.example: Critical thinking skills form the core of a good liberal arts education.
words.example_zh: 批判性思维技能构成了良好的文科教育的核心。

words.meaning_en: A portable musical instrument with bellows and keys or buttons.
words.meaning_zh: n. 手风琴 a. 可折叠的
words.derivation: accord(和谐) + ion(名词后缀) → 发出和谐声音的乐器 → 手风琴
words.example: The street musician played a cheerful melody on his accordion to entertain passersby.
words.example_zh: 街头音乐家用手风琴演奏欢快的旋律来娱乐路人。

meaning_en: Note: 'corn' here means corner, not the prefix; from angle, horn
meaning_zh: 注：此处'corn'意为角落，非前缀；源自角，角落

words.meaning_en: A fundamental basis or most important element of something.
words.meaning_zh: n. 基石，基础，奠基石
words.derivation: corner(角) + stone(石头) → 角落的石头 → 奠基石 → 基础
words.example: Freedom of speech is considered a cornerstone of democratic society.
words.example_zh: 言论自由被认为是民主社会的基石。

words.meaning_en: The luminous envelope surrounding the sun or a crown-like structure.
words.meaning_zh: n. 日冕，冠状物，光环
words.derivation: coron(冠) + a(名词后缀) → 冠状物 → 日冕
words.example: During the solar eclipse, observers could see the sun's corona extending millions of miles into space.
words.example_zh: 在日食期间，观察者可以看到太阳的日冕延伸到太空数百万英里。

words.meaning_en: A military unit or an organized group with a common purpose.
words.meaning_zh: n. 军团，兵团，部队
words.derivation: corp(体 → 团体) → 团体 → 军团
words.example: The Marine Corps is known for its rigorous training and strong tradition of service.
words.example_zh: 海军陆战队以其严格的训练和强大的服务传统而闻名。

words.meaning_en: relating to a large company or group
words.meaning_zh: 公司的，法人的
words.derivation: corpor(身体) + ate(…的) → 形成一个整体的 → 公司的
words.example: The corporate headquarters is located in downtown Manhattan.
words.example_zh: 公司总部位于曼哈顿市中心。

words.breakdown: in-(进入) + corpor-(身体) + -ate(动词后缀)
words.meaning_en: to include as part of a whole; to combine
words.meaning_zh: 合并，包含
words.derivation: in(进入) + corpor(身体) + ate → 纳入整体中 → 合并
words.example: The new design incorporates feedback from hundreds of users.
words.example_zh: 新设计融合了数百名用户的反馈。

words.meaning_en: having a large, bulky body; fat
words.meaning_zh: 肥胖的
words.derivation: corp(身体) + ulent(充满) → 身体充实的 → 肥胖的
words.example: The corpulent gentleman struggled to fit into the narrow airplane seat.
words.example_zh: 那位肥胖的绅士费力地挤进狭窄的飞机座位。

words.meaning_en: relating to a person's body; physical rather than spiritual
words.meaning_zh: 肉体的，有形的
words.derivation: corpor(身体) + eal(…的) → 身体的 → 肉体的
words.example: Philosophers have long debated the relationship between corporeal and spiritual existence.
words.example_zh: 哲学家们长期以来一直在争论肉体存在与精神存在之间的关系。

words.meaning_en: relating to the universe or cosmos
words.meaning_zh: 宇宙的
words.derivation: cosm(宇宙) + ic(…的) → 宇宙的
words.example: Scientists study cosmic radiation to learn about the origins of the universe.
words.example_zh: 科学家研究宇宙辐射以了解宇宙的起源。

words.breakdown: cosm-(世界) + polit-(城市/公民) + -an(…的人)
words.meaning_en: familiar with and at ease in many different countries and cultures
words.meaning_zh: 国际化的，世界性的
words.derivation: cosm(世界) + polit(公民) + an → 世界公民 → 国际化的
words.example: New York is one of the most cosmopolitan cities in the world.
words.example_zh: 纽约是世界上最国际化的城市之一。

words.meaning_en: the universe seen as a well-ordered whole
words.meaning_zh: 宇宙
words.derivation: 源自希腊语 kosmos，意为秩序、宇宙
words.example: Ancient Greek philosophers pondered the nature of the cosmos.
words.example_zh: 古希腊哲学家思考宇宙的本质。

words.meaning_en: A set of clothes worn to represent a character or for a special occasion.
words.meaning_zh: n. 服装，装束，戏服
words.derivation: costum(习俗) + e → 按习俗穿的衣服 → 服装
words.example: The actors wore elaborate costumes to accurately portray characters from the Victorian era.
words.example_zh: 演员们穿着精致的服装以准确地描绘维多利亚时代的人物。

words.meaning_en: A reduction in price or to regard something as unimportant.
words.meaning_zh: n. 折扣，贴现 vt. 打折，不重视
words.derivation: dis(分离) + count(计算) → 从总数中分离出去 → 打折扣
words.example: The store offered a significant discount on electronics during the holiday sale.
words.example_zh: 在假日促销期间，这家商店对电子产品提供了大幅折扣。

words.meaning_en: A record of financial transactions or a report explaining something.
words.meaning_zh: n. 账户，账目；报告，说明 v. 解释，认为
words.derivation: ac(向) + count(计算) → 向...计算 → 账户；解释
words.example: The company's financial account showed significant profit growth this quarter.
words.example_zh: 公司的财务账目显示本季度利润大幅增长。

words.meaning_en: To determine the total number of something or consider something important.
words.meaning_zh: v. 计算，数；重要 n. 计数，总数
words.derivation: count(计算) → 计数；重要
words.example: Every vote will count in this close election.
words.example_zh: 在这次势均力敌的选举中，每一票都很重要。

words.meaning_en: A flat surface for transactions or a device for counting.
words.meaning_zh: n. 柜台；计数器 a. 相反的 v. 反击
words.derivation: count(计算) + -er(物) → 计算的东西 → 计数器；柜台
words.example: Please place your items on the counter for checkout.
words.example_zh: 请把你的物品放在柜台上结账。

words.meaning_en: To tell a story in detail or count again.
words.meaning_zh: v. 详述，叙述；重新计算 n. 重新计算
words.derivation: re(再) + count(计算；叙述) → 再次计算或叙述 → 重新计算；详述
words.example: The historian recounted the events leading to the revolution.
words.example_zh: 历史学家详细叙述了导致革命的事件。

words.meaning_en: The system of recording and summarizing business financial transactions.
words.meaning_zh: n. 会计学，会计工作
words.derivation: ac(向) + count(计算) + -ing(行为) → 计算账目的行为 → 会计
words.example: She majored in accounting and now works for a major firm.
words.example_zh: 她主修会计学，现在在一家大公司工作。

words.meaning_en: A person or thing that corresponds to another in position or function.
words.meaning_zh: n. 对应物，相应的人或物
words.derivation: counter(相对) + part(部分) → 相对应的部分 → 对应物
words.example: The British Prime Minister met with his Japanese counterpart to discuss trade.
words.example_zh: 英国首相与日本首相会面讨论贸易问题。

words.meaning_en: Two individuals or things of the same sort considered together.
words.meaning_zh: n. 一对，夫妇；几个 v. 连接，结合
words.derivation: couple(连接) → 连在一起的两个 → 一对
words.example: The couple celebrated their tenth wedding anniversary last week.
words.example_zh: 这对夫妇上周庆祝了他们的结婚十周年纪念日。

words.meaning_en: To give support, confidence, or hope to someone.
words.meaning_zh: v. 鼓励，激励，支持
words.derivation: en(使) + cour(心) + -age → 使有心 → 鼓励
words.example: Teachers should encourage students to ask questions in class.
words.example_zh: 教师应该鼓励学生在课堂上提问。

words.meaning_en: To cause someone to lose confidence or enthusiasm.
words.meaning_zh: v. 使气馁，使沮丧；阻止
words.derivation: dis(不) + cour(心) + -age → 使失去心气 → 使气馁
words.example: High prices may discourage consumers from purchasing luxury goods.
words.example_zh: 高价可能会阻止消费者购买奢侈品。

words.meaning_en: Possessing or characterized by bravery and determination.
words.meaning_zh: a. 勇敢的，英勇的，有胆量的
words.derivation: cour(心) + -age + -ous(有...的) → 有心气的 → 勇敢的
words.example: The firefighter made a courageous decision to enter the burning building.
words.example_zh: 消防员做出了勇敢的决定，进入燃烧的建筑物。

words.meaning_en: A series of classes or the direction something moves in.
words.meaning_zh: n. 课程；路线，方向；一道菜 v. 流动
words.derivation: cours(跑，流) → 行进的路线 → 课程；路线
words.example: I enrolled in an advanced biology course this semester.
words.example_zh: 我这学期报名参加了一门高级生物课程。

words.meaning_en: A natural or artificial channel through which water flows.
words.meaning_zh: n. 水道，河道，水流
words.derivation: water(水) + cours(流) → 水流动的地方 → 水道
words.example: The ancient watercourse provided irrigation for the entire valley.
words.example_zh: 这条古老的水道为整个山谷提供灌溉。

words.meaning_en: To regain health, strength, or a previous condition.
words.meaning_zh: v. 恢复，康复；重新获得，找回
words.derivation: re(再) + cover(覆盖) → 再次覆盖 → 恢复原状
words.example: It took several weeks for the patient to recover from the surgery.
words.example_zh: 病人花了几周时间才从手术中恢复过来。

words.meaning_en: To move slowly on hands and knees or with the body close to ground.
words.meaning_zh: v. 爬行，匍匐前进 n. 爬行，自由泳
words.derivation: crawl(爬行) → 贴地缓慢移动 → 爬行
words.example: The baby is learning to crawl before she can walk.
words.example_zh: 这个婴儿在学会走路之前正在学习爬行。

words.meaning_en: A narrow opening or a sharp sound produced by breaking.
words.meaning_zh: n. 裂缝，裂纹；爆裂声 v. (使)破裂，(使)爆裂
words.derivation: crack(破裂) → 发出破裂声或形成裂缝 → 裂缝；爆裂
words.example: A crack appeared in the wall after the earthquake.
words.example_zh: 地震后墙上出现了一条裂缝。

words.meaning_en: A crustacean with a broad flat shell and pincers.
words.meaning_zh: n. 螃蟹，蟹肉 v. 捕蟹；抱怨
words.derivation: crab(螃蟹) → 横行的甲壳动物 → 螃蟹
words.example: We caught several crabs during our trip to the beach.
words.example_zh: 我们在海滩旅行期间捕获了几只螃蟹。

words.meaning_en: Relating to the skull or the part of the head that encloses the brain.
words.meaning_zh: a. 头盖的，颅骨的
words.derivation: crani(头骨) + -al(的) → 与头骨有关的 → 颅骨的
words.example: The doctor examined the patient's cranial nerves for any abnormalities.
words.example_zh: 医生检查了病人的颅神经是否有任何异常。

words.meaning_en: A small bed for an infant or the place where something originates.
words.meaning_zh: n. 摇篮；发源地，发祥地 v. 轻抱
words.derivation: cradle(摇篮) → 婴儿的床或起源地 → 摇篮；发源地
words.example: Greece is often called the cradle of Western civilization.
words.example_zh: 希腊常被称为西方文明的摇篮。

words.meaning_en: To force too much into a space or study intensively before an exam.
words.meaning_zh: v. 塞满，填满；死记硬背 n. 拥挤
words.derivation: cram(塞满) → 强行塞入或临时强记 → 塞满；死记硬背
words.example: Many students cram for exams the night before instead of studying regularly.
words.example_zh: 许多学生在考试前一晚死记硬背，而不是定期学习。

words.meaning_en: A large bowl-shaped depression formed by impact or volcanic activity.
words.meaning_zh: n. 火山口，环形山，弹坑
words.derivation: crater(火山口) → 碗状凹陷 → 火山口；弹坑
words.example: The meteor created a massive crater when it struck the earth.
words.example_zh: 陨石撞击地球时形成了一个巨大的弹坑。

words.meaning_en: An amount that exceeds what is needed or used.
words.meaning_zh: n. 剩余，盈余；a. 过剩的，多余的
words.derivation: sur(在…之上) + plus(更多) → 超出需要的部分 → 剩余
words.example: The government's budget surplus allowed for increased spending on education programs.
words.example_zh: 政府的预算盈余使得教育项目的支出得以增加。

words.meaning_en: An activity involving skill in making things by hand.
words.meaning_zh: n. 技艺，手艺，工艺；vt. 精心制作
words.derivation: craft(技艺) → 手工制作的技能 → 技艺
words.example: The artisan spent years perfecting her craft of pottery making.
words.example_zh: 这位工匠花了数年时间完善她的陶艺制作技艺。

words.meaning_en: A skilled worker who makes things by hand.
words.meaning_zh: n. 工匠，技工，手艺人
words.derivation: craft(技艺) + man(人) → 掌握技艺的人 → 工匠
words.example: The furniture was made by a master craftsman who specialized in woodworking.
words.example_zh: 这件家具是由一位专门从事木工的工匠大师制作的。

words.meaning_en: A painful involuntary muscle contraction or a restriction of space.
words.meaning_zh: n. 痉挛，抽筋；vt. 限制，束缚
words.derivation: cramp(收缩) → 肌肉突然收缩 → 痉挛
words.example: The swimmer had to stop because of a painful cramp in her leg.
words.example_zh: 这位游泳者因腿部剧烈抽筋而不得不停下来。

words.meaning_en: Uncomfortably small or restricted in space.
words.meaning_zh: a. 狭窄的，拥挤的
words.derivation: cramp(限制) + ed → 被限制的空间 → 狭窄的
words.example: The students complained about the cramped conditions in the temporary classroom.
words.example_zh: 学生们抱怨临时教室里的拥挤环境。

meaning_zh: 支持（或实行）... 统治的人

words.breakdown: aristo(最好的) + crat(统治) + ic(形容词后缀)
words.meaning_en: Belonging to or typical of the aristocracy or upper class.
words.meaning_zh: a. 贵族的，贵族式的
words.derivation: aristo(最好的) + crat(统治) + ic → 最好的人统治的 → 贵族的
words.example: The mansion's aristocratic architecture reflected the wealth of its original owners.
words.example_zh: 这座豪宅的贵族式建筑反映了其原主人的财富。

words.meaning_en: A person who supports democracy or democratic principles.
words.meaning_zh: n. 民主主义者，民主党党员
words.derivation: demo(人民) + crat(统治者) → 主张人民统治的人 → 民主主义者
words.example: As a lifelong democrat, she believed in equal representation for all citizens.
words.example_zh: 作为一个终身的民主主义者，她相信所有公民都应有平等的代表权。

words.meaning_en: contemptibly lacking in courage; cowardly
words.meaning_zh: 怯懦的，胆小的
words.derivation: 源自中古英语 cravant(被击败的)
words.example: The craven soldier deserted his post when the battle began.
words.example_zh: 那个胆小的士兵在战斗开始时就擅离了岗位。
words.mnemonic: cave(洞穴) + n → 躲在洞穴里 → 怯懦的

words.meaning_en: to shrink back in fear or embarrassment; to behave in a servile way
words.meaning_zh: 畏缩，谄媚
words.derivation: 源自古英语 cringan(屈服、倒下)
words.example: She cringed at the thought of having to speak in front of the whole school.
words.example_zh: 一想到要在全校面前发言，她就畏缩了。
words.mnemonic: cry(哭) + inge → 哭着缩起来 → 畏缩

words.meaning_en: Mentally unstable or extremely enthusiastic about something.
words.meaning_zh: a. 疯狂的，狂热的
words.derivation: craze(疯狂) + y → 处于疯狂状态的 → 疯狂的
words.example: The fans went crazy when their favorite band appeared on stage.
words.example_zh: 当他们最喜欢的乐队出现在舞台上时，粉丝们疯狂了。

words.breakdown: cre(创造) + at(动词后缀) + ive(形容词后缀)
words.meaning_en: Having the ability to produce original and imaginative ideas.
words.meaning_zh: a. 有创造力的，创造性的
words.derivation: cre(创造) + ative → 能够创造的 → 有创造力的
words.example: The company seeks creative solutions to reduce environmental impact.
words.example_zh: 该公司寻求创造性的解决方案来减少环境影响。

words.breakdown: de-(向下) + cre(生长) + ase(动词后缀)
words.meaning_en: To become or make smaller in size, amount, or intensity.
words.meaning_zh: v. 减少，降低；n. 减少
words.derivation: de(向下) + cre(生长) → 向下生长 → 减少
words.example: The population of endangered species continues to decrease despite conservation efforts.
words.example_zh: 尽管进行了保护工作，濒危物种的数量仍在继续减少。

words.breakdown: cre(创造) + at(动词后缀) + iv(形容词后缀) + ity(名词后缀)
words.meaning_en: The ability to use imagination to produce original ideas.
words.meaning_zh: n. 创造力，创造性
words.derivation: cre(创造) + ativity → 创造的能力 → 创造力
words.example: The teacher encouraged creativity by allowing students to design their own projects.
words.example_zh: 老师通过允许学生设计自己的项目来鼓励创造力。

words.breakdown: con-(共同) + cre(生长) + te(后缀)
words.meaning_en: Existing in physical form; specific rather than abstract.
words.meaning_zh: a. 具体的，实在的；n. 混凝土
words.derivation: con(共同) + cre(生长) → 生长在一起的 → 凝固的，具体的
words.example: The researcher needed concrete evidence to support her hypothesis.
words.example_zh: 研究人员需要具体的证据来支持她的假设。

words.breakdown: in-(向内) + cre(生长) + ment(名词后缀)
words.meaning_en: An increase or addition, especially one of a series.
words.meaning_zh: n. 增加，增量
words.derivation: in(向内) + cre(生长) + ment → 向内生长的量 → 增量
words.example: The salary increment was based on the employee's years of service.
words.example_zh: 薪资增量是根据员工的工作年限确定的。

words.meaning_en: The curved shape of the moon in its first or last quarter.
words.meaning_zh: n. 新月，月牙形；a. 新月形的
words.derivation: cresc(生长) + ent → 正在生长的 → 新月(逐渐变大)
words.example: The crescent moon was visible just above the horizon at dusk.
words.example_zh: 黄昏时，新月刚好在地平线上可见。

words.meaning_en: A narrow opening or crack, especially in rock or wall.
words.meaning_zh: n. 裂缝，缝隙
words.derivation: crev(裂开) + ice → 裂开的地方 → 裂缝
words.example: Small plants managed to grow in the crevices of the stone wall.
words.example_zh: 小植物设法在石墙的裂缝中生长。

words.meaning_en: able to be believed; convincing
words.meaning_zh: 可信的，可靠的
words.derivation: cred(相信) + ible(能…的) → 能被相信的 → 可信的
words.example: The witness provided a credible account of the events.
words.example_zh: 证人对事件提供了可信的描述。

words.meaning_en: impossible to believe; extraordinary
words.meaning_zh: 难以置信的，惊人的
words.derivation: in(不) + cred(相信) + ible(能…的) → 不能相信的 → 难以置信的
words.example: The speed of technological change is incredible.
words.example_zh: 技术变革的速度令人难以置信。

words.meaning_en: a qualification or achievement that proves capability
words.meaning_zh: 证书，资格证明
words.derivation: cred(信任) + ential(名词后缀) → 让人信任的凭证 → 资格证明
words.example: She presented her credentials to the hiring committee.
words.example_zh: 她向招聘委员会出示了自己的资格证明。

words.meaning_en: the ability to obtain goods before payment based on trust; recognition
words.meaning_zh: 信用；学分；功劳
words.derivation: cred(相信) + it → 基于相信给予的 → 信用
words.example: Students need 120 credits to graduate.
words.example_zh: 学生需要修满120个学分才能毕业。

words.meaning_en: to harm the good reputation of someone
words.meaning_zh: 使不可信，使丢脸
words.derivation: dis(否定) + cred(相信) + it → 使人不再相信 → 使不可信
words.example: New evidence discredited the old theory.
words.example_zh: 新证据推翻了旧理论的可信度。

words.meaning_en: unwilling or unable to believe something; showing disbelief
words.meaning_zh: 不轻信的，表示怀疑的
words.derivation: in(不) + cred(相信) + ulous(倾向…的) → 不倾向于相信的 → 不轻信的
words.example: The audience was incredulous when the speaker claimed to have solved the decades-old problem.
words.example_zh: 当演讲者声称已经解决了这个几十年的难题时，听众表示难以置信。

words.meaning_en: a tendency to be too ready to believe that something is real or true
words.meaning_zh: 轻信，易受骗
words.derivation: cred(相信) + ulity(性质) → 过于容易相信的性质 → 轻信
words.example: Scam artists often exploit the credulity of vulnerable populations.
words.example_zh: 诈骗分子经常利用弱势群体的轻信。

words.meaning_en: To give official authorization or recognition to an institution.
words.meaning_zh: vt. 授权，认可，委派
words.derivation: ac(向) + credit(信任) → 给予信任 → 授权，认可
words.example: The university was accredited by the national education board last year.
words.example_zh: 这所大学去年获得了国家教育委员会的认可。

words.meaning_en: To move slowly and carefully with the body close to ground.
words.meaning_zh: vi. 爬行，蔓延；n. 爬行
words.derivation: creep(爬行) → 缓慢移动 → 爬行
words.example: The fog began to creep across the valley as night fell.
words.example_zh: 夜幕降临时，雾开始在山谷中蔓延。

words.meaning_en: The top or highest part of something, especially a hill or wave.
words.meaning_zh: n. 顶峰，波峰，冠；vt. 到达顶点
words.derivation: crest(顶部) → 最高点 → 顶峰
words.example: The hikers finally reached the crest of the mountain after hours of climbing.
words.example_zh: 经过数小时的攀登，徒步旅行者终于到达了山顶。

words.meaning_en: Individually separate and distinct from others.
words.meaning_zh: a. 离散的，不连续的
words.derivation: dis(分开) + cret(分离) → 分离开的 → 离散的
words.example: The data was divided into discrete categories for easier analysis.
words.example_zh: 数据被划分为离散的类别以便于分析。

words.meaning_en: To produce and discharge a substance from cells or glands.
words.meaning_zh: vt. 分泌，隐藏
words.derivation: se(分离) + cret(分离) → 分离出去 → 分泌
words.example: The pancreas secretes insulin to regulate blood sugar levels.
words.example_zh: 胰腺分泌胰岛素来调节血糖水平。

words.meaning_zh: n. 全体人员, 一群人, 全体队员\ncrow的过去式
n. 标准, 准则, 规范\n[化] 判据
pl. 标准\n[计] 条件
n. 十字号\na. 纵横交错的; 交叉的
n. 犯罪, 罪行, 罪恶\n[法] 犯罪, 罪, 罪恶
v. 区别, 差别待遇
(往复)曲折, 断裂, 临界的, 极限的
a. 伪善的, 伪善者的
v. 批评, 吹毛求疵, 非难
n. 批评家, 鉴定家
n. 评论文章, 评论
a. 弯曲的, 歪的, 邪恶的
n. 横越, 横渡, 交叉点, 渡口\n[经] 划线
n. 王冠, 王权, 顶点\nvt. 使成王, 加冕, 居...之顶
a. 甲壳纲的\nn. 甲壳纲动物
vt. 弄皱, 压皱\nvi. 崩溃, 变皱
n. 压碎, 粉碎, 群众, 迷恋\nvt. 压破, 征服, 塞, 弄皱, 榨出\nvi. 被压碎, 起皱, 挤

words.meaning_en: a vigorous campaign for a cause; historically, a medieval military expedition
words.meaning_zh: 十字军东征；运动
words.derivation: crus(十字) + ade(行动) → 以十字为名的行动 → 十字军东征/运动
words.example: The organization launched a crusade against childhood hunger.
words.example_zh: 该组织发起了一场消除儿童饥饿的运动。

words.meaning_en: of great importance; decisive
words.meaning_zh: 至关重要的，决定性的
words.derivation: cruc(十字) + ial(…的) → 处于十字路口的 → 关键的
words.example: Adequate sleep is crucial for academic performance.
words.example_zh: 充足的睡眠对学业表现至关重要。

words.meaning_en: the decisive or most important point at issue
words.meaning_zh: 关键，核心问题
words.derivation: 源自拉丁语 crux，十字→交叉点→关键点
words.example: The crux of the problem is a lack of funding.
words.example_zh: 问题的关键在于缺乏资金。

words.meaning_zh: a. 天然的, 未成熟的, 粗糙的, 粗鲁的\nn. 天然的物质
n. 外壳, 坚硬外皮, 面包皮\nvt. 盖以硬皮\nvi. 结硬皮
vt. 包上外壳, 镶嵌外层\nvi. 结壳
a. 地壳的\n[医] 痂的; 壳的
vt. 使结晶, 使具体化\nvi. 结晶, 具体化
n. 水晶, 水晶装饰品, 结晶\na. 水晶的, 水晶一样的, 透明的
n. 援救, 解救, 营救\nvt. 援救, 救出, 营救

words.breakdown: in-(加强意义) + cub(卧) + -ate(动词后缀)
words.meaning_zh: vt. 孵, 培养, 使发展\nvi. 孵蛋, 潜伏, 筑巢, 孵化, 酝酿\nn. 孵育物
words.derivation: in(加强意义) + cub(卧) + ate(动词后缀) → 孵

words.meaning_zh: n. 立方体, 立方\n[机] 立方体, 立方
n. 立体派
vi. 到绝顶, 达于极点, 达到高潮\nvt. 使到绝顶, 使达到高潮

words.meaning_en: deserving blame
words.meaning_zh: 有罪的，该受责备的
words.derivation: culp(罪) + able(能…的) → 能被定罪的 → 有罪的
words.example: The investigation determined that the manager was culpable for the safety violations.
words.example_zh: 调查认定经理应对安全违规承担责任。

words.meaning_en: a person responsible for a crime or wrongdoing
words.meaning_zh: 罪犯，肇事者
words.derivation: culp(罪) + rit(人) → 有罪的人 → 罪犯
words.example: Carbon dioxide emissions are the main culprit behind global warming.
words.example_zh: 二氧化碳排放是全球变暖的主要元凶。

words.meaning_en: to clear from blame or guilt
words.meaning_zh: 使无罪，为…开脱
words.derivation: ex(离开) + culp(罪) + ate(动词后缀) → 使脱离罪责 → 为…开脱
words.example: New DNA evidence was used to exculpate the wrongly convicted prisoner.
words.example_zh: 新的DNA证据被用来为那名被错误定罪的囚犯洗脱罪名。

words.meaning_en: to accuse or incriminate
words.meaning_zh: 控告，使有罪
words.derivation: in(进入) + culp(罪) + ate(动词后缀) → 使陷入罪中 → 控告
words.example: The leaked emails inculpated several senior officials in the corruption scandal.
words.example_zh: 泄露的电子邮件使几名高级官员在腐败丑闻中被牵连。

words.meaning_zh: vt. 培养, 耕作
words.derivation: culti(耕) + 培(养) + ate(动词后缀) → 培养

words.meaning_zh: n. 再次培养, 亚文化群\n[医] 次代培养物, 次培养物

words.meaning_en: to fail to resist pressure or temptation; to die from an illness
words.meaning_zh: 屈服，屈从；死于
words.derivation: suc(下) + cumb(躺下) → 躺倒在下面 → 屈服
words.example: Many species succumb to habitat loss caused by rapid deforestation.
words.example_zh: 许多物种因快速的森林砍伐导致的栖息地丧失而消亡。

words.breakdown: in-(在…上) + cumb-(倚靠) + -ent(形容词/名词后缀)
words.meaning_en: currently holding an office; obligatory; the current holder of an office
words.meaning_zh: 现任的；义不容辞的；现任者
words.derivation: in(在…上) + cumb(倚靠) + ent → 倚靠在职位上的 → 现任的
words.example: The incumbent president faces a tough challenge from the opposition candidate.
words.example_zh: 现任总统面临来自反对派候选人的严峻挑战。

words.meaning_en: to restrict or burden; to hamper
words.meaning_zh: 妨碍，拖累
words.derivation: en(使) + cumber(重担) → 使承受重担 → 妨碍/拖累
words.example: Excessive regulations can encumber small businesses and slow economic growth.
words.example_zh: 过多的法规会拖累小企业并减缓经济增长。

words.meaning_zh: vt. 占领, 占(时间、空间等), 住进, 担任, 使从事, 使全神贯注\n[法] 占领, 占据, 占有
n. 抢先占据, 先人之见, 入神\n[医] 成见, 注意散漫, 心不在焉
n. 好奇心, 新奇的事物, 珍品
a. 无虑的, 安心的, 安全的, 可靠的, 保险的\nvt. 固定, 获得, 保证, 使安全, 掩护, 招致\nvi. 停止操作, 船抛锚
n. 精确, 正确\n[计] 准确度
a. 正确的, 精确的\n[经] 准确的, 精确的
a. 治病的, 有疗效的\nn. 药物, 治疗法
n. 课程\n[医] 课程, 学程
vi. 发生, 被想到, 存在
n. 涌流, 趋势, 流\na. 流通的, 现在的, 当前的, 流行的\n[计] 当前的
vt. 招致, 蒙受, 遭遇\n[经] 招致, 蒙受, 担负
n. 侵入, 侵略, 奇袭
[计] 循环的\n[医] 复发的, 再发的
vi. 同意, 一致, 同时发生\n[法] 同时发生, 并发, 同意
n. 拳曲, 鬈发\nvt. 弄卷\nvi. 拳曲, 弯曲
n. 先驱者, 前导, 前兆\n[化] 前体; 前身; 产物母体
words.derivation: pre(先) + curs(跑 → 行) + or(者) → 先驱者

words.meaning_zh: vt. 缩减, 剥夺, 简略\n[法] 剥夺特权

meaning_en: words related to being brief or restrained
meaning_zh: 与简短和克制相关的词

words.meaning_en: rudely brief or abrupt in speech or manner
words.meaning_zh: 简短无礼的，唐突的
words.derivation: 源自拉丁语 curtus(缩短的)
words.example: His curt reply suggested he was not interested in continuing the conversation.
words.example_zh: 他简短无礼的回复表明他不想继续对话。
words.mnemonic: cut(切) + r → 像被剪断一样简短 → 唐突的

words.meaning_en: to restrain or keep in check
words.meaning_zh: 抑制，控制
words.derivation: 源自拉丁语 curvare(弯曲) → 弯下来控制 → 抑制
words.example: The government introduced measures to curb inflation.
words.example_zh: 政府出台了控制通胀的措施。
words.mnemonic: curve(弯曲) → 弯下来 → 抑制

words.meaning_zh: n. 曲线, 弯曲, 曲线球\nvt. 弯, 使弯曲\nvi. 成曲形
vt. 指责, 控告, 归咎于\nvi. 指责, 控告
n. 海关, 关卡, 关税\n[经] 关税, 海关
vt. 使习惯于
vt. 使再循环, 重新利用, 再制\nn. 再循环

meaning_en: words related to cynicism and distrust
meaning_zh: 与愤世嫉俗和不信任相关的词

words.meaning_en: a person who believes that people are motivated purely by self-interest
words.meaning_zh: 愤世嫉俗者
words.derivation: 源自希腊语 kynikos(像犬的)，古希腊犬儒学派蔑视世俗规范
words.example: The old cynic dismissed all acts of charity as mere publicity stunts.
words.example_zh: 这个老愤世嫉俗者把所有慈善行为都当作纯粹的公关噱头。
words.mnemonic: cyn(犬) + ic → 像犬一样吠叫质疑一切 → 愤世嫉俗者

words.meaning_en: distrustful of human sincerity or integrity
words.meaning_zh: 愤世嫉俗的，怀疑的
words.derivation: cynic(犬儒) + al(…的) → 像犬儒一样的 → 愤世嫉俗的
words.example: Years of corruption made the public increasingly cynical about politics.
words.example_zh: 多年的腐败使公众对政治越来越持怀疑态度。
words.mnemonic: cynic(愤世嫉俗者) + al → 愤世嫉俗的

words.meaning_zh: n. 水坝, 障碍\nv. 控制, 筑坝\n[计] 直接存取法

n. 潮湿, 湿气
a. 潮湿的
vt. 使潮湿, 使阻尼, 抑止
vi. 变潮湿, 衰减
vt. 危及\n[法] 使危险, 危及
a. 有生命危险的；濒临灭绝的
n. 日期, 约会, 枣椰树\nvt. 约会, 定日期\nvi. 注明日期, 过时
n. 数据库\n[计] 数据库
n. 日期
n. 破晓, 黎明\nvi. 破晓
n. 雏菊, 一流人物\na. 第一流的
a. 眼花缭乱的, 耀眼的
n. 耽搁, 迟滞\nv. 耽搁, 延迟\n[计] 延迟, 延时
n. 程度, 度数, 学位, 度\n[医] 度, 程度
n. 最后期限, 截止期限\n[经] 截止日期
n. 破坏, 毁灭\n[医] 破坏
a. 毁灭性的, 破坏的, 有害的\n[医] 破坏的, 毁坏的
a. 十进位的, 小数的\nn. 十进制, 小数\n[计] 十进制, 小数点
n. 赤字, 不足额\n[医] 短缺
n. 十年, 十

n. 交易, 协定, 数量, 买卖, 松木板
vi. 处理, 应付, 做生意
vt. 分配, 发牌, 给予
[计] 发牌
n. 债务, 罪过\n[经] 借款, 欠款, 债务
v. 装饰
a. 装饰性的
a. 有分寸的, 得体的, 大方的

meaning_zh: 有害的，破坏性的（伤害联想）

words.meaning_en: causing harm or damage
words.meaning_zh: 有害的，有毒的
words.derivation: deleter(有害的) + ious(…的) → 有害的
words.example: Prolonged exposure to ultraviolet radiation has deleterious effects on human skin.
words.example_zh: 长期暴露在紫外线辐射下对人体皮肤有害。
words.mnemonic: delete(删除) + rious → 像删除一样具有破坏性的 → 有害的

words.breakdown: de-(向下) + tri-(磨) + ment-(名词后缀) + -al(形容词后缀)
words.meaning_en: tending to cause harm
words.meaning_zh: 有害的，不利的
words.derivation: de(向下) + tri(磨损) + ment + al(…的) → 磨损消耗的 → 有害的
words.example: Lack of sleep is detrimental to academic performance and overall health.
words.example_zh: 缺乏睡眠对学业表现和整体健康有害。
words.mnemonic: detri(磨损) + mental → 对精神有磨损的 → 有害的

words.meaning_en: making marks that cannot be removed; unforgettable
words.meaning_zh: 不可磨灭的，难忘的
words.derivation: in(不) + del(消除) + ible(能…的) → 不能被消除的 → 不可磨灭的
words.example: The experience left an indelible impression on the young researcher's career.
words.example_zh: 这段经历在这位年轻研究人员的职业生涯中留下了不可磨灭的印象。
words.mnemonic: in(不) + delete(删除) + ible → 不能被删除的 → 不可磨灭的

words.breakdown: epi-(在…之上) + dem-(人民) + -ic(形容词后缀)
words.meaning_en: a widespread occurrence of disease in a community
words.meaning_zh: 流行病；泛滥
words.derivation: epi(在…上) + dem(人民) + ic(…的) → 在人民之中蔓延的 → 流行病
words.example: The obesity epidemic has become a major public health concern worldwide.
words.example_zh: 肥胖的流行已成为全球重大的公共卫生问题。

words.breakdown: pan-(全部) + dem-(人民) + -ic(形容词后缀)
words.meaning_en: a disease prevalent over a whole country or the world
words.meaning_zh: 大流行病
words.derivation: pan(全部) + dem(人民) + ic(…的) → 涉及全部人民的 → 大流行病
words.example: The 1918 influenza pandemic killed an estimated 50 million people worldwide.
words.example_zh: 1918年的流感大流行估计在全球造成了5000万人死亡。

words.breakdown: en-(在…之内) + dem-(人民) + -ic(形容词后缀)
words.meaning_en: native to or regularly found in a certain area
words.meaning_zh: 地方性的；特有的
words.derivation: en(在…内) + dem(人民) + ic(…的) → 在特定人群中常见的 → 地方性的
words.example: Malaria is endemic to many tropical regions of the world.
words.example_zh: 疟疾是世界上许多热带地区的地方性疾病。

words.breakdown: demo-(人民) + graph-(书写) + -ic(形容词后缀)
words.meaning_en: relating to the structure of populations
words.meaning_zh: 人口统计的
words.derivation: demo(人民) + graph(书写/描述) + ic(…的) → 描述人民的 → 人口统计的
words.example: Demographic shifts have led to an aging population in many developed countries.
words.example_zh: 人口结构变化导致许多发达国家人口老龄化。

words.meaning_zh: vt. 使浓缩, 使压缩, 缩短\nvi. 浓缩, 凝结
n. 凹痕\nvt. 使凹下, 削弱\nvi. 塌陷

meaning_en: to condemn, to lessen in value
meaning_zh: 谴责，贬值（批评与贬低联想）

words.breakdown: de-(向下) + prec-(祈祷) + -ate(动词后缀)
words.meaning_en: to express disapproval of; to belittle
words.meaning_zh: 反对，抨击
words.derivation: de(向下) + prec(祈祷) + ate(动词后缀) → 向下祈祷消除 → 反对
words.example: The committee deprecated the use of harmful chemicals in agricultural practices.
words.example_zh: 委员会反对在农业中使用有害化学物质。
words.mnemonic: de(向下) + prec(祈祷) → 祈祷消除（坏事）→ 反对

words.breakdown: de-(向下) + preci-(价值) + -ate(动词后缀)
words.meaning_en: to diminish in value over time
words.meaning_zh: 贬值，折旧
words.derivation: de(向下) + preci(价值) + ate(动词后缀) → 价值向下 → 贬值
words.example: New cars depreciate significantly during the first year of ownership.
words.example_zh: 新车在购买后的第一年大幅贬值。
words.mnemonic: de(向下) + preci(价格) → 价格往下走 → 贬值

words.meaning_en: to express disapproval or disappointment
words.meaning_zh: 责备，批评
words.derivation: re(回) + proach(接近) → 逼近回来（追责）→ 责备
words.example: The report reproached the administration for its failure to address environmental concerns.
words.example_zh: 报告批评了政府未能解决环境问题。
words.mnemonic: re(再次) + proach(靠近) → 反复追问靠近 → 责备

words.breakdown: re-(再) + prim-(压制) + -and(名词/动词后缀)
words.meaning_en: a formal expression of disapproval; to rebuke officially
words.meaning_zh: 训斥，谴责
words.derivation: re(再) + prim(压制) + and → 再次压制 → 正式训斥
words.example: The employee received a reprimand for violating the company's safety protocols.
words.example_zh: 该员工因违反公司安全规程而受到训斥。
words.mnemonic: re(再) + prim(首要/压制) → 再次严厉压制 → 训斥

words.meaning_zh: vt. 回报, 给于, 付给, 汇报, 提出, 舍弃, 反映, 表示, 表演, 致使, 执行, 实施\nvi. 给予补偿\nn. 交纳, 打底
vt. 交出, 放弃, 使投降, 让与\nvi. 投降, 自首\nn. 交出, 放弃, 投降

words.meaning_en: to become progressively worse
words.meaning_zh: 恶化，变坏
words.derivation: deterior(更坏的) + ate(动词后缀) → 变得更坏 → 恶化
words.example: Air quality continues to deteriorate in heavily industrialized regions.
words.example_zh: 在重工业化地区，空气质量持续恶化。
words.mnemonic: deter（阻止）+ ior → 无法阻止地变坏 → 恶化

words.meaning_en: to make a problem or situation worse
words.meaning_zh: 加剧，恶化
words.derivation: ex(使) + acerb(尖锐/苦) + ate(动词后缀) → 使更尖锐 → 加剧
words.example: The drought was exacerbated by record-high temperatures throughout the summer.
words.example_zh: 整个夏天创纪录的高温加剧了干旱。
words.mnemonic: ex + acerb(酸) → 使更加酸苦 → 加剧恶化

words.breakdown: a-(朝向) + melior-(更好的) + -ate(动词后缀)
words.meaning_en: to make something bad better; to improve
words.meaning_zh: 改善，改良
words.derivation: a(朝向) + melior(更好的) + ate(动词后缀) → 使变得更好 → 改善
words.example: New policies were introduced to ameliorate the effects of poverty in rural communities.
words.example_zh: 新政策的出台旨在改善农村社区的贫困状况。
words.mnemonic: a + melio(更好) → 使变得更好 → 改善（与deteriorate相反）

words.meaning_en: to discourage or prevent from acting
words.meaning_zh: 阻止，威慑
words.derivation: de(离开) + ter(吓) → 吓得离开 → 阻止
words.example: Harsh penalties are intended to deter potential offenders from committing crimes.
words.example_zh: 严厉的处罚旨在阻止潜在的犯罪者犯罪。
words.mnemonic: de(离开) + ter(恐吓) → 吓退 → 阻止

words.breakdown: de-(离开) + ter-(吓) + -ent(名词/形容词后缀)
words.meaning_en: something that discourages or prevents an action
words.meaning_zh: 威慑物，阻碍物
words.derivation: de(离开) + ter(吓) + ent(…的/…物) → 起吓退作用的事物 → 威慑物
words.example: Nuclear weapons serve as a deterrent against large-scale military conflicts.
words.example_zh: 核武器是防止大规模军事冲突的威慑力量。
words.mnemonic: deter(阻止) + ent(名词后缀) → 起阻止作用的东西 → 威慑物

words.breakdown: dexter(右) + -ous(形容词后缀) + 右手比左手灵巧敏捷(→)
words.meaning_zh: a. 灵巧的, 惯用右手的
words.derivation: dexter(右) + ous(形容词后缀) + 右手比左手灵巧敏捷(→) → 灵巧的

words.meaning_zh: n. 日常饮食, 议会\nvt. 照规定饮食\nvi. 忌食
n. 子午线, 经线, 顶点\na. 子午线的, 最高点的, 顶点的
words.derivation: meri(中间) + di(日) + an(名词后缀) → 子午线

words.meaning_zh: vt. 献出, 贡献
n. 奉献, 献身, 献辞\n[计] 专用

words.breakdown: in-(表示at) + dic(言) + 说(→ 说明) + 表(明) + 表(示) + -ate(动词后缀)
words.meaning_zh: vt. 显示, 象征, 指示, 指出\n[医] 指示
words.derivation: in(表示at) + dic(言) + 说(→ 说明) + 表(明) + 表(示) + ate(动词后缀) → 显示

words.meaning_en: to say or estimate that something will happen in the future
words.meaning_zh: 预测，预言
words.derivation: pre(提前) + dict(说) → 提前说出 → 预测
words.example: Scientists predict that sea levels will continue to rise.
words.example_zh: 科学家预测海平面将继续上升。

words.meaning_en: to deny the truth of a statement by asserting the opposite
words.meaning_zh: 反驳，与…矛盾
words.derivation: contra(相反) + dict(说) → 反着说 → 反驳
words.example: The new evidence contradicts the previous theory.
words.example_zh: 新证据与之前的理论相矛盾。

words.meaning_en: to state or order authoritatively; to control or influence
words.meaning_zh: 口述；命令；支配
words.derivation: dict(说) + ate(做) → 说了就要做 → 命令
words.example: The teacher dictated the notes to the students.
words.example_zh: 老师向学生口述了笔记。

words.meaning_en: a sign or piece of information that indicates something
words.meaning_zh: 指示，迹象
words.derivation: in(朝向) + dict(说) + ation(行为) → 朝着你说的东西 → 指示
words.example: There is no indication that the economy will improve soon.
words.example_zh: 没有迹象表明经济将很快好转。

words.meaning_en: a decision on a disputed issue in a civil or criminal case
words.meaning_zh: 裁决，判决
words.derivation: ver(真实) + dict(说) → 说出真相 → 裁决
words.example: The jury reached a verdict of not guilty.
words.example_zh: 陪审团做出了无罪裁决。

words.meaning_en: a difficult, unpleasant, or embarrassing situation
words.meaning_zh: 困境，窘境
words.derivation: pre(预先) + dic(说) + ament → 预先被宣判的状况 → 困境
words.example: The hikers found themselves in a predicament when the bridge was washed away by the flood.
words.example_zh: 当桥被洪水冲走后，徒步旅行者们发现自己陷入了困境。

words.meaning_en: an official order or proclamation issued by a person in authority
words.meaning_zh: 法令，敕令
words.derivation: e(出) + dict(说) → 向外宣告 → 法令
words.example: The emperor issued an edict banning the practice throughout the empire.
words.example_zh: 皇帝颁布了一道法令，在全国范围内禁止这一做法。

words.meaning_en: to formally accuse of or charge with a serious crime
words.meaning_zh: 起诉，控告
words.derivation: in(对) + dict(宣告) → 对某人宣告罪行 → 起诉
words.example: The grand jury voted to indict the former official on corruption charges.
words.example_zh: 大陪审团投票决定以腐败罪起诉这位前官员。

words.breakdown: ab-(离开) + dic-(说，宣告) + -ate(动词后缀)
words.meaning_en: to renounce a throne, right, or responsibility formally
words.meaning_zh: 退位，放弃（权力或责任）
words.derivation: ab(离开) + dic(宣告) + ate(使…) → 宣告离开 → 退位
words.example: The king abdicated the throne in favor of his eldest son.
words.example_zh: 国王退位，将王位传给了他的长子。

words.breakdown: vin-(力量) + dict-(说，宣告) + -ive(形容词后缀)
words.meaning_en: having or showing a strong desire for revenge
words.meaning_zh: 报复性的，怀恨在心的
words.derivation: vin(力量) + dict(宣告) + ive(…的) → 用力量宣告惩罚 → 报复性的
words.example: Her vindictive ex-partner tried to sabotage her career after the breakup.
words.example_zh: 她那个怀恨在心的前任在分手后试图破坏她的事业。

words.meaning_en: an authoritative prohibition; to prohibit or forbid
words.meaning_zh: 禁令；禁止
words.derivation: inter(在…之间) + dict(命令) → 在中间下命令阻止 → 禁止
words.example: The court issued an interdict preventing the company from demolishing the historic building.
words.example_zh: 法院发出禁令，禁止该公司拆除这座历史建筑。

words.meaning_zh: vt. 使成为数字, 使计数化, 使数字化\n[计] 数字化
a. 愤怒的, 愤慨的
vt. 增威严, 使高贵, 故作显贵
n. 尊严, 高贵\n[法] 尊严, 高位, 高贵
vt. 冲淡, 稀释\na. 淡的, 稀释的
a. 勤勉的, 用功的
n. 困境, (进退两难的)窘境

words.breakdown: di-(分散) + lapid-(石头) + -ate(动词后缀)
words.meaning_en: to fall into disrepair or ruin
words.meaning_zh: 使荒废，使破旧
words.derivation: di(分散) + lapid(石头) + ate(动词后缀) → 石头散落 → 建筑坍塌破旧
words.example: The once-grand hotel had dilapidated over decades of neglect.
words.example_zh: 这座曾经宏伟的酒店在几十年的疏于维护后变得破旧不堪。
words.mnemonic: di(分散) + lapid(石头) → 石头散落 → 建筑破败

words.meaning_en: in a very poor condition as a result of disuse and neglect
words.meaning_zh: 荒废的，被遗弃的
words.derivation: de(完全) + relict(遗弃) → 完全被遗弃的 → 荒废的
words.example: The derelict factory was converted into a modern art gallery.
words.example_zh: 这座废弃的工厂被改造成了一个现代艺术画廊。
words.mnemonic: de(完全) + relict(遗弃) → 完全被遗弃 → 荒废的

words.breakdown: de-(向下) + crep-(嘎吱响) + -it(形容词后缀)
words.meaning_en: worn out or ruined because of age or neglect
words.meaning_zh: 破旧的，衰老的
words.derivation: de(向下) + crep(嘎吱响) + it → 嘎吱作响要倒下的 → 破旧的
words.example: The decrepit bridge was closed to traffic until repairs could be completed.
words.example_zh: 这座破旧的桥被关闭禁止通行，直到维修完成。
words.mnemonic: de(向下) + crep(嘎吱响) → 嘎吱作响快要塌了 → 破旧的

words.meaning_en: to voluntarily give up or surrender
words.meaning_zh: 放弃，交出
words.derivation: re(回) + linqu(离开) + ish(动词后缀) → 退回并离开 → 放弃
words.example: The company was forced to relinquish control of its overseas operations.
words.example_zh: 该公司被迫放弃了对其海外业务的控制权。
words.mnemonic: re(回) + linqu(离开) → 退后离开 → 放弃

words.breakdown: dis-(分开) + stingu-(刺，标记) + -ish(动词后缀)
words.meaning_en: to recognize or treat someone or something as different
words.meaning_zh: 区分，辨别
words.derivation: dis(分开) + stingu(标记) + ish(做) → 用标记分开 → 区分
words.example: It is important to distinguish between fact and opinion.
words.example_zh: 区分事实和观点是很重要的。

words.meaning_en: to give shares of something; to spread over an area
words.meaning_zh: 分配，分发；分布
words.derivation: dis(分开) + tribut(给予) → 分开给予 → 分配
words.example: The organization distributes food to those in need.
words.example_zh: 该组织向有需要的人分发食物。

words.meaning_en: to get rid of; to arrange in a particular position
words.meaning_zh: 处理，处置
words.derivation: dis(离开) + pos(放置) + e → 放到一边去 → 处置
words.example: You should dispose of hazardous waste properly.
words.example_zh: 你应该妥善处理危险废物。

words.meaning_en: to make visible by putting in a noticeable position
words.meaning_zh: 展示，陈列
words.derivation: dis(展开) + play(折叠) → 展开折叠的东西 → 展示
words.example: The museum displays artifacts from the colonial period.
words.example_zh: 博物馆展出了殖民时期的文物。

words.meaning_en: to make or become less
words.meaning_zh: 减少，缩小
words.derivation: di(分开) + min(小) + ish(使) → 使变得更小 → 减少
words.example: The supply of fresh water is diminishing rapidly.
words.example_zh: 淡水供应正在迅速减少。

words.meaning_en: to disperse or scatter; to squander or fritter away
words.meaning_zh: 消散；挥霍
words.derivation: dis(分散) + sip(扔) + ate → 四处抛散 → 消散/挥霍
words.example: The morning fog dissipated as the sun rose higher.
words.example_zh: 随着太阳升高，晨雾渐渐消散了。

words.meaning_zh: n. 假面目, 假装\nvt. 假装, 隐瞒
a. 根本不同的, 全异的, 不相干的\nn. 无法相比的东西(或人)
n. 训练, 纪律\nvt. 训练, 惩罚
n. 弟子, 门徒
a. 传统的, 惯例的\n[经] 传统的, 惯例的
words.derivation: 见(上) + al(…的) → 传统的

words.meaning_zh: n. 社论, 评论\na. 编辑的, 主笔的, 社论的
words.derivation: 见(上) + ial(…的) → 社论

words.meaning_zh: n. 潜水, 跳水\nvi. 跳水, 俯冲, 猛冲\nvt. 把...突然伸入
n. 被除数, 股利\n[计] 被除数
a. 神的, 神圣的, 非凡的\nn. 神学家
n. 记录片\na. 文件的
words.derivation: 见(上) + ary(…的) → 记录片\na. 文件的

words.meaning_zh: n. 教条, 学说\n[医] 学说
words.derivation: 见(上) + ine(名词后缀) → 教条

words.meaning_zh: n. (总称)文件\n[计] 文件编制, 文档
a. 家庭的, 国内的, 驯养的\n[医] 家庭的, 家用的
words.derivation: dom(屋) + tic(形容词后缀) → 家庭的

words.meaning_zh: v. 支配, 占优势
a. 占优势的, 支配的\n[医] 优性的, 显性的

words.meaning_en: an area of territory owned or controlled by a ruler; a field of activity or knowledge
words.meaning_zh: 领域，领地
words.derivation: dom(统治) + ain → 统治的范围 → 领域
words.example: Climate change research spans multiple scientific domains.
words.example_zh: 气候变化研究横跨多个科学领域。

words.meaning_en: the country that a person treats as their permanent home; a person's residence
words.meaning_zh: 住所，户籍所在地
words.derivation: dom(房屋) + icile(小) → 住的小屋 → 住所
words.example: For tax purposes, her legal domicile is still in her home state.
words.example_zh: 出于税收目的，她的法定住所仍在她的家乡州。

words.meaning_en: to tame an animal or cultivate a plant for human use
words.meaning_zh: 驯化，驯养
words.derivation: dom(房屋) + estic(属于) + ate(使) → 使属于家庭 → 驯化
words.example: Humans first domesticated dogs over 15,000 years ago.
words.example_zh: 人类在一万五千多年前首次驯化了狗。

words.breakdown: domin-(统治) + -eer(做…的人) + -ing(形容词后缀)
words.meaning_en: asserting one's will over another in an arrogant way
words.meaning_zh: 专横的，跋扈的
words.derivation: domin(统治) + eer(做) + ing → 像统治者一样行事的 → 专横的
words.example: The domineering manager stifled creativity among the team members.
words.example_zh: 那位专横的经理扼杀了团队成员的创造力。

words.breakdown: pre-(在前) + domin-(统治) + -ate(动词后缀)
words.meaning_en: to be the strongest or main element; to have control or power over
words.meaning_zh: 占优势，支配
words.derivation: pre(在前) + domin(统治) + ate → 在前面统治 → 占优势
words.example: Coniferous forests predominate in the northern regions of the continent.
words.example_zh: 针叶林在该大陆北部地区占主导地位。

words.breakdown: do(给) + 女子出嫁(时) + 娘家所(“给”之物 →)
words.meaning_zh:
n. 点, 圆点, 小数点, 小东西, 嫁妆
vt. 作小点记号, 加小点于
vi. 打上点
[计] 点
words.derivation: do(给) + 女子出嫁(时) + 娘家所(“给”之物 →) → 点

words.breakdown: an-(不) + ec-(外) + 向(外) + do(给) + 给出(→ 发表)
words.meaning_zh: n. 轶事, 奇闻
words.derivation: an(不) + ec(外) + 向(外) + do(给) + 给出(→ 发表) → 轶事

words.meaning_zh: v. 捐赠
words.derivation: don(给) + 赠(给) + ate(动词后缀) → 捐赠

words.meaning_en: temporarily inactive; in a state of rest
words.meaning_zh: 休眠的，蛰伏的
words.derivation: dorm(睡眠) + ant(…的) → 处于睡眠状态的 → 休眠的
words.example: The volcano had been dormant for centuries before it erupted suddenly.
words.example_zh: 这座火山在突然喷发前已休眠了数百年。

words.meaning_en: a large sleeping room or a residential building at a school
words.meaning_zh: 宿舍
words.derivation: dorm(睡眠) + itory(场所) → 睡觉的地方 → 宿舍
words.example: Most first-year students are required to live in the campus dormitory.
words.example_zh: 大多数大一新生被要求住在校园宿舍里。

words.meaning_en: to spend the winter in a dormant state
words.meaning_zh: 冬眠
words.derivation: hibern(冬天) + ate(动词后缀) → 度过冬天 → 冬眠
words.example: Bears hibernate during winter months to conserve energy when food is scarce.
words.example_zh: 熊在冬季冬眠以在食物匮乏时节省能量。

words.breakdown: dorm(睡眠) + -ancy(名词后缀) + 表状(态)
words.meaning_zh: n. 不活动性, 休眠, 蛰伏\n[医] 休眠, 不活动, 休止
words.derivation: dorm(睡眠) + ancy(名词后缀) + 表状(态) → 不活动性

words.meaning_zh: vt. 支持, 赞同, 背书于, 签署\n[经] 赞成, 背书
n. 剂量, 用量, 配药\n[医] 剂量
a. 轶事的, 爱谈奇闻轶事的, 多轶事的
vt. 捐赠, 捐助, 赋予\n[法] 赠送财产给, 分给寡妇一份遗产, 授与
a. 向下的
n. 似非而是的论点, 自相矛盾的话, 悖论, 怪人怪事\n[化] 佯谬
a. 激烈的\n[医] 峻泻药, 剧烈的
n. 缺点, 退税\n[法] 退款, 退税
n. 气流, 草稿, 汇票, 草案\nvt. 起草, 征兵\n[计] 草稿
n. 拖, 拖累\nv. 拖累, 拖拉, 沉重缓慢地走, 拖动\n[计] 拖动
n. 蜻蜓
n. 排水沟, 消耗, 排水\nvt. 排出, 喝光, 耗尽\nvi. 排水, 流干
a. 戏剧性的, 生动的
n. 音乐剧, 传奇剧, 戏剧似的事件
vt. 改编成戏剧, 编写剧本\nvi. 戏剧化

vi. 拉, 拖, 拔剑
vt. 拖拉, 挨近, 领取, 打成平局, 引导, 抽签决定, 画, 描写, 制订, 草拟, 吸引
n. 拉, 拖, 拔出, 抽签, 平局
[计] 翻牌, 绘图
vt. 撤回, 取回, 撤消, 使撤退, 拉开, 移开\nvi. 撤退, 离开
vt. 使湿透, 使充满\nn. 滂沱大雨, 弄湿
n. 漂流物, 漂流, 动向\nv. (使)漂流
n. 钻孔机, 钻子, 播种机, 粗斜纹布\nv. 训练, 钻孔
a. 昏昏欲睡的\n[医] 倦睡的, 瞌睡的
n. 干旱, 缺乏
n. 并发症状, 综合征, 同时存在的事物\n[计] 校验子; 并发位
words.derivation: syn(同) + drom(跑) → 并发症状

words.breakdown: du(双) + plic(重叠) + 重(复) + -ate(使…)
words.meaning_zh:
n. 副本, 复本, 复制品
a. 复制的, 二重的
vt. 复制, 使加倍
[计] 复制
words.derivation: du(双) + plic(重叠) + 重(复) + ate(使…) → 副本

words.meaning_zh: a. 双重的, 双的\nn. 双数
words.derivation: du(双) + al(…的) → 双重的

words.meaning_zh: a. 可疑的, 不确定的
v. 繁殖, 再生, 复制, 生殖\n[计] 复制
words.derivation: re(再) + produce(生产) → 繁殖

words.meaning_zh: n. 介绍, 传入, 采用, 初步
words.derivation: intro(入) + duct(引) + ion(名词后缀) → 介绍

words.meaning_zh: n. 生产力\n[经] 生产率, 生产能力
a. 能生产的, 有生产价值的, 多产的\n[医] 产出性的, 产生性的
words.derivation: 见(上) + ive(…的) → 能生产的

words.meaning_zh: a. 受过教育的, 有教养的
a. 易延展的, 韧性的, 易教导的\n[医] 延伸性的
n. 导电率, 传导率, 传导性\n[化] 电导率
vt. 引导, 使入门, 引入, 使就职
a. 推论的, 演绎的\n[法] 推定的, 推断的, 演绎的

words.meaning_en: to organize and carry out; to lead or guide
words.meaning_zh: 实施，进行；指挥
words.derivation: con(共同) + duct(引导) → 一起引导 → 实施
words.example: The professor will conduct a series of experiments.
words.example_zh: 教授将进行一系列实验。

words.meaning_en: to bring something into use or operation for the first time
words.meaning_zh: 介绍；引进
words.derivation: intro(向内) + duc(引导) → 引导进来 → 介绍
words.example: The company introduced a new product line last year.
words.example_zh: 该公司去年推出了新的产品线。

words.meaning_en: to make or manufacture from components or raw materials
words.meaning_zh: 生产，制造；产生
words.derivation: pro(向前) + duc(引导) → 向前引出 → 生产
words.example: This factory produces electronic components.
words.example_zh: 这家工厂生产电子元件。

words.meaning_en: to make smaller or less in amount, degree, or size
words.meaning_zh: 减少，缩小
words.derivation: re(回) + duc(引导) → 引导回去 → 减少
words.example: We need to reduce our carbon emissions.
words.example_zh: 我们需要减少碳排放。

words.meaning_en: to succeed in persuading or influencing someone to do something
words.meaning_zh: 引起，导致；诱导
words.derivation: in(向内) + duc(引导) → 引导进入某种状态 → 诱导
words.example: Stress can induce a variety of health problems.
words.example_zh: 压力可以引发各种健康问题。

words.meaning_en: to subtract or take away an amount from a total
words.meaning_zh: 扣除，减去
words.derivation: de(离开) + duct(引导) → 引导离开 → 扣除
words.example: The company will deduct taxes directly from your monthly salary.
words.example_zh: 公司将直接从你的月薪中扣除税款。

words.meaning_en: to attract someone to a belief or into wrongdoing; to entice
words.meaning_zh: 引诱，诱惑
words.derivation: se(离开) + duc(引导) → 引导离开正途 → 引诱
words.example: Advertisers use psychological techniques to seduce consumers into buying unnecessary products.
words.example_zh: 广告商利用心理技巧诱导消费者购买不必要的产品。

words.meaning_en: to take someone away illegally by force
words.meaning_zh: 绑架，劫持
words.derivation: ab(离开) + duct(引导) → 强行引走 → 绑架
words.example: The child was abducted from the playground but was safely returned within hours.
words.example_zh: 这个孩子在操场上被绑架，但在数小时内安全归来。

words.meaning_zh:
n. 垃圾场
vt. 倾倒, 倾销
vi. 倒垃圾, 倾销商品
[计] 转出; 转储; 倾卸; 切断电源
a. 持久的, 耐用的
vt. 忍受, 忍耐, 容忍, 耐\nvi. (正式)持久, 持续\n[计] 仍能工作, 继续工作
a. 动力的, 动态的, 动力学的, (褒)有生气的, 有力的, 能动的, 精悍的, 机能上的\nn. 动力, 动态, 原动力\n[计] 动态的
a. 热心的, 渴望的, 热望的
vt. 发掘, 掘出, 从洞中赶出, 揭露, 发现
n. 疾病, 弊病\n[医] [疾]病
n. 安乐, 安逸, 悠闲\nvt. 使安乐, 使安心, 减轻, 放松\nvi. 减轻, 放松, 灵活地移动
n. 边缘, 尖锐, 刀刃, 优势\nvt. 使锐利, 挤进, 镶边\nvi. 缓缓移动
a. 节俭的, 经济的, 合算的\n[经] 经济的, 节约的
a. 生态学的, 主张生态保护的\n[法] 生态的, 生态学的
a. 经济上的, 实用的, 节省的\n[经] 经济的
n. 生态系统\n[医] 生态系
n. 喜剧, 有趣的事情

words.breakdown: ed(吃) + -ible(形容词后缀) + 可(…的)
words.meaning_zh: n. 食品, 食物\na. 可食用的
words.derivation: ed(吃) + ible(形容词后缀) + 可(…的) → 食品

meaning_en: words related to edges and boundaries
meaning_zh: 与边缘和界限相关的词

words.meaning_en: the extreme edge of something, especially before a dangerous event
words.meaning_zh: 边缘，边沿
words.derivation: 源自中古英语，意为水边、悬崖边缘
words.example: The country stood on the brink of economic collapse.
words.example_zh: 这个国家正处于经济崩溃的边缘。
words.mnemonic: b + rink(溜冰场边) → 溜冰场的边缘 → 边缘

words.meaning_en: an edge or border; to be very close to a state or condition
words.meaning_zh: 边缘；接近
words.derivation: 源自拉丁语 vergere(倾斜、转向) → 边缘
words.example: The endangered species is on the verge of extinction.
words.example_zh: 这一濒危物种正处于灭绝的边缘。
words.mnemonic: 与vert(转)同源 → 转弯处 → 边缘

words.meaning_en: to actively break the terms of a law or agreement; to encroach on rights
words.meaning_zh: 侵犯，违反
words.derivation: in(进入) + fringe(边缘) → 越过边界 → 侵犯
words.example: The new law could infringe on citizens' freedom of speech.
words.example_zh: 新法律可能会侵犯公民的言论自由。
words.mnemonic: in + fringe(边缘) → 越过边缘进入 → 侵犯

words.meaning_zh: n. 服从, 顺从, 忠实\n[法] 服从, 顺从, 遵从
a. 有效率的, 能干的
n. 效率, 效能, 功效\n[医] 效率, 效力
n. 电子\n[化] 电子
n. 电, 电流, 电学, 热情, 电力供应\n[化] 电学; 电
n. 电极\n[化] 电极; 焊条; 电焊条
a. 初步的, 基本的\n[医] 元素的, 基础的, 初级的
n. 元件, 元素, 要素\n[计] 部分; 成分; 单元; 码元; 元件; 元素; 单元
vt. 引出, 推导出, 引起
n. 精华, 精锐, 中坚分子
a. 椭圆的\n[医] 椭圆形的
n. 椭圆, 椭圆形\n[计] 椭圆
a. 可仿效的, 可做模范的, 惩戒性的, 示范的\n[法] 惩罚性的, 警戒性的, 示范的

n. 激励, 提示, 提醒物, 提词, 付款期限
a. 迅速的, 敏捷的, 立刻的, 提词员的
vt. 激励, 鼓动, 提示
adv. 准时地
[计] 提示符; DOS内部命令:设定DOS命令行的提示符
vt. 例证, 例示\n[法] 制作经公章证明的誊本, 例证
n. 胚胎, 胎儿, 胚芽\n[医] 胚, 胚胎
vt. 使困窘, 使局促不安, 阻碍

meaning_zh: 突出的，显赫的（显要联想）

words.breakdown: e-(出) + min-(突出) + -ent(形容词后缀)
words.meaning_en: famous and respected within a particular field
words.meaning_zh: 杰出的，著名的
words.derivation: e(出) + min(突出) + ent(…的) → 突出来的 → 杰出的
words.example: The eminent biologist received the Nobel Prize for her groundbreaking research.
words.example_zh: 这位杰出的生物学家因其开创性研究获得了诺贝尔奖。
words.mnemonic: e(出) + min(突出) → 高高突出 → 杰出的

words.meaning_en: surpassing all others; most distinguished
words.meaning_zh: 最杰出的，卓越的
words.derivation: pre(在…之前) + eminent(杰出的) → 比杰出更杰出 → 卓越的
words.example: She is the preeminent authority on climate change adaptation strategies.
words.example_zh: 她是气候变化适应策略方面最权威的专家。
words.mnemonic: pre(在前) + eminent(杰出) → 在杰出者之前 → 最卓越的

words.breakdown: im-(在…上) + min-(突出/逼近) + -ent(形容词后缀)
words.meaning_en: about to happen; impending
words.meaning_zh: 迫在眉睫的，即将发生的
words.derivation: im(在…上) + min(逼近) + ent(…的) → 逼近眼前的 → 迫在眉睫的
words.example: Scientists warned that an eruption of the volcano was imminent.
words.example_zh: 科学家警告说火山喷发迫在眉睫。
words.mnemonic: im(在…上) + minent(突出) → 悬在头顶上的 → 迫在眉睫的

words.breakdown: pro-(向前) + min-(突出) + -ent(形容词后缀)
words.meaning_en: important or well-known; projecting from something
words.meaning_zh: 突出的，著名的
words.derivation: pro(向前) + min(突出) + ent(…的) → 向前突出的 → 显眼的/著名的
words.example: Several prominent scientists spoke at the international conference on biodiversity.
words.example_zh: 几位著名科学家在国际生物多样性会议上发表了演讲。
words.mnemonic: pro(向前) + min(突出) → 向前突出 → 显眼的/著名的

words.meaning_zh: n. 皇后, 女皇
a. 帝王的, 宗主国的, 至尊的, 壮丽的\nn. 特等品

words.meaning_en: free from an obligation or liability imposed on others
words.meaning_zh: 被免除的，被豁免的
words.derivation: ex(出) + empt(拿取) → 被拿出来（不受约束）→ 被豁免的
words.example: Non-profit organizations are often exempt from paying certain taxes.
words.example_zh: 非营利组织通常可以免缴某些税款。

words.meaning_en: to take action to prevent something from happening
words.meaning_zh: 先发制人，抢占
words.derivation: pre(之前) + empt(拿取) → 提前拿走 → 先发制人
words.example: The government launched a preemptive strike to preempt the imminent attack.
words.example_zh: 政府发动了一次先发制人的打击，以阻止即将到来的攻击。

words.meaning_en: to compensate for faults; to buy back; to fulfill a promise
words.meaning_zh: 赎回，弥补
words.derivation: re(回) + em(买) → 买回来 → 赎回/弥补
words.example: The company sought to redeem its reputation by donating to charitable causes.
words.example_zh: 公司试图通过向慈善事业捐款来挽回声誉。

words.meaning_en: the act of saving or being saved from sin or evil; recovery
words.meaning_zh: 赎回，救赎
words.derivation: re(回) + dempt(买回) + ion(名词后缀) → 买回来的行为 → 救赎
words.example: The novel explores themes of guilt and redemption through its complex characters.
words.example_zh: 这部小说通过复杂的人物探讨了罪恶与救赎的主题。

words.meaning_zh: vt. 围绕, 完成, 包括, 包含, 环绕, 包围
vi. 侵犯, 侵蚀, 蚕食\n[法] 侵犯, 侵入, 侵占
n. 相会, 相遇, 遭遇\nvt. 遇见, 邂逅, 会战\nvi. 偶然相遇
n. 周围环境, 气氛
a. 不停的, 无穷尽的, 无尽的\n[机] 无端的, 环状的
vt. 刻上, 雕刻, 铭记
n. 雕刻, 镌版术, 雕版
vt. 提高, 加强, 增加
n. 千禧年, 一千年
n. 实体, 实存物, 存在\n[计] 实体
v. 恳求, 乞求
n. 全体随行人员, 陪同人员
n. 陨星\n[化] 陨石; 陨铁
n. 流星, 大气现象
n. 插曲, 插话, 有趣的事件, 一段情节\n[医] 插话, 插曲, 发作
n. 史诗, 叙事诗\na. 史诗的, 叙事诗的
a. 熟练的, 老练的, 巧妙的\nn. 能手, 内行

n. 对手, 匹敌, 同辈
a. 相等的, 平等的, 胜任的, 合适的, 平静的, 不相上下的
vt. 等于, 比得上
[计] 等长度编码
